<script>
  function getSaveValue(profBonus, prof, attribute) {
    const isProficient = prof === "true";

    const modField = `${attribute}Mod`;
    const saveField = `${attribute}Save`;

    let modVal = parseInt(record?.data?.[modField] || "0", 10);
    if (isNaN(modVal)) {
      modVal = 0;
    }

    const savVal = isProficient ? modVal + profBonus : modVal;
    return {
      field: `data.${saveField}`,
      value: savVal,
    };
  }

  function updateHitPoints(
    newClass,
    newLevel,
    totalLevel,
    newHitDie,
    recordOverride,
    additionalPrompt,
  ) {
    // Here we update the characters HP and set a hidden value `hpByLevel` to track
    // the HP received at each level
    // For levels > 1 we prompt the user to determine if they are rolling or taking the average
    const thisRecord = recordOverride || record;
    const hpByLevel = thisRecord?.data?.hpByLevel || "[]";
    const hpByLevelArr = JSON.parse(hpByLevel);

    const callback = (values) => {
      if (values.length >= 1) {
        const value = values[0];
        // Here we set the HP by Level string for this level with the average roll
        // or trigger a roll of type hitpoints with the given roll
        if (value.startsWith("value-")) {
          // Add it to map for record keeping
          const addHp = parseInt(value.replace("value-", ""), 10);
          hpByLevelArr.push({
            className: newClass,
            level: totalLevel,
            hitDie: newHitDie,
            hp: addHp,
          });

          // Get CON mod
          const conMod = parseInt(thisRecord?.data?.constitutionMod || "0", 10);
          // Add addHP + conMod
          let hpToAdd = addHp + conMod;
          // Add rolled value min of 1 after CON MOD
          if (hpToAdd < 0) {
            hpToAdd = 1;
          }
          const curHp = parseInt(thisRecord?.data?.curhp || "0", 10);

          // Calculate current max HP
          let curHpMax = getHpForLevel(conMod, thisRecord);

          const hpValuesToSet = {
            "data.curhp": curHp + hpToAdd,
            "data.hitpoints": curHpMax + hpToAdd,
            "data.hpByLevel": JSON.stringify(hpByLevelArr),
            [`data.hpLevel${totalLevel}`]: addHp,
          };

          // Update hpByLevel fields
          setHpPerLevel(thisRecord, hpValuesToSet);

          // Add a hitdie
          const hitDieField = `${newHitDie}HitDie`;
          const numHitDie = parseInt(
            thisRecord?.data?.[hitDieField] || "0",
            10,
          );
          hpValuesToSet[`data.${hitDieField}`] = numHitDie + 1;

          // Set values
          api.setValues(hpValuesToSet);

          // Send a Message
          const newHp = curHpMax + hpToAdd;
          const characterName = thisRecord?.name || "New Character";
          const message = `Added 1 Level of ${newClass} to ${characterName}.\n\n[color=green]New Hit Point Total:[/color] ${newHp}`;
          api.sendMessage(message, undefined, [], []);
        } else {
          api.roll(
            newHitDie,
            {
              className: newClass,
              totalLevel: totalLevel,
              newHitDie: newHitDie,
            },
            "hitpoints",
          );
        }
      }

      if (additionalPrompt) {
        additionalPrompt();
      }
    };

    const hitDieValue = parseInt(newHitDie.replace("d", ""), 10);
    if (hitDieValue === 0 || isNaN(hitDieValue)) {
      return;
    }
    const avg = Math.floor(hitDieValue / 2) + 1;

    if (totalLevel > 1) {
      // Prompt for method
      const text = `Select Average or Roll...`;
      const options = [
        {
          label: `Average (${avg})`,
          value: `value-${avg}`,
        },
        {
          label: `Roll (${newHitDie})`,
          value: newHitDie,
        },
      ];
      api.showPrompt(
        "New Level Hit Points",
        "Select Hit Point Method",
        text,
        options,
        null,
        callback,
      );
    } else {
      // Just call callback with max value
      callback([`value-${hitDieValue}`]);
    }
  }

  function setSave(prof, attribute) {
    const isProficient = prof === "true";

    const modField = `${attribute}Mod`;
    const saveField = `${attribute}Save`;

    let proficiencyBonus = parseInt(
      record?.data?.["proficiencyBonus"] || "0",
      10,
    );
    if (isNaN(proficiencyBonus)) {
      proficiencyBonus = 0;
    }

    let modVal = parseInt(record?.data?.[modField] || "0", 10);
    if (isNaN(modVal)) {
      modVal = 0;
    }

    const savVal = isProficient ? modVal + proficiencyBonus : modVal;
    api.setValue(`data.${saveField}`, savVal);
  }

  // On update of PB or level, update Saves and Skills
  function updateProficiencies(value, recordOverride) {
    const thisRecord = recordOverride || record;
    const val = parseInt(value, 10);
    if (isNaN(val)) {
      return;
    }

    const valuesToSet = {};
    [
      "strength",
      "constitution",
      "dexterity",
      "intelligence",
      "wisdom",
      "charisma",
    ].forEach((attribute) => {
      const isProficient = thisRecord?.data?.[`${attribute}Prof`] || "false";
      const saveValue = getSaveValue(value, isProficient, attribute);
      valuesToSet[saveValue.field] = saveValue.value;
    });

    getSkills().forEach((skill) => {
      // Skills can be also be half, proficient, or expertise
      const proficiency = thisRecord?.data?.[`${skill.field}Prof`] || "false";
      const isHalfProficient = proficiency === "half";
      const isExpertise = proficiency === "expertise";
      const isProficient = proficiency === "true";
      // Get the ability being used for this skill, fallback to the skill's default
      const ability =
        thisRecord?.data?.[`${skill.field}Ability`] || skill.ability;
      const abilityMod = parseInt(
        thisRecord?.data?.[`${ability}Mod`] || "0",
        10,
      );
      let totalVal = 0;
      if (isHalfProficient) {
        totalVal = abilityMod + Math.floor(value / 2);
      } else if (isExpertise) {
        totalVal = abilityMod + value * 2;
      } else if (isProficient) {
        totalVal = abilityMod + value;
      } else {
        totalVal = abilityMod;
      }

      setSkillModAndPassive(valuesToSet, thisRecord, skill.field, totalVal);
    });

    // Also update otherSkills
    const otherSkills = record?.data?.otherSkills || [];
    otherSkills.forEach((skill, index) => {
      const ability = skill?.data?.ability || "strength";
      const abilityMod = parseInt(
        thisRecord?.data?.[`${ability}Mod`] || "0",
        10,
      );
      // Skills can be also be half, proficient, or expertise
      const proficiency = skill?.data?.skillProf || "false";
      const isHalfProficient = proficiency === "half";
      const isExpertise = proficiency === "expertise";
      const isProficient = proficiency === "true";
      if (isHalfProficient) {
        valuesToSet[`data.otherSkills.${index}.data.skillMod`] =
          abilityMod + Math.floor(value / 2);
      } else if (isExpertise) {
        valuesToSet[`data.otherSkills.${index}.data.skillMod`] =
          abilityMod + value * 2;
      } else if (isProficient) {
        valuesToSet[`data.otherSkills.${index}.data.skillMod`] =
          abilityMod + value;
      } else {
        valuesToSet[`data.otherSkills.${index}.data.skillMod`] = abilityMod;
      }
    });

    // Go through abilityGroups and update maxDailyUses if needed
    const abilityGroups = thisRecord?.data?.abilityGroups || [];
    abilityGroups.forEach((abilityGroup, index) => {
      if (
        abilityGroup?.data?.fieldsToAddToUses &&
        abilityGroup?.data?.fieldsToAddToUses.length > 0
      ) {
        const totalUses = getTotalValueFromFields(
          thisRecord,
          abilityGroup?.data?.fieldsToAddToUses || [],
        );
        if (totalUses > 0) {
          valuesToSet[`data.abilityGroups.${index}.data.maxDailyUses`] =
            totalUses;
        }
      }
    });

    api.setValues(valuesToSet);
  }

  // Get spell slots for a given level caster level
  function getSpellSlotCount(spellCasterLevel) {
    const spellSlotsByLevel = [
      [0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0], // Level 0
      [2, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0], // Level 1
      [3, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0], // Level 2
      [4, 2, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0], // Level 3
      [4, 3, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0], // Level 4
      [4, 3, 2, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0], // Level 5
      [4, 3, 3, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0], // Level 6
      [4, 3, 3, 1, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0], // Level 7
      [4, 3, 3, 2, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0], // Level 8
      [4, 3, 3, 3, 1, 0, 0, 0, 0], // Level 9
      [4, 3, 3, 3, 2, 0, 0, 0, 0], // Level 10
      [4, 3, 3, 3, 2, 1, 0, 0, 0], // Level 11
      [4, 3, 3, 3, 2, 1, 0, 0, 0], // Level 12
      [4, 3, 3, 3, 2, 1, 1, 0, 0], // Level 13
      [4, 3, 3, 3, 2, 1, 1, 0, 0], // Level 14
      [4, 3, 3, 3, 2, 1, 1, 1, 0], // Level 15
      [4, 3, 3, 3, 2, 1, 1, 1, 0], // Level 16
      [4, 3, 3, 3, 2, 1, 1, 1, 1], // Level 17
      [4, 3, 3, 3, 3, 1, 1, 1, 1], // Level 18
      [4, 3, 3, 3, 3, 2, 1, 1, 1], // Level 19
      [4, 3, 3, 3, 3, 2, 2, 1, 1], // Level 20
    ];

    return spellSlotsByLevel[spellCasterLevel];
  }

  function getDefaultAbilityForSkillField(skillField) {
    return (
      getSkills().find((s) => s.field === skillField)?.ability || "strength"
    );
  }

  // This function tries to guess the ability for a tool,
  // defaults to strength if we do not know
  function guessAbility(tool) {
    const lower = tool.toLowerCase();
    if (lower.includes("thieve")) {
      return "dexterity";
    }
    if (lower.includes("alchemist")) {
      return "intelligence";
    }
    if (lower === "brewer") {
      return "intelligence";
    }
    if (lower.includes("calligrapher")) {
      return "dexterity";
    }
    if (lower.includes("carpenter")) {
      return "strength";
    }
    if (lower.includes("cartographer")) {
      return "wisdom";
    }
    if (lower.includes("cobbler")) {
      return "dexterity";
    }
    if (lower.includes("cook")) {
      return "wisdom";
    }
    if (lower.includes("glassblower")) {
      return "intelligence";
    }
    if (lower.includes("jeweler")) {
      return "intelligence";
    }
    if (lower.includes("leatherworker")) {
      return "dexterity";
    }
    if (lower.includes("mason")) {
      return "strength";
    }
    if (lower.includes("painter")) {
      return "wisdom";
    }
    if (lower.includes("potter")) {
      return "intelligence";
    }
    if (lower.includes("smith")) {
      return "strength";
    }
    if (lower.includes("tinker")) {
      return "dexterity";
    }
    if (lower.includes("weaver")) {
      return "dexterity";
    }
    if (lower.includes("woodcarver")) {
      return "dexterity";
    }
    if (lower.includes("disguise")) {
      return "charisma";
    }
    if (lower.includes("forgery")) {
      return "dexterity";
    }
    if (lower.includes("gaming")) {
      return "wisdom";
    }
    if (lower.includes("herbalism")) {
      return "intelligence";
    }
    if (lower.includes("navigator")) {
      return "wisdom";
    }
    if (lower.includes("poisoner")) {
      return "intelligence";
    }
    if (
      lower.includes("instrument") ||
      lower.includes("lute") ||
      lower.includes("harp") ||
      lower.includes("lyre") ||
      lower.includes("flute") ||
      lower.includes("drum") ||
      lower.includes("bagpipe") ||
      lower.includes("dulcimer") ||
      lower.includes("sing")
    ) {
      return "charisma";
    }

    return "strength";
  }

    }
    if (level === 3) {

  }

        "level3spellsOpen",

        "level5spellsOpen",
        "level6spellsOpen",
        "level7spellsOpen",
        "level8spellsOpen",
        "level9spellsOpen",
      ],
      true,
      () => {
        if (spellLevel === undefined || spellLevel === null) {
          return;

        const valuesToUnhide = [];
        if (spellLevel >= 9) {
          valuesToUnhide.push("level9spellsOpen");
