    }

    api.setHidden(valuesToHide, true, () => {
      api.setHidden(valuesToUnhide, false);
    });
  }

  function getSkillChoices(classObj, isMulticlass) {
    // From the given class object, parse the options of skill choices
    // From the format: `Choose X: (Skill1, Skill2, Skill3)` OR `Y skill of your choice` where X is an int and Y is a spelled number 1-10
    const skillProficiencies = classObj?.data?.skillProficiencies || "";
    const skillProficienciesMulti =
      classObj?.data?.skillProficienciesMulti || "";

    // Regular expression to extract the number of choices and the skills list
    const choicePattern = /[Cc]hoose (\d+): ([^)]+)/;
    const choiceMatch = skillProficiencies.match(choicePattern);
    const choiceAnyPattern = /[Cc]hoose any (\d+) skills/;
    const choiceAnyMatch = skillProficiencies.match(choiceAnyPattern);

    let numChoices = 0;
    let skills = [];

    if (choiceMatch) {
      numChoices = parseInt(choiceMatch[1], 10); // Number of skills to choose
      skills = choiceMatch[2]
        .split(",")
        .map((s) => s.trim().replace("or ", ""))
        .filter((s) => s !== ""); // Array of skill names
    } else if (choiceAnyMatch) {
      numChoices = parseInt(choiceAnyMatch[1], 10); // Number of skills to choose
      skills = getSkills().map((s) => s.name);
    }

    // If we are multiclassing parse the number of choices we get
    if (
      isMulticlass &&
      skillProficienciesMulti &&
      skillProficienciesMulti !== "None"
    ) {
      // Handle the case where the format is "Y skill of your choice"
      const spelledNumberPattern = /(\w+) skill of your choice/;
      const spelledMatch = skillProficienciesMulti
        .toLowerCase()
        .match(spelledNumberPattern);
      if (spelledMatch) {
        const numWords = {
          one: 1,
          two: 2,
          three: 3,
          four: 4,
          five: 5,
          six: 6,
          seven: 7,
          eight: 8,
          nine: 9,
          ten: 10,
        };
        numChoices = numWords[spelledMatch[1].toLowerCase()] || 0;
      } else {
        numChoices = 0;
      }
    } else if (isMulticlass) {
      numChoices = 0;
    }

    // Return null if no valid format is found
    return {
      numChoices,
      skills,
    };
  }

  function promptSkillChoices(classObj, isMulticlass, nextPrompt) {
    const skillChoices = getSkillChoices(classObj, isMulticlass);
    if (skillChoices.numChoices > 0 && skillChoices.skills.length > 0) {
      // Prompt the user to choose the skills, on callback, we set proficiencies
      // on the chosen skills
      const skillSelection = (values) => {
        if (values.length > 0) {
          const proficiencyBonus = parseInt(
            api.getValue("data.proficiencyBonus") || "2",
            10,
          );

          const valuesToSet = {};
          values.forEach((skill) => {
            valuesToSet[`data.${skill}Prof`] = "true";
            // We also need to get the relavant ability score and set the proficiency
            const ability =
              api.getValue(`data.${skill}Ability`) ||
              getDefaultAbilityForSkillField(skill);
            const abilityMod = parseInt(
              api.getValue(`data.${ability}Mod`) || "0",
              10,
            );
            // Basic proficiency, so add the whole bonus to the modifier
            setSkillModAndPassive(
              valuesToSet,
              record,
              skill,
              abilityMod + proficiencyBonus,
            );
          });

          api.setValues(valuesToSet, (recordUpdated) => {
            if (nextPrompt) {
              nextPrompt(recordUpdated);
            }
          });
        } else {
          if (nextPrompt) {
            nextPrompt(record);
          }
        }
      };

      // We need to prompt with options to select a subclass
      const options = skillChoices.skills.map((skill) => ({
        label: skill,
        // In code we use camelCase, so we need to convert from normal to camelCase
        value: normalToCamelCase(skill),
      }));

      const adjective = isMulticlass ? "Multiclass" : "Starting";

      api.showPrompt(
        `Choose ${adjective} Skills`,
        "Skills",
        `Select ${skillChoices.numChoices} Skills...`,
        options,
        null,
        skillSelection,
        "OK",
        "Cancel",
        skillChoices.numChoices,
      );
    } else if (nextPrompt) {
      // No skills, just go to next prompt
      nextPrompt(record);
    }
  }

  // Return a map of spell slot fields to set for the given list of
  // current classes, subclasses, the class object for the new class,
  // and the total level of the character
  function getSpellSlotFields(
    classes,
    subclasses,
    classString,
    classObj,
    level,
    newClassLevel,
  ) {
    // If we're multiclasses, we use the multiclass settings
    const isMulticlass =
      classes.length > 1 || classes.find((c) => c.name !== classObj.name);

    const casterType = classObj?.data?.casterType || "None";
    const fieldsToSet = {};
    let highestSpellLevel = undefined;

    // Also check if it requires a subclass
    const subclassOptions = (classObj?.data?.requiredSubclass || "")
      .split(",")
      .map((s) => s.trim())
      .filter((s) => s !== "");
    const requiredSubclass = subclassOptions.length > 0;
    let meetsRequirements = true;
    if (requiredSubclass) {
      meetsRequirements = subclasses.some((s) =>
        subclassOptions.includes(s?.name || ""),
      );
    }

    if (!isMulticlass && casterType === "Spellcasting" && meetsRequirements) {
      const spellSlots = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9].map(
        (spellLevel) =>
          classObj?.data?.[`level${level}spell${spellLevel}`] || 0,
      );
      fieldsToSet[`data.numSpellSlots1`] = spellSlots[0];
      fieldsToSet[`data.numSpellSlots2`] = spellSlots[1];
      fieldsToSet[`data.numSpellSlots3`] = spellSlots[2];
      fieldsToSet[`data.numSpellSlots4`] = spellSlots[3];
      fieldsToSet[`data.numSpellSlots5`] = spellSlots[4];
      fieldsToSet[`data.numSpellSlots6`] = spellSlots[5];
      fieldsToSet[`data.numSpellSlots7`] = spellSlots[6];
      fieldsToSet[`data.numSpellSlots8`] = spellSlots[7];
      fieldsToSet[`data.numSpellSlots9`] = spellSlots[8];
      // Calculate the highest spell level that has slots available
      highestSpellLevel = spellSlots.findIndex((slots) => slots === 0);
      if (highestSpellLevel === -1) {
        highestSpellLevel = 9;
      }
    } else if (isMulticlass) {
      // Get total levels of all spellcasting classes
      let spellCasterLevel = 0;
      let allClasses = [...classes];
      if (!allClasses.find((c) => c.name === classObj.name)) {
        allClasses.push(classObj);
      }
      allClasses.forEach((c) => {
        const className = c?.name;
        const multiclassSetting = c?.data?.multiclassSpellcaster || "No";
        // Use regex to safely escape special characters in className and match the level number
        if (multiclassSetting !== "No") {
          const safeClassName = className.replace(
            /[-\/\\^$*+?.()|[\]{}]/g,
            "\\$&",
          );
          const regex = new RegExp(`(${safeClassName}\\s+(\\d+))`, "i");
          const classLevelMatch = classString.match(regex);
          if (classLevelMatch && classLevelMatch[2]) {
            const classLevel = parseInt(classLevelMatch[2], 10);
            if (multiclassSetting.toLowerCase().includes("each")) {
              spellCasterLevel += classLevel;
            } else if (multiclassSetting.toLowerCase().includes("half")) {
              spellCasterLevel += Math.ceil(classLevel / 2);
            } else if (multiclassSetting.toLowerCase().includes("third")) {
              // Check if subclass exists
              const subclasesToCheck = (
                c?.data?.multiclassSpellcasterSubclass || ""
              )
                .split(",")
                .map((s) => s.trim());
              if (
                subclasses.find((s) => subclasesToCheck.includes(s?.name || ""))
              ) {
                spellCasterLevel += Math.floor(classLevel / 3);
              }
            }
          }
        }
      });

      if (spellCasterLevel > 0) {
        const spellSlots = getSpellSlotCount(spellCasterLevel);
        fieldsToSet[`data.numSpellSlots1`] = spellSlots[0];
        fieldsToSet[`data.numSpellSlots2`] = spellSlots[1];
        fieldsToSet[`data.numSpellSlots3`] = spellSlots[2];
        fieldsToSet[`data.numSpellSlots4`] = spellSlots[3];
        fieldsToSet[`data.numSpellSlots5`] = spellSlots[4];
        fieldsToSet[`data.numSpellSlots6`] = spellSlots[5];
        fieldsToSet[`data.numSpellSlots7`] = spellSlots[6];
        fieldsToSet[`data.numSpellSlots8`] = spellSlots[7];
        fieldsToSet[`data.numSpellSlots9`] = spellSlots[8];
        highestSpellLevel = spellSlots.findIndex((slots) => slots === 0);
        if (highestSpellLevel === -1) {
          highestSpellLevel = 9;
        }
      }
    }

    // If the Caster Type is Pact Magic, we just add the pact magic slots
    if (casterType === "Pact Magic") {
      // Warlocks only use their own level, no multiclassing level
      const pactSlots = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9].map((spellLevel) =>
        parseInt(
          classObj?.data?.[`level${newClassLevel}spell${spellLevel}`] || "0",
          10,
        ),
      );
      fieldsToSet[`data.numPactMagic1`] = pactSlots[0];
      fieldsToSet[`data.numPactMagic2`] = pactSlots[1];
      fieldsToSet[`data.numPactMagic3`] = pactSlots[2];
      fieldsToSet[`data.numPactMagic4`] = pactSlots[3];
      fieldsToSet[`data.numPactMagic5`] = pactSlots[4];
      fieldsToSet[`data.numPactMagic6`] = pactSlots[5];
      fieldsToSet[`data.numPactMagic7`] = pactSlots[6];
      fieldsToSet[`data.numPactMagic8`] = pactSlots[7];
      fieldsToSet[`data.numPactMagic9`] = pactSlots[8];

      // Find the highest level that has slots
      let highestPactLevel = pactSlots.reduce((highest, slots, index) => {
        return slots > 0 ? index + 1 : highest;
      }, 0);
      if (highestPactLevel > (highestSpellLevel || 0)) {
        highestSpellLevel = highestPactLevel;
      }
    }

    // If using spell points variant, calculate the spell point pool
    // based on the effective spellcaster level (same multiclass rules as spell slots)
    if (record?.data?.useSpellPoints && casterType !== "Pact Magic") {
      // Spell Points by Level table (2014 variant rule)
      const SPELL_POINTS_BY_LEVEL = [
        0, // Level 0
        4, // Level 1
        6, // Level 2
        14, // Level 3
        17, // Level 4
        27, // Level 5
        32, // Level 6
        38, // Level 7
        44, // Level 8
        57, // Level 9
        64, // Level 10
        73, // Level 11
        73, // Level 12
        83, // Level 13
        83, // Level 14
        94, // Level 15
        94, // Level 16
        107, // Level 17
        114, // Level 18
        123, // Level 19
        133, // Level 20
      ];

      // Calculate effective spellcaster level for spell points
      let spellPointCasterLevel = 0;
      if (!isMulticlass) {
        // Single class: use class level directly, applying half/third caster rules
        const multiclassSetting = classObj?.data?.multiclassSpellcaster || "No";
        if (
          multiclassSetting.toLowerCase().includes("each") ||
          multiclassSetting === "No"
        ) {
          // Full caster (or casterType is "Spellcasting" which implies full)
          spellPointCasterLevel = newClassLevel;
        } else if (multiclassSetting.toLowerCase().includes("half")) {
          spellPointCasterLevel = Math.ceil(newClassLevel / 2);
        } else if (multiclassSetting.toLowerCase().includes("third")) {
          spellPointCasterLevel = Math.floor(newClassLevel / 3);
        }
      } else {
        // Multiclass: same combined level used for spell slot calculation
        let combinedLevel = 0;
        let allClasses = [...classes];
        if (!allClasses.find((c) => c.name === classObj.name)) {
          allClasses.push(classObj);
        }
        allClasses.forEach((c) => {
          const className = c?.name;
          const multiclassSetting = c?.data?.multiclassSpellcaster || "No";
          const cType = c?.data?.casterType || "None";
          if (multiclassSetting !== "No" && cType !== "Pact Magic") {
            const safeClassName = className.replace(
              /[-\/\\^$*+?.()|[\]{}]/g,
              "\\$&",
            );
            const regex = new RegExp(`(${safeClassName}\\s+(\\d+))`, "i");
            const classLevelMatch = classString.match(regex);
            if (classLevelMatch && classLevelMatch[2]) {
              const classLevel = parseInt(classLevelMatch[2], 10);
              if (multiclassSetting.toLowerCase().includes("each")) {
                combinedLevel += classLevel;
              } else if (multiclassSetting.toLowerCase().includes("half")) {
                combinedLevel += Math.ceil(classLevel / 2);
              } else if (multiclassSetting.toLowerCase().includes("third")) {
                const subclasesToCheck = (
                  c?.data?.multiclassSpellcasterSubclass || ""
                )
                  .split(",")
                  .map((s) => s.trim());
                if (
                  subclasses.find((s) =>
                    subclasesToCheck.includes(s?.name || ""),
                  )
                ) {
                  combinedLevel += Math.floor(classLevel / 3);
                }
              }
            }
          }
        });
        spellPointCasterLevel = combinedLevel;
      }

      if (spellPointCasterLevel > 0 && spellPointCasterLevel <= 20) {
        const spellPoints = SPELL_POINTS_BY_LEVEL[spellPointCasterLevel];
        fieldsToSet["data.numSpellPoints"] = spellPoints;
        fieldsToSet["data.spellPoints"] = spellPoints;
      }
    }

    let curMaxSpellLevel = parseInt(record?.data?.maxSpellLevel || "0", 10);
    if (record?.data?.maxSpellLevel === "Cantrip") {
      curMaxSpellLevel = 0;
    }
    if (highestSpellLevel !== 0 && highestSpellLevel !== undefined) {
      // Call show spell levels if the highest spell level is higher than what is set
      if (highestSpellLevel > curMaxSpellLevel) {
        showSpellLevels(highestSpellLevel);
      }

      // Show or hide spell slots based on the fields we're setting
      showHideSpellSlots({
        numSpellSlots1: fieldsToSet[`data.numSpellSlots1`],
        numSpellSlots2: fieldsToSet[`data.numSpellSlots2`],
        numSpellSlots3: fieldsToSet[`data.numSpellSlots3`],
        numSpellSlots4: fieldsToSet[`data.numSpellSlots4`],
        numSpellSlots5: fieldsToSet[`data.numSpellSlots5`],
        numSpellSlots6: fieldsToSet[`data.numSpellSlots6`],
        numSpellSlots7: fieldsToSet[`data.numSpellSlots7`],
        numSpellSlots8: fieldsToSet[`data.numSpellSlots8`],
        numSpellSlots9: fieldsToSet[`data.numSpellSlots9`],
        numPactMagic1: fieldsToSet[`data.numPactMagic1`],
        numPactMagic2: fieldsToSet[`data.numPactMagic2`],
        numPactMagic3: fieldsToSet[`data.numPactMagic3`],
        numPactMagic4: fieldsToSet[`data.numPactMagic4`],
        numPactMagic5: fieldsToSet[`data.numPactMagic5`],
        numPactMagic6: fieldsToSet[`data.numPactMagic6`],
        numPactMagic7: fieldsToSet[`data.numPactMagic7`],
        numPactMagic8: fieldsToSet[`data.numPactMagic8`],
        numPactMagic9: fieldsToSet[`data.numPactMagic9`],
      });
    }

    // Update maxSpellLevel if the highest spell level is higher than what is set
    if (
      highestSpellLevel !== undefined &&
      highestSpellLevel > curMaxSpellLevel
    ) {
      fieldsToSet["data.maxSpellLevel"] = `${highestSpellLevel}`;
    }

    return fieldsToSet;
  }

  // Add class and subclass features
  // Add class and subclass features for a specific level.
  // Returns { fieldsToSet, featuresToAdd, deferredAbilityGroups } — caller is responsible for
  // adding featuresToAdd via safeAddValue chaining and processing deferredAbilityGroups
  // via processDeferredAbilityGroups to avoid race conditions.
  function addMissingClassFeatures(
    className,
    classObj,
    subclass,
    newLevel,
    classLevels,
  ) {
    const additionalFieldsToSet = {};
    const featuresToAdd = [];
    const deferredAbilityGroups = [];
    const curFeatures = (record?.data?.features || []).map(
      (feature) => `${feature?.data?.source}-${feature.name}`,
    );
    const features = classObj?.data?.feature_list || [];
    const subClassFeatures = subclass?.data?.feature_list || [];

    const abilityGroupsToAdd = new Set();

    const allFeatures = [...features, ...subClassFeatures];

    // Keep track of features added this level in a set so we do not add duplicates
    const featuresAddedThisLevel = new Set();

    allFeatures.forEach((feature) => {
      const level = feature?.data?.level || 0;
      let featureAddedOrUpdated = false;
      // If this feature is at the level we're adding, add or update it
      if (level === newLevel) {
        const featureKey = `${className}-${feature.name}`;
        const existingFeature = curFeatures.find((f) => f === featureKey);

        if (
          !existingFeature &&
          !featuresAddedThisLevel.has(`${className}-${feature.name}`)
        ) {
          // Collect this feature for batch add (via safeAddValue chaining)
          featuresToAdd.push({
            ...feature,
            data: {
              ...feature.data,
              source: className,
            },
          });
          featureAddedOrUpdated = true;
          featuresAddedThisLevel.add(`${className}-${feature.name}`);
        } else if (existingFeature) {
          // Update the existing feature if this one is a higher level
          curFeatures.forEach((curFeature, curFeatureIndex) => {
            const curFeatureLevel = curFeature?.data?.level || 0;
            if (
              curFeature === `${className}-${feature.name}` &&
              curFeatureLevel < level
            ) {
              additionalFieldsToSet[`data.features.${curFeatureIndex}`] = {
                ...feature,
                data: {
                  ...feature.data,
                  source: className,
                },
              };
              featureAddedOrUpdated = true;
            }
          });
        }
      }
      // If a feature was added and had an AC calc modifier, recalc AC
      if (featureAddedOrUpdated) {
        // Check for AC Calc mods
        const acCalculationMods = (feature?.data?.modifiers || []).filter(
          (mod) => mod.data.type === "armorClassCalculation",
        );
        if (acCalculationMods.length > 0) {
          // Get other mods
          const allAcCalculationMods = getEffectsAndModifiers([
            "armorClassCalculation",
          ]);
          acCalculationMods.forEach((mod) => {
            allAcCalculationMods.push({
              name: feature.name || "Feature",
              value: mod.data?.value || 0,
              field: mod.data?.field || "",
            });
          });
          const dexMod = parseInt(record?.data?.dexterityMod || "0", 10);
          let armorClass = 10 + dexMod;
          const bestEquippedArmor = record?.data?.armor || undefined;
          let calcBonus = 0;
          // Only add acCalculationMods if we are unarmored
          if (bestEquippedArmor?.ac === 0 || !bestEquippedArmor) {
            allAcCalculationMods.forEach((mod) => {
              // We only benefit from the highest AC calculation modifier
              if (mod.field && mod.field !== "dexterity") {
                const acBonus = parseInt(
                  record?.data?.[`${mod.field}Mod`] || "0",
                  10,
                );
                if (acBonus > calcBonus) {
                  calcBonus = acBonus;
                }
              }
            });
          }
          // Get general AC bonuses
          const acBonuses = getEffectsAndModifiers(["armorClassBonus"]);
          acBonuses.forEach((mod) => {
            if (mod.value) {
              const acBonus = parseInt(mod.value || "0", 10);
              if (!isNaN(acBonus)) {
                calcBonus += acBonus;
              }
            }
          });
          // Check for best equipped armor and use this instead if set
          if (bestEquippedArmor && bestEquippedArmor.ac > 0) {
            armorClass =
              bestEquippedArmor.ac +
              (bestEquippedArmor.maxDex
                ? Math.min(dexMod, bestEquippedArmor.maxDex)
                : 0);
          }
          // Add shield if it is equipped
          if (bestEquippedArmor?.shieldAc) {
            armorClass += bestEquippedArmor.shieldAc;
          }
          armorClass += calcBonus;
          additionalFieldsToSet["data.ac"] = armorClass;
        }

        // Collect ability group data to process later (avoid fire-and-forget race conditions)
        const abilityGroupName = feature?.data?.abilityGroupName || "";
        if (
          abilityGroupName !== "" &&
          !abilityGroupsToAdd.has(abilityGroupName)
        ) {
          abilityGroupsToAdd.add(abilityGroupName);

          const allAbilities = allFeatures
            .filter(
              (f) =>
                (f?.data?.level || 0) === newLevel &&
                f.data.abilityGroupName === abilityGroupName,
            )
            .map((f) => f?.data?.ability)
            .filter((ability) => ability !== undefined && ability !== "");

          let abilityUsesPerDay = feature?.data?.maxDailyUses || 0;
          if ((feature?.data?.fieldsToAddToUses || []).length > 0) {
            abilityUsesPerDay = getTotalValueFromFields(
              record,
              feature?.data?.fieldsToAddToUses || [],
              {
                "data.classLevels": classLevels,
              },
            );
          }
          deferredAbilityGroups.push({
            abilityGroupName,
            allAbilities,
            abilityUsesPerDay,
            abilityValue: feature?.data?.value || "",
            abilityRestoresOn: feature?.data?.restoreOn || "",
            savingThrowAbility: feature?.data?.savingThrowAbility || "",
            altSavingThrowAbility: feature?.data?.altSavingThrowAbility || "",
            fieldsToAddToUses: feature?.data?.fieldsToAddToUses || [],
          });
        }
      }
    });
    return {
      fieldsToSet: additionalFieldsToSet,
      featuresToAdd,
      deferredAbilityGroups,
    };
  }

  function addToolProficiency(proficienciesString, callback) {
    const toolProficiencies = (proficienciesString || "")
      .split(",")
      .map((s) => s.trim())
      .filter((s) => s !== "" && s !== "None");
    if (toolProficiencies.length === 0) {
      if (callback) callback();
      return;
    }
    // Chain tool proficiency adds sequentially to avoid stale-cache races
    let idx = 0;
    const addNext = () => {
      if (idx >= toolProficiencies.length) {
        if (callback) callback();
        return;
      }
      const tool = toolProficiencies[idx++];
      const toolAbility = guessAbility(tool);
      const abilityMod = parseInt(
        record?.data?.[`${toolAbility}Mod`] || "0",
        10,
      );
      const proficiencyBonus = parseInt(
        record?.data?.proficiencyBonus || "2",
        10,
      );
      safeAddValue(
        "data.otherSkills",
        {
          name: tool,
          data: {
            skillProf: "true",
            ability: toolAbility,
            skillMod: abilityMod + proficiencyBonus,
          },
        },
        addNext,
      );
    };
    addNext();
  }

  function onDropClass(type, recordLink) {
    // Check if already on Character
    const classes = record?.data?.classes || [];
    const className = recordLink.tooltip;

    const classObj = {
      ...recordLink.value,
    };
    const hasClass = classes.find((classObj) => classObj.name === className);

    // Add the class to the the classes list if needed
    if (!hasClass) {
      api.addValue("data.classes", classObj);
    }

    // Unhide the classes list
    api.setHidden("classes", false);

    // Update the class / level string
    let classLevels = record?.data?.classLevels || "";
    let newLevel = 1;
    let addingNewClass = false; // False meaning we're not adding a new multiclass level
    if (hasClass) {
      // Parse level from hidden string
      const regex = new RegExp(`(${className} (\\d+)(?=$| /))`, "i");
      // Replace the found class and level with the incremented level
      classLevels = classLevels.replace(regex, (match, g1, g2) => {
        const currentLevel = parseInt(g2, 10);
        newLevel = currentLevel + 1;
        return `${className} ${newLevel}`;
      });
    } else {
      // Add the class
      if (classLevels !== "") {
        classLevels += " / ";
        // Indicate that we're adding a new multiclass level
        addingNewClass = true;
      }
      classLevels += `${className} ${newLevel}`;
    }

    // Map of values to set in bulk later
    let valuesToSet = {
      "data.classLevels": classLevels,
      "data.className": classLevels,
    };

    // Update the level total
    const level = getTotalLevel(classLevels);
    valuesToSet["data.level"] = level;

    // Set Next Level XP and min XP for this level
    const nextLevelXp = getNextLevelXp(level);
    valuesToSet["data.xpNext"] = nextLevelXp;
    valuesToSet["data.xpMinForLevel"] = getNextLevelXp(level - 1);

    // Update the level up button
    valuesToSet["fields.levelUpButton.hidden"] =
      level <= 19 && record?.data?.xp >= nextLevelXp ? false : true;

    // If we're level 1, set the initial proficiencies
    let promptSkillChoicesLater = null;
    if (level === 1) {
      const saveProficiencies = classObj?.data?.saveProficiencies || [];
      saveProficiencies.forEach((proficiency) => {
        valuesToSet[`data.${proficiency}Prof`] = "true";
      });
      let currentWeaponProficiencies = record?.data?.weaponProficiencies || "";
      let currentArmorTraining = record?.data?.armorTraining || "";
      if (currentWeaponProficiencies !== "") {
        if (currentWeaponProficiencies === "None") {
          currentWeaponProficiencies = "";
        } else {
          currentWeaponProficiencies += ", ";
        }
      }
      currentWeaponProficiencies += classObj?.data?.weaponProficiencies || "";
      if (currentArmorTraining !== "") {
        if (currentArmorTraining === "None") {
          currentArmorTraining = "";
        } else {
          currentArmorTraining += ", ";
        }
      }
      currentArmorTraining += classObj?.data?.armorTraining || "";
      valuesToSet[`data.weaponProficiencies`] = currentWeaponProficiencies;
      valuesToSet[`data.armorTraining`] = currentArmorTraining;

      // Set Tool Proficiencies as Skills in skills tab
      const toolProficiencies = classObj?.data?.toolProficiencies || "";
      addToolProficiency(toolProficiencies);

      // Defer skill prompt so it chains after subclass if needed
      promptSkillChoicesLater = (nextPrompt) => {
        promptSkillChoices(classObj, false, nextPrompt);
      };
    } else if (addingNewClass) {
      // Multiclass do not get save proficiencies
      // Weapon Proficiencies / Armor Training for the multiclass class
      let currentWeaponProficiencies = record?.data?.weaponProficiencies || "";
      let currentArmorTraining = record?.data?.armorTraining || "";
      const newWeaponProficiencies =
        classObj?.data?.weaponProficienciesMulti || "";
      const newArmorTraining = classObj?.data?.armorTrainingMulti || "";
      if (newWeaponProficiencies !== "" && newWeaponProficiencies !== "None") {
        if (currentWeaponProficiencies !== "") {
          if (currentWeaponProficiencies === "None") {
            currentWeaponProficiencies = "";
          } else {
            currentWeaponProficiencies += ", ";
          }
        }
        currentWeaponProficiencies += newWeaponProficiencies;
      }
      if (newArmorTraining !== "" && newArmorTraining !== "None") {
        if (currentArmorTraining !== "") {
          if (currentArmorTraining === "None") {
            currentArmorTraining = "";
          } else {
            currentArmorTraining += ", ";
          }
        }
        currentArmorTraining += newArmorTraining;
      }

      valuesToSet[`data.weaponProficiencies`] = currentWeaponProficiencies;
      valuesToSet[`data.armorTraining`] = currentArmorTraining;

      // Set Tool Proficiencies as Skills in skills tab
      const toolProficiencies = classObj?.data?.toolProficienciesMulti || "";
      addToolProficiency(toolProficiencies);

      // Prompt Skill choices (we throw it in a function so we can call it later after they select their multiclass HP method)
      promptSkillChoicesLater = (nextPrompt) => {
        promptSkillChoices(classObj, true, nextPrompt);
      };
    }

    const subclasses = record?.data?.subclasses || [];
    const spellSlotFieldsToSet = getSpellSlotFields(
      classes,
      subclasses,
      classLevels,
      classObj,
      level,
      newLevel,
    );
    valuesToSet = { ...valuesToSet, ...spellSlotFieldsToSet };

    // Update proficiencies based on Level
    const bonus = getProficiencyBonus(level);
    valuesToSet["data.proficiencyBonus"] = bonus;

    // Prompt for subclass (if at the subclass level in THIS class and no subclass already chosen)
    const hasSubclassForClass = subclasses.some(
      (s) => s?.data?.class === className,
    );
    let promptSubclass =
      newLevel === (classObj?.data?.archetypeLevel || 3) && !hasSubclassForClass
        ? (nextPrompt) => {
            const subclassSelection = (values) => {
              if (values.length > 0) {
                const subclass = values[0];
                api.addValue(
                  "data.subclasses",
                  {
                    ...subclass,
                    icon: "IconBadges",
                  },
                  (recordAfterSubclass) => {
                    // Add subclass features for this level
                    const result = addMissingClassFeatures(
                      className,
                      recordLink.value,
                      subclass,
                      newLevel,
                      classLevels,
                    );
                    // Get Spellcasting info for new subclass
                    const subclasses =
                      recordAfterSubclass?.data?.subclasses || [];
                    const spellSlotFieldsToSet = getSpellSlotFields(
                      classes,
                      subclasses,
                      classLevels,
                      classObj,
                      level,
                      newLevel,
                    );
                    // Set synchronous fields first
                    const combinedFields = {
                      ...result.fieldsToSet,
                      ...spellSlotFieldsToSet,
                    };
                    const afterFieldsSet = (rec) => {
                      // Chain feature adds sequentially via safeAddValue
                      let fIdx = 0;
                      const addNextFeature = () => {
                        if (fIdx >= result.featuresToAdd.length) {
                          // Then process deferred ability groups
                          processDeferredAbilityGroups(
                            result.deferredAbilityGroups,
                            rec,
                            (recAfterGroups) => {
                              if (nextPrompt) {
                                api.getRecord(
                                  "characters",
                                  recAfterGroups._id,
                                  (freshRecord) => {
                                    nextPrompt(freshRecord);
                                  },
                                );
                              }
                            },
                          );
                          return;
                        }
                        safeAddValue(
                          "data.features",
                          result.featuresToAdd[fIdx++],
                          addNextFeature,
                          rec,
                        );
                      };
                      addNextFeature();
                    };
                    if (Object.keys(combinedFields).length > 0) {
                      api.setValues(combinedFields, afterFieldsSet);
                    } else {
                      afterFieldsSet(recordAfterSubclass);
                    }
                  },
                );
              } else {
                // User cancelled or didn't select - still call the next prompt
                if (nextPrompt) {
                  nextPrompt(record);
                }
              }
            };

            // We need to prompt with options to select a subclass
            const optionsQuery = {
              type: "subclass",
              query: {
                "data.class": className,
              },
            };
            api.showPrompt(
              "Select Subclass",
              "Subclass",
              "Select a Subclass...",
              null,
              optionsQuery,
              subclassSelection,
            );
          }
        : null;

    // Get class hit die
    const hitDie = recordLink?.value?.data?.hitDie || "d6";

    // Set all the values including new proficiencies, then we update the proficiency modifiers
    api.setValues(valuesToSet, (updatedRecord) => {
      // After data is updated, update the proficiency modifiers
      updateProficiencies(bonus, updatedRecord);

      // Add class features for added class at the new level, using the chosen subclass for it (if one)
      // and if we're not prompting for one.
      // Chain feature adds sequentially via safeAddValue, then process ability groups,
      // to avoid the stale client-cache bug when multiple features are added at the same level.
      const proceedToPrompts = () => {
        // Prompt for skills first, then HP, then subclass
        const hpStep = (rec) => {
          if (promptSubclass) {
            updateHitPoints(className, newLevel, level, hitDie, rec, () =>
              promptSubclass(null),
            );
          } else {
            updateHitPoints(className, newLevel, level, hitDie, rec);
          }
        };

        if (promptSkillChoicesLater) {
          promptSkillChoicesLater((recordAfterSkills) => {
            hpStep(recordAfterSkills);
          });
        } else {
          hpStep(updatedRecord);
        }
      };

      if (!promptSubclass) {
        const subclass = (updatedRecord?.data?.subclasses || []).find(
          (subclass) => subclass.data.class === className,
        );
        const result = addMissingClassFeatures(
          className,
          recordLink.value,
          subclass,
          newLevel,
          classLevels,
        );

        // Set synchronous fields first
        const afterFieldsSet = (rec) => {
          // Chain feature adds sequentially via safeAddValue
          let fIdx = 0;
          const addNextFeature = () => {
            if (fIdx >= result.featuresToAdd.length) {
              // Then process deferred ability groups
              processDeferredAbilityGroups(
                result.deferredAbilityGroups,
                rec,
                () => proceedToPrompts(),
              );
              return;
            }
            safeAddValue(
              "data.features",
              result.featuresToAdd[fIdx++],
              addNextFeature,
              rec,
            );
          };
          addNextFeature();
        };

        if (Object.keys(result.fieldsToSet).length > 0) {
          api.setValues(result.fieldsToSet, afterFieldsSet);
        } else {
          afterFieldsSet(updatedRecord);
        }
      } else {
        proceedToPrompts();
      }
    });
  }

  // Get the ability score increase from a feature (used for when Feats are added to a character
  // after dropping a Background)
  function getAbilityScoreIncrease(feature) {
    const asi = feature?.data?.abilityScores || "";
    let max = 20;
    let scores = [];
    if (!asi) {
      return { max, scores, promptChoice: false, count: 0 };
    }

    // Parse the maximum value from the phrase
    const maxMatch = asi.toLowerCase().match(/to a maximum of (\d+)/);
    if (maxMatch) {
      max = parseInt(maxMatch[1], 10);
    }

    if (
      asi.toLowerCase().match(/one ability score of your choice/) &&
      asi.toLowerCase().match(/or increase two ability scores/)
    ) {
      return {
        max,
        scores: [
          "strength",
          "dexterity",
          "constitution",
          "intelligence",
          "wisdom",
          "charisma",
        ],
        promptChoice: true,
        count: 2,
      };
    }

    const abilityMatch = asi
      .toLowerCase()
      .match(/strength|dexterity|constitution|intelligence|wisdom|charisma/g);
    if (abilityMatch) {
      scores = abilityMatch;
    }

    return { max, scores, promptChoice: scores.length > 1, count: 1 };
  }

  // Add abilities from a feat when added to a character
  // (Called after adding a Feat on Background Drop)
  function updateAbilitiesFromFeature(feature) {
    const abilityGroupName = feature?.data?.abilityGroupName || "";
    if (abilityGroupName === "") return;

    let abilityUsesPerDay = feature?.data?.maxDailyUses || 0;
    if ((feature?.data?.fieldsToAddToUses || []).length > 0) {
      abilityUsesPerDay = getTotalValueFromFields(
        record,
        feature?.data?.fieldsToAddToUses || [],
      );
    }
    const abilityValue = feature?.data?.value || "";
    const abilityRestoresOn = feature?.data?.restoreOn || "";
    const savingThrowAbility = feature?.data?.savingThrowAbility || "";
    const altSavingThrowAbility = feature?.data?.altSavingThrowAbility || "";

    // Use processDeferredAbilityGroups to safely add group + abilities
    const abilityIdToAdd =
      JSON.parse(feature?.data?.ability || "{}")?._id || "";
    const allAbilities = abilityIdToAdd ? [feature?.data?.ability] : [];

    processDeferredAbilityGroups(
      [
        {
          abilityGroupName,
          allAbilities,
          abilityUsesPerDay,
          abilityValue,
          abilityRestoresOn,
          savingThrowAbility,
          altSavingThrowAbility,
          fieldsToAddToUses: feature?.data?.fieldsToAddToUses || [],
        },
      ],
      record,
      () => {},
    );
  }

  // Add a feat to the character, called on Background drop
  function addFeat(feat) {
    // We add feats to the features list so that
    // All modifiers and are parsed by the same functions
    const featToAdd = {
      ...feat,
      data: {
        ...feat?.data,
        // Set a field called featureType to 'feat' so that
        // So that we can show and filter the two features_list fields properly
        featureType: "feat",
      },
    };

    safeAddValue(`data.features`, featToAdd, (updatedRecord) => {
      // After adding the feat, we need to update abilities if one was attached to it
      updateAbilitiesFromFeature(featToAdd);
    });

    // Prompt the user to select ASIs or just add them all
    const abilityScoreSelection = (values) => {
      const fieldsToSet = {};
      values.forEach((curV) => {
        // Get the current value
        let value = curV.split("-")[0];
        const curValue = record?.data?.[`${value}`] || 0;
        // If we haven't chosen it yet, increase the current value by 1
        if (fieldsToSet[`data.${value}`] === undefined) {
          if (curValue < abilityIncrease.max) {
            fieldsToSet[`data.${value}`] = curValue + 1;
          }
        } else {
          // Increase the value by 1 again
          if (fieldsToSet[`data.${value}`] < abilityIncrease.max) {
            fieldsToSet[`data.${value}`] = fieldsToSet[`data.${value}`] + 1;
          }
        }
      });

      // Set the attributes then...
      api.setValues(fieldsToSet, () => {
        // Use the setModifier function to set the modifiers, update proficiencies,
        // and other re-calculations of modifiers as needed
        const moreValuesToSet = {};
        Object.keys(fieldsToSet).forEach((key) => {
          const value = fieldsToSet[key];
          const attribute = key.replace("data.", "");
          setModifier(value, attribute, {}, moreValuesToSet);
        });
        if (Object.keys(moreValuesToSet).length > 0) {
          api.setValues(moreValuesToSet);
        }
      });
    };

    const abilityIncrease = getAbilityScoreIncrease(featToAdd);
    if (abilityIncrease.promptChoice) {
      const options = [];
      abilityIncrease.scores.forEach((score) => {
        options.push({ label: capitalize(score), value: score });
      });
      // IF we allow more than one selection, add them again
      if (abilityIncrease.count > 1) {
        abilityIncrease.scores.forEach((score) => {
          options.push({ label: `${capitalize(score)}`, value: `${score}-2` });
        });
      }

      api.showPrompt(
        `Choose Ability Scores to Raise`,
        "Select Ability Scores",
        `Select ${abilityIncrease.count} Ability Score${
          abilityIncrease.count > 1 ? "s" : ""
        } to Raise (to a max of ${abilityIncrease.max})...`,
        options,
        null,
        abilityScoreSelection,
        "OK",
        "Cancel",
        abilityIncrease.count,
      );
    } else if (abilityIncrease.scores.length > 0) {
      // Add all ASIs
      abilityScoreSelection(abilityIncrease.scores.map((score) => score));
    }
  }

  function onDropBackground(type, recordLink) {
    // Check if already has a background
    const backgrounds = record?.data?.backgrounds || [];
    const backgroundName = recordLink.tooltip;

    const backgroundObj = {
      ...recordLink.value,
    };
    const hasBackground = backgrounds.length > 0;

    const fieldsToSet = {};

    // Add the background to the the backgrounds list if needed
    if (!hasBackground) {
      api.addValue("data.backgrounds", backgroundObj);
    } else {
      // Remove first background and add the new one
      api.removeValue("data.backgrounds", 0, () => {
        api.addValue("data.backgrounds", backgroundObj);
      });
    }

    // After prompting for ASIs from Background and setting them, we will add the
    // Feat (which technically could, but should not, also have ASIs)
    // And then set the tool and skill proficiencies
    const getAndAddFeat = () => {
      // Add the feat specified by the Background
      const feat = backgroundObj?.data?.feat;
      if (feat) {
        const featId = JSON.parse(feat)?._id || "";
        if (featId !== "") {
          api.getRecord("feats", featId, (featRecord) => {
            addFeat(featRecord);
          });
        }
      }
    };

    // Prompt for Ability Scores to raise
    let options = [];
    const abilityChoices = backgroundObj?.data?.abilityScores || [];
    // We list each one twice since you can only pick one more than once twice
    abilityChoices.forEach((ability) => {
      options.push({
        label: capitalize(ability),
        // In code we use camelCase, so we need to convert from normal to camelCase
        value: normalToCamelCase(ability),
      });
    });
    abilityChoices.forEach((ability) => {
      options.push({
        label: capitalize(ability),
        // In code we use camelCase, so we need to convert from normal to camelCase
        value: `${normalToCamelCase(ability)}-2`,
      });
    });

    const abilityScoreSelection = (values) => {
      const fieldsToSet = {};
      values.forEach((curV) => {
        // Get the current value
        let value = curV.split("-")[0];
        const curValue = record?.data?.[`${value}`] || 0;
        // If we haven't chosen it yet, increase the current value by 1
        if (fieldsToSet[`data.${value}`] === undefined) {
          if (curValue < 20) {
            fieldsToSet[`data.${value}`] = curValue + 1;
          }
        } else {
          // Increase the value by 1 again
          if (fieldsToSet[`data.${value}`] < 20) {
            fieldsToSet[`data.${value}`] = fieldsToSet[`data.${value}`] + 1;
          }
        }
      });

      // Add skill proficiencies to the fields we want to update
      const skillProficiencies = backgroundObj?.data?.skillProficiencies || [];
      const proficiencyBonus = parseInt(
        api.getValue("data.proficiencyBonus") || "2",
        10,
      );
      skillProficiencies.forEach((skill) => {
        fieldsToSet[`data.${skill}Prof`] = "true";
      });

      // Set the attributes then...
      api.setValues(fieldsToSet, () => {
        // Use the setModifier function to set the modifiers, update proficiencies,
        // and other re-calculations of modifiers as needed
        const moreValuesToSet = {};
        Object.keys(fieldsToSet).forEach((key) => {
          // Ignore skill prof changes
          if (!key.includes("Prof")) {
            const value = fieldsToSet[key];
            const attribute = key.replace("data.", "");
            setModifier(value, attribute, fieldsToSet, moreValuesToSet);
          }
        });
        if (Object.keys(moreValuesToSet).length > 0) {
          api.setValues(moreValuesToSet);
        }

        // Add the feat and tool proficiencies last
        getAndAddFeat();
        const toolProficiencies = backgroundObj?.data?.toolProficiencies || "";
        addToolProficiency(toolProficiencies);
      });
    };

    api.showPrompt(
      `Choose Ability Scores to Raise`,
      "Select Ability Scores",
      `Select 3 Ability Scores to Raise (to a max of 20)...`,
      options,
      null,
      abilityScoreSelection,
      "OK",
      "Cancel",
      3,
    );

    // Set the background name
    fieldsToSet["data.backgroundName"] = backgroundName;

    // Unhide the backagrounds list
    fieldsToSet["fields.backgrounds.hidden"] = false;

    // Set all values
    api.setValues(fieldsToSet);
  }

  function onDropSpecies(type, recordLink) {
    // Check if already has a species
    const species = record?.data?.species || [];
    const speciesName = recordLink.tooltip;

    const speciesObj = {
      ...recordLink.value,
    };
    const hasSpecies = species.length > 0;

    const fieldsToSet = {};

    // Add the species to the the species list if needed
    if (!hasSpecies) {
      api.addValue("data.species", speciesObj);
    } else {
      // Remove first species and add the new one
      api.removeValue("data.species", 0, () => {
        api.addValue("data.species", speciesObj);
      });
    }

    // Get creatureType, size, speed, and senses and update fields
    const creatureType = speciesObj?.data?.creatureType || "";
    const size = speciesObj?.data?.size || "";
    const speed = speciesObj?.data?.speed || "";
    const senses = speciesObj?.data?.senses || "";

    fieldsToSet["data.creatureType"] = creatureType;
    fieldsToSet["data.size"] = size;
    fieldsToSet["data.speed"] = speed;
    fieldsToSet["data.senses"] = senses;

    // Set the species name
    fieldsToSet["data.speciesName"] = speciesName;

    // Unhide the species list
    fieldsToSet["fields.species.hidden"] = false;

    // Collect features and ability groups to add (avoid fire-and-forget race conditions)
    const features = speciesObj?.data?.feature_list || [];
    const featuresToAdd = [];
    const deferredAbilityGroups = [];
    const abilityGroupsToAdd = new Set();

    features.forEach((feature) => {
      featuresToAdd.push({
        ...feature,
        data: {
          ...feature.data,
          source: speciesName,
          level: 1,
        },
      });

      // Check for AC calc mods
      const acCalculationMods = (feature?.data?.modifiers || []).filter(
        (mod) => mod.data.type === "armorClassCalculation",
      );
      if (acCalculationMods.length > 0) {
        const allAcCalculationMods = getEffectsAndModifiers([
          "armorClassCalculation",
        ]);
        acCalculationMods.forEach((mod) => {
          allAcCalculationMods.push({
            name: feature.name || "Feature",
            value: mod.data?.value || 0,
            field: mod.data?.field || "",
          });
        });
        const dexMod = parseInt(record?.data?.dexterityMod || "0", 10);
        let armorClass = 10 + dexMod;
        const bestEquippedArmor = record?.data?.armor || undefined;
        let calcBonus = 0;
        if (bestEquippedArmor?.ac === 0 || !bestEquippedArmor) {
          allAcCalculationMods.forEach((mod) => {
            if (mod.field && mod.field !== "dexterity") {
              const acBonus = parseInt(
                record?.data?.[`${mod.field}Mod`] || "0",
                10,
              );
              if (acBonus > calcBonus) {
                calcBonus = acBonus;
              }
            }
          });
        }
        const acBonuses = getEffectsAndModifiers(["armorClassBonus"]);
        acBonuses.forEach((mod) => {
          if (mod.value) {
            const acBonus = parseInt(mod.value || "0", 10);
            if (!isNaN(acBonus)) {
              calcBonus += acBonus;
            }
          }
        });
        if (bestEquippedArmor && bestEquippedArmor.ac > 0) {
          armorClass =
            bestEquippedArmor.ac +
            (bestEquippedArmor.maxDex
              ? Math.min(dexMod, bestEquippedArmor.maxDex)
              : 0);
        }
        if (bestEquippedArmor?.shieldAc) {
          armorClass += bestEquippedArmor.shieldAc;
        }
        armorClass += calcBonus;
        fieldsToSet["data.ac"] = armorClass;
      }

      // Collect ability group data to process later
      const abilityGroupName = feature?.data?.abilityGroupName || "";
      if (
        abilityGroupName !== "" &&
        !abilityGroupsToAdd.has(abilityGroupName)
      ) {
        abilityGroupsToAdd.add(abilityGroupName);

        const allAbilities = features
          .filter((f) => f.data.abilityGroupName === abilityGroupName)
          .map((f) => f?.data?.ability)
          .filter((ability) => ability !== undefined && ability !== "");

        let abilityUsesPerDay = feature?.data?.maxDailyUses || 0;
        if ((feature?.data?.fieldsToAddToUses || []).length > 0) {
          abilityUsesPerDay = getTotalValueFromFields(
            record,
            feature?.data?.fieldsToAddToUses || [],
          );
        }
        deferredAbilityGroups.push({
          abilityGroupName,
          allAbilities,
          abilityUsesPerDay,
          abilityValue: feature?.data?.value || "",
          abilityRestoresOn: feature?.data?.restoreOn || "",
          savingThrowAbility: feature?.data?.savingThrowAbility || "",
          altSavingThrowAbility: feature?.data?.altSavingThrowAbility || "",
          fieldsToAddToUses: feature?.data?.fieldsToAddToUses || [],
        });
      }
    });

    // Set synchronous fields first, then chain feature adds and ability groups
    api.setValues(fieldsToSet, (updatedRecord) => {
      // Chain feature adds sequentially via safeAddValue
      let fIdx = 0;
      const addNextFeature = () => {
        if (fIdx >= featuresToAdd.length) {
          // Then process deferred ability groups
          processDeferredAbilityGroups(
            deferredAbilityGroups,
            updatedRecord,
            (recAfterGroups) => {
              // Trigger an update of HP in case species contained HP bonuses
              const conMod = parseInt(
                recAfterGroups?.data?.constitutionMod || "0",
                10,
              );
              const newHp = getHpForLevel(conMod, recAfterGroups);
              if (newHp > recAfterGroups?.data?.hitpoints) {
                api.setValue("data.hitpoints", newHp);
              }
            },
          );
          return;
        }
        safeAddValue(
          "data.features",
          featuresToAdd[fIdx++],
          addNextFeature,
          updatedRecord,
        );
      };
      addNextFeature();
    });
  }

  function onDropSubclass(type, recordLink) {
    const subclass = { ...recordLink.value };
    const subclassClassName = subclass?.data?.class || "";

    if (!subclassClassName) {
      api.showNotification(
        "This subclass does not have a class set.",
        "red",
        "Missing Class",
      );
      return;
    }

    // Find the matching class on this character
    const classes = record?.data?.classes || [];
    const classLevels = record?.data?.classLevels || "";
    const classEntry = classes.find((c) => c.name === subclassClassName);
    if (!classEntry) {
      api.showNotification(
        `Character does not have the ${subclassClassName} class.`,
        "red",
        "Class Not Found",
      );
      return;
    }

    // Check if character already has a subclass for this class
    const existingSubclasses = record?.data?.subclasses || [];
    const existingSubclass = existingSubclasses.find(
      (s) => s?.data?.class === subclassClassName,
    );
    if (existingSubclass) {
      api.showNotification(
        `Character already has a subclass for ${subclassClassName}.`,
        "red",
        "Subclass Exists",
      );
      return;
    }

    // Parse current class level from classLevels string
    const safeClassName = subclassClassName.replace(
      /[-\/\\^$*+?.()|[\]{}]/g,
      "\\$&",
    );
    const regex = new RegExp(`${safeClassName}\\s+(\\d+)`, "i");
    const match = classLevels.match(regex);
    const currentClassLevel = match ? parseInt(match[1], 10) : 1;
    const totalLevel = getTotalLevel(classLevels);
    const archetypeLevel = classEntry?.data?.archetypeLevel || 3;

    // Add the subclass to data.subclasses
    api.addValue(
      "data.subclasses",
      {
        ...subclass,
        icon: "IconBadges",
      },
      (recordAfterSubclass) => {
        // Add subclass features for all levels from archetypeLevel up to current class level
        const allFieldsToSet = {};
        const allFeaturesToAdd = [];
        const allDeferredAbilityGroups = [];

        for (let lvl = archetypeLevel; lvl <= currentClassLevel; lvl++) {
          const result = addMissingClassFeatures(
            subclassClassName,
            classEntry,
            subclass,
            lvl,
            classLevels,
          );
          Object.assign(allFieldsToSet, result.fieldsToSet);
          allFeaturesToAdd.push(...result.featuresToAdd);
          allDeferredAbilityGroups.push(...result.deferredAbilityGroups);
        }

        // Recalculate spell slots with new subclass
        const subclasses = recordAfterSubclass?.data?.subclasses || [];
        const spellSlotFieldsToSet = getSpellSlotFields(
          classes,
          subclasses,
          classLevels,
          classEntry,
          totalLevel,
          currentClassLevel,
        );
        Object.assign(allFieldsToSet, spellSlotFieldsToSet);

        const afterFieldsSet = (rec) => {
          // Chain feature adds sequentially via safeAddValue
          let fIdx = 0;
          const addNextFeature = () => {
            if (fIdx >= allFeaturesToAdd.length) {
              processDeferredAbilityGroups(
                allDeferredAbilityGroups,
                rec,
                () => {
                  api.showNotification(
                    `Added ${recordLink.tooltip} subclass to ${subclassClassName}.`,
                    "green",
                    "Subclass Added",
                  );
                },
              );
              return;
            }
            safeAddValue(
              "data.features",
              allFeaturesToAdd[fIdx++],
              addNextFeature,
              rec,
            );
          };
          addNextFeature();
        };

        if (Object.keys(allFieldsToSet).length > 0) {
          api.setValues(allFieldsToSet, afterFieldsSet);
        } else {
          afterFieldsSet(recordAfterSubclass);
        }
      },
    );
  }

  function onDrop(type, recordLink) {
    if (type === "class") {
      onDropClass(type, recordLink);
    } else if (type === "backgrounds") {
      onDropBackground(type, recordLink);
    } else if (type === "species") {
      onDropSpecies(type, recordLink);
    } else if (type === "subclass") {
      onDropSubclass(type, recordLink);
    }
  }

  function onDeleteClass() {
    // Recalculate class name / level
    const classes = record?.data?.classes || [];
    const existingClasses = classes.map((classObj) => classObj.name);

    let classLevels = record?.data?.classLevels || "";
    const classLevelsArr = classLevels.split("/");
    classLevelsArr.forEach((classLevel) => {
      // Parse class name
      const regex = /(\w+) (\d+)/i;
      const found = classLevel.match(regex);
      // Check if match was found before accessing array elements
      if (found) {
        const className = found[1];

        // If this class is NOT in existing classes, remove it
        if (!existingClasses.includes(className.trim())) {
          // Parse level from hidden string
          const regex = new RegExp(`(${className} (\\d+))`, "i");
          // Replace the found class and level
          classLevels = classLevels.replace(regex, (match, g1, g2) => {
            const currentLevel = parseInt(g2, 10);
            return "";
          });
          // Clean up the string by:
          // 1. Removing multiple consecutive slashes
          // 2. Removing leading/trailing slashes
          // 3. Cleaning up whitespace
          classLevels = classLevels
            .replace(/\s*\/\s*\/+\s*/g, " / ") // Replace multiple slashes with single slash
            .trim()
            .replace(/\/$/, "")
            .replace(/^\//, "")
            .trim();
        }
      }
    });

    // Update the class strings
    const valuesToSet = {
      "data.classLevels": classLevels,
      "data.className": classLevels,
    };

    // Remove subclasses for this class from `data.subclasses`
    const subclasses = record?.data?.subclasses || [];
    let newSubclasses = [...subclasses];
    newSubclasses.forEach((subclass, index) => {
      if (!existingClasses.includes(subclass.data.class)) {
        newSubclasses[index]._id = "delete";
      }
    });
    newSubclasses = newSubclasses.filter(
      (subclass) => subclass._id !== "delete",
    );
    valuesToSet["data.subclasses"] = newSubclasses;

    // Update the level total
    const level = getTotalLevel(classLevels);
    valuesToSet["data.level"] = level;

    // Reset XP to next level and min XP for this level
    const nextLevelXp = getNextLevelXp(level);
    valuesToSet["data.xpNext"] = nextLevelXp;
    valuesToSet["data.xpMinForLevel"] = getNextLevelXp(level - 1);

    // Update the level up button
    valuesToSet["fields.levelUpButton.hidden"] =
      level <= 19 && record?.data?.xp >= nextLevelXp ? false : true;

    //  Update HP and Hit Dice
    const hpByLevel = record?.data?.hpByLevel || "[]";
    let hpByLevelArr = [];
    try {
      hpByLevelArr = JSON.parse(hpByLevel);
    } catch (e) {
      hpByLevelArr = [];
    }

    // Remove all entries from hpByLevelArr where className no longer exists
    let newHpByLevel = [...hpByLevelArr];
    hpByLevelArr.forEach((hpLevel, index) => {
      if (!existingClasses.includes(hpLevel.className)) {
        newHpByLevel[index].className = "delete";
      }
    });
    newHpByLevel = newHpByLevel.filter(
      (hpLevel) => hpLevel.className !== "delete",
    );

    // Set new hpByLevelArray
    valuesToSet["data.hpByLevel"] = JSON.stringify(newHpByLevel);

    // Get total HP from HP by level, amd CON Mod, and determine new HP totals
    const conMod = parseInt(record?.data?.constitutionMod || "0", 10);
    const curHp = parseInt(record?.data?.curhp || "0", 10);
    const curD6HitDie = parseInt(record?.data?.d6HitDie || "0", 10);
    const curD8HitDie = parseInt(record?.data?.d8HitDie || "0", 10);
    const curD10HitDie = parseInt(record?.data?.d10HitDie || "0", 10);
    const curD12HitDie = parseInt(record?.data?.d12HitDie || "0", 10);
    let newMaxHp = 0;
    let d6HitDie = 0;
    let d8HitDie = 0;
    let d10HitDie = 0;
    let d12HitDie = 0;
    newHpByLevel.forEach((hpLevel) => {
      let hpToAdd = hpLevel.hp + conMod;
      if (hpToAdd < 1) {
        hpToAdd = 1;
      }
      newMaxHp += hpToAdd;
      if (hpLevel.hitDie === "d6") {
        d6HitDie += 1;
      } else if (hpLevel.hitDie === "d8") {
        d8HitDie += 1;
      } else if (hpLevel.hitDie === "d10") {
        d10HitDie += 1;
      } else if (hpLevel.hitDie === "d12") {
        d12HitDie += 1;
      }
    });
    // Set max hp and current
    if (curHp > newMaxHp) {
      valuesToSet["data.curhp"] = newMaxHp;
    }
    valuesToSet["data.hitpoints"] = newMaxHp;

    // Set new hitDie
    if (curD6HitDie != d6HitDie) {
      valuesToSet["data.d6HitDie"] = d6HitDie || null;
    }
    if (curD8HitDie != d8HitDie) {
      valuesToSet["data.d8HitDie"] = d8HitDie || null;
    }
    if (curD10HitDie != d10HitDie) {
      valuesToSet["data.d10HitDie"] = d10HitDie || null;
    }
    if (curD12HitDie != d12HitDie) {
      valuesToSet["data.d12HitDie"] = d12HitDie || null;
    }

    // If this was the last class, hide the classes list
    if (classes.length === 0) {
      valuesToSet["fields.classes.hidden"] = true;
    }

    const bonus = getProficiencyBonus(level);
    valuesToSet["data.proficiencyBonus"] = bonus;

    // Update hpByLevel fields
    setHpPerLevel(record, valuesToSet);

    // Set values then update proficiencies based on Level
    api.setValues(valuesToSet, (updatedRecord) => {
      updateProficiencies(bonus, updatedRecord);
    });
  }

  function onDeleteBackground() {
    // Update background text
    api.setValues({
      "data.backgroundName": "",
      "fields.backgrounds.hidden": true,
    });
  }

  function onDeleteSpecies() {
    // Update species text
    api.setValues({
      "data.speciesName": "",
      "fields.species.hidden": true,
    });
  }

  function getTotalLevel(inputString) {
    // Regular expression to find all class levels
    const regex = /\d+/g;
    let totalLevel = 0;

    // Extract all levels and sum them
    const levels = inputString.match(regex);
    if (levels) {
      levels.forEach((level) => {
        totalLevel += parseInt(level, 10);
      });
    }

    return totalLevel;
  }

  function rollCheck(ability) {
    const mod = `${ability}Mod`;

    let modifiers = [];
    let abilityMod = parseInt(record?.data?.[mod] || "0", 10);
    if (abilityMod === undefined || isNaN(abilityMod)) {
      abilityMod = 0;
    }
    if (abilityMod !== 0) {
      modifiers.push({
        name: ability,
        value: abilityMod,
        active: true,
      });
    }
    const metadata = {
      rollName: `${capitalize(ability)}`,
    };

    const checkModifiers = getEffectsAndModifiers(
      ["abilityBonus", "abilityPenalty"],
      ability,
    );
    checkModifiers.forEach((modifier) => {
      modifiers.push(modifier);
    });

    const minRoll = getMinRollModifier(modifiers);
    // Filter these out of the modifiers array, we don't need them to be toggleable
    modifiers = modifiers.filter(
      (m) => !m.value.toString().startsWith("minroll"),
    );
    metadata.minRoll = minRoll;

    api.promptRoll(
      `${capitalize(ability)} Check`,
      "1d20",
      modifiers,
      metadata,
      "ability",
    );
  }

  function rollSave(save) {
    const mod = `${save}Save`;
    let modifiers = [];
    let saveMod = record?.data?.[mod] || "0";
    if (saveMod === undefined) {
      saveMod = 0;
    }

    if (saveMod !== "0") {
      modifiers.push({
        name: `${capitalize(save)} Save Modifier`,
        value: saveMod,
        active: true,
      });
    }

    // Check effects for all save bonuses and penalties for saves
    const saveModifiers = getEffectsAndModifiers(
      ["saveBonus", "savePenalty"],
      save,
    );
    saveModifiers.forEach((modifier) => {
      modifiers.push(modifier);
    });

    const minRoll = getMinRollModifier(modifiers);
    // Filter these out of the modifiers array, we don't need them to be toggleable
    modifiers = modifiers.filter(
      (m) => !m.value.toString().startsWith("minroll"),
    );

    const metadata = {
      rollName: `${capitalize(save)} Save`,
      tooltip: `${capitalize(save)} Saving Throw`,
      dc: 0,
      minRoll: minRoll,
    };

    api.promptRoll(
      `${capitalize(save)} Save`,
      "1d20",
      modifiers,
      metadata,
      "save",
    );
  }

  function rollHitDie(hitdie) {
    const recordId = record._id;
    api.getRecord("characters", recordId, (record) => {
      const hitDieField = `${hitdie}HitDie`;
      const countField = `${hitdie}HitDieCount`;
      const count = parseInt(record?.data?.[countField] || "1", 10);
      const hitDieRemaining = parseInt(record?.data?.[hitDieField] || "0", 10);

      if (count > hitDieRemaining) {
        const message =
          hitDieRemaining === 0
            ? `No ${hitdie} Hit Dice Remaining`
            : `Only ${hitDieRemaining} ${hitdie} Hit Dice Remaining`;
        api.showNotification(message, "red", "Insufficient Hit Dice");
        return;
      }

      if (count <= 0) {
        api.showNotification(
          "Must roll at least 1 Hit Die",
          "red",
          "Invalid Count",
        );
        return;
      }

      // We add the constitution modifier to each die roll
      const conMod = parseInt(record?.data?.constitutionMod || "0", 10);
      const modifiers = [
        {
          name: "Constitution",
          value: conMod * count, // Multiply by count since we're rolling multiple dice
          active: true,
        },
      ];
      const metadata = {
        rollName: "Hit Die",
        tooltip: `Recovering HP with ${count} ${hitdie} Hit Die`,
        hitDieField: hitDieField,
        hitDieCount: count,
      };

      api.promptRoll(
        `Roll ${count} ${hitdie} Hit Die`,
        `${count}${hitdie}`,
        modifiers,
        metadata,
        "hitdie",
      );

      // Reset count field to 1 after rolling
      const valuesToSet = {};
      valuesToSet[`data.${countField}`] = 1;
      api.setValues(valuesToSet);
    });
  }

  function shortRest() {
    const message = "Taking a Short Rest.";

    // If we have pactmagic slots, we restore them
    // Also reset death save failures / successes (we can assume they healed at this point)
    const valuesToSet = {
      "data.pactMagic1": 0,
      "data.pactMagic2": 0,
      "data.pactMagic3": 0,
      "data.pactMagic4": 0,
      "data.pactMagic5": 0,
      "data.pactMagic6": 0,
      "data.pactMagic7": 0,
      "data.pactMagic8": 0,
      "data.pactMagic9": 0,
      "data.deathSaveFailures": 0,
      "data.deathSaveSuccesses": 0,
    };

    // Check for all actions that restore on short rest and restore daily uses
    const abilityListGroups = record?.data?.abilityGroups || [];
    abilityListGroups.forEach((abilityGroup, index) => {
      const restoreOn = abilityGroup?.data?.restore || "";
      if (restoreOn === "shortrest") {
        const dailyUses = abilityGroup?.data?.dailyUses || 0;
        valuesToSet[`data.abilityGroups.${index}.data.dailyUses`] = 0;
      } else if (restoreOn === "shortrestonce") {
        let curUses = abilityGroup?.data?.dailyUses || 0;
        curUses = curUses - 1;
        if (curUses < 0) {
          curUses = 0;
        }
        valuesToSet[`data.abilityGroups.${index}.data.dailyUses`] = curUses;
      }
    });

    // Restore any Spells that have Daily Uses and restore on short rest
    const spellLists = [
      "cantrips",
      "spells1",
      "spells2",
      "spells3",
      "spells4",
      "spells5",
      "spells6",
      "spells7",
      "spells8",
      "spells9",
    ];
    spellLists.forEach((spellList, index) => {
      const spells = record?.data?.[spellList] || [];
      spells.forEach((spell, index) => {
        const restoreOnRest = spell?.data?.restoreOnRest || "no";
        if (spell?.data?.dailyUses > 0 && restoreOnRest === "short") {
          valuesToSet[`data.${spellList}.${index}.data.dailyUses`] = 0;
        }
      });
    });

    api.setValues(valuesToSet);
    api.sendMessage(message, undefined, [], []);
  }

  function longRest() {
    const valuesToSet = {};
    // Restore HP and Hit Die, clear Temp HP, and reset death save failures / successes
    valuesToSet["data.curhp"] = record?.data?.hitpoints || 0;
    valuesToSet["data.tempHp"] = 0;
    valuesToSet["data.deathSaveFailures"] = 0;
    valuesToSet["data.deathSaveSuccesses"] = 0;

    // Restore all Hit Die per 2024 rules
    const hpByLevel = record?.data?.hpByLevel || "[]";
    const hpByLevelArr = JSON.parse(hpByLevel);
    let d6HitDie = 0;
    let d8HitDie = 0;
    let d10HitDie = 0;
    let d12HitDie = 0;
    hpByLevelArr.forEach((hpLevel) => {
      if (hpLevel.hitDie === "d6") {
        d6HitDie += 1;
      } else if (hpLevel.hitDie === "d8") {
        d8HitDie += 1;
      } else if (hpLevel.hitDie === "d10") {
        d10HitDie += 1;
      } else if (hpLevel.hitDie === "d12") {
        d12HitDie += 1;
      }
    });
    valuesToSet["data.d6HitDie"] = d6HitDie > 0 ? d6HitDie : null;
    valuesToSet["data.d8HitDie"] = d8HitDie > 0 ? d8HitDie : null;
    valuesToSet["data.d10HitDie"] = d10HitDie > 0 ? d10HitDie : null;
    valuesToSet["data.d12HitDie"] = d12HitDie > 0 ? d12HitDie : null;

    // Restore all spell slots and pact magic
    valuesToSet["data.spellSlots1"] = 0;
    valuesToSet["data.spellSlots2"] = 0;
    valuesToSet["data.spellSlots3"] = 0;
    valuesToSet["data.spellSlots4"] = 0;
    valuesToSet["data.spellSlots5"] = 0;
    valuesToSet["data.spellSlots6"] = 0;
    valuesToSet["data.spellSlots7"] = 0;
    valuesToSet["data.spellSlots8"] = 0;
    valuesToSet["data.spellSlots9"] = 0;
    valuesToSet["data.pactMagic1"] = 0;
    valuesToSet["data.pactMagic2"] = 0;
    valuesToSet["data.pactMagic3"] = 0;
    valuesToSet["data.pactMagic4"] = 0;
    valuesToSet["data.pactMagic5"] = 0;
    valuesToSet["data.pactMagic6"] = 0;
    valuesToSet["data.pactMagic7"] = 0;
    valuesToSet["data.pactMagic8"] = 0;
    valuesToSet["data.pactMagic9"] = 0;

    // Restore spell points to max and reset 6th+ level once-per-long-rest tracking
    const numSpellPoints = parseInt(record?.data?.numSpellPoints || "0", 10);
    if (numSpellPoints > 0) {
      valuesToSet["data.spellPoints"] = numSpellPoints;
      valuesToSet["data.spellPointSlot6Used"] = false;
      valuesToSet["data.spellPointSlot7Used"] = false;
      valuesToSet["data.spellPointSlot8Used"] = false;
      valuesToSet["data.spellPointSlot9Used"] = false;
    }

    // Restore any Spells that have Daily Uses
    const spellLists = [
      "cantrips",
      "spells1",
      "spells2",
      "spells3",
      "spells4",
      "spells5",
      "spells6",
      "spells7",
      "spells8",
      "spells9",
    ];
    spellLists.forEach((spellList, index) => {
      const spells = record?.data?.[spellList] || [];
      spells.forEach((spell, index) => {
        const restoreOnRest = spell?.data?.restoreOnRest || "no";
        if (spell?.data?.dailyUses > 0 && restoreOnRest !== "no") {
          valuesToSet[`data.${spellList}.${index}.data.dailyUses`] = 0;
        }
      });
    });

    // Check for all actions that restore on long rest and restore daily uses
    const abilityListGroups = record?.data?.abilityGroups || [];
    abilityListGroups.forEach((abilityGroup, index) => {
      const restoreOn = abilityGroup?.data?.restore || "";
      // Assume that longrest includes shortrest too
      if (
        restoreOn === "longrest" ||
        restoreOn === "shortrest" ||
        restoreOn === "shortrestonce"
      ) {
        const dailyUses = abilityGroup?.data?.dailyUses || 0;
        valuesToSet[`data.abilityGroups.${index}.data.dailyUses`] = 0;
      }
    });

    api.setValues(valuesToSet);

    // Output to chat
    api.sendMessage("Taking a Long Rest.", undefined, [], []);
  }

  function rollDeathSave() {
    const metadata = {
      rollName: "Death Save",
    };

    let saveModifiers = getEffectsAndModifiers(
      ["saveBonus", "savePenalty"],
      "death",
    );

    const minRoll = getMinRollModifier(saveModifiers);
    // Filter these out of the modifiers array, we don't need them to be toggleable
    saveModifiers = saveModifiers.filter(
      (m) => !m.value.toString().startsWith("minroll"),
    );

    if (minRoll) {
      metadata.minRoll = minRoll;
    }

    api.promptRoll(`Death Save`, "1d20", saveModifiers, metadata, "deathsave");
  }

  function updateHpPerLevel() {
    // First re-query the record, in case we're in the middle of updating
    const recordId = record._id;
    api.getRecord("characters", recordId, (record) => {
      const valuesToSet = {};

      const hpByLevel = record?.data?.hpByLevel || "[]";
      try {
        const hpByLevelArr = JSON.parse(hpByLevel);
        hpByLevelArr.forEach((hpLevel, index) => {
          hpByLevelArr[index].hp = record?.data?.[`hpLevel${index + 1}`] || 0;
        });
        api.setValues(
          {
            "data.hpByLevel": JSON.stringify(hpByLevelArr),
          },
          (updatedRecord) => {
            if (updatedRecord) {
              // Update hp
              const conMod = parseInt(
                updatedRecord?.data?.constitutionMod || "0",
                10,
              );
              let newHpByLevel = getHpForLevel(conMod, updatedRecord);
              let curHp = updatedRecord?.data?.curhp || 0;
              let hpToAdd = newHpByLevel - curHp;
              valuesToSet["data.curhp"] = curHp + hpToAdd;
              valuesToSet["data.hitpoints"] = newHpByLevel;
              valuesToSet["data.hpByLevel"] = JSON.stringify(hpByLevelArr);

              api.setValues(valuesToSet);
            }
          },
        );
      } catch (error) {
        // No-op
      }
    });
  }

  function onLoadCharacter() {
    setHpPerLevel(record);
    showHideLevelUpButton(record);
    // Set xpMinForLevel if not already set (backfill for existing characters)
    if (
      record?.data?.xpMinForLevel === undefined ||
      record?.data?.xpMinForLevel === null
    ) {
      const curLevel = parseInt(record?.data?.level || "1", 10);
      api.setValue("data.xpMinForLevel", getNextLevelXp(curLevel - 1));
    }
  }

  function showHideLevelUp() {
    showHideLevelUpButton(record);
  }

  function levelUp() {
    // Prompt for classes to add
    const classSelection = (values) => {
      if (values.length > 0) {
        const classObject = values[0];
        onDropClass("class", {
          value: classObject,
          tooltip: classObject.name,
        });
      }
    };

    const optionsQuery = {
      type: "class",
      query: {},
    };

    api.showPrompt(
      `Level Up to ${(record?.data?.level || 0) + 1}`,
      "Class",
      "Select a Class to Add...",
      null,
      optionsQuery,
      classSelection,
    );
  }
</script>

      >
        <div style="flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px">

            field="deathSaveBtn"

          class="rvtt-sheet-deathsave-pips"
          style="

        >

  </div>

  <stringfield field="hpByLevel" hidden="true"></stringfield>
