<script>
  function getAbilityScoreIncrease(feature) {
    const asi = feature?.data?.abilityScores || "";
    let max = 20;
    let scores = [];
    if (!asi) {
      return { max, scores, promptChoice: false, count: 0 };
    }

    // Parse the maximum value from the phrase
    const maxMatch = asi.toLowerCase().match(/to a maximum of (\d+)/);
    if (maxMatch) {
      max = parseInt(maxMatch[1], 10);
    }

    // Case for if choosing one or two ability scores of your choice
    if (
      asi.toLowerCase().match(/one ability score of your choice/) &&
      asi.toLowerCase().match(/or increase two ability scores/)
    ) {
      return {
        max,
        scores: [
          "strength",
          "dexterity",
          "constitution",
          "intelligence",
          "wisdom",
          "charisma",
        ],
        promptChoice: true,
        count: 2,
      };
    }
    // Case for if choosing one ability score of your choice
    else if (
      (asi.toLowerCase().match(/increase one ability score/) ||
        asi.toLowerCase().match(/choose one ability in which/)) &&
      !asi
        .toLowerCase()
        .match(/strength|dexterity|constitution|intelligence|wisdom|charisma/g)
    ) {
      return {
        max,
        scores: [
          "strength",
          "dexterity",
          "constitution",
          "intelligence",
          "wisdom",
          "charisma",
        ],
        promptChoice: true,
        count: 1,
      };
    }

    // Other cases for if we are choosing from a specific list of ability scores
    const abilityMatch = asi
      .toLowerCase()
      .match(/strength|dexterity|constitution|intelligence|wisdom|charisma/g);
    if (abilityMatch) {
      scores = abilityMatch;
    }

    return { max, scores, promptChoice: scores.length > 1, count: 1 };
  }

  function updateAbilitiesFromFeature(feature) {
    const abilityGroupName = feature?.data?.abilityGroupName || "";
    if (abilityGroupName === "") return;

    let abilityUsesPerDay = feature?.data?.maxDailyUses || 0;
    if ((feature?.data?.fieldsToAddToUses || []).length > 0) {
      abilityUsesPerDay = getTotalValueFromFields(
        record,
        feature?.data?.fieldsToAddToUses || [],
      );
    }
    const abilityValue = feature?.data?.value || "";
    const abilityRestoresOn = feature?.data?.restoreOn || "";
    const savingThrowAbility = feature?.data?.savingThrowAbility || "";
    const altSavingThrowAbility = feature?.data?.altSavingThrowAbility || "";

    // Use processDeferredAbilityGroups to safely add group + abilities
    const abilityIdToAdd =
      JSON.parse(feature?.data?.ability || "{}")?._id || "";
    const allAbilities = abilityIdToAdd ? [feature?.data?.ability] : [];

    processDeferredAbilityGroups(
      [
        {
          abilityGroupName,
          allAbilities,
          abilityUsesPerDay,
          abilityValue,
          abilityRestoresOn,
          savingThrowAbility,
          altSavingThrowAbility,
          fieldsToAddToUses: feature?.data?.fieldsToAddToUses || [],
        },
      ],
      record,
      () => {},
    );
  }

  function onDropFeat(recordLink) {
    const feat = recordLink?.value;

    // We add feats to the features list so that
    // All modifiers and are parsed by the same functions
    const featToAdd = {
      ...feat,
      data: {
        ...feat?.data,
        // Set a field called featureType to 'feat' so that
        // So that we can show and filter the two features_list fields properly
        featureType: "feat",
      },
    };

    safeAddValue(`data.features`, featToAdd, (updatedRecord) => {
      // After adding the feat, we need to update abilities if one was attached to it
      updateAbilitiesFromFeature(featToAdd);
      // Also update HP and AC just in case feature had a modifier on them
      updateACAndHP(featToAdd, updatedRecord);
    });

    // Prompt the user to select ASIs or just add them all
    const abilityScoreSelection = (values) => {
      const fieldsToSet = {};
      values.forEach((curV) => {
        // Get the current value
        let value = curV.split("-")[0];
        const curValue = record?.data?.[`${value}`] || 0;
        // If we haven't chosen it yet, increase the current value by 1
        if (fieldsToSet[`data.${value}`] === undefined) {
          if (curValue < abilityIncrease.max) {
            fieldsToSet[`data.${value}`] = curValue + 1;
          }
        } else {
          // Increase the value by 1 again
          if (fieldsToSet[`data.${value}`] < abilityIncrease.max) {
            fieldsToSet[`data.${value}`] = fieldsToSet[`data.${value}`] + 1;
          }
        }
      });

      // Set the attributes then...
      api.setValues(fieldsToSet, () => {
        // Use the setModifier function to set the modifiers, update proficiencies,
        // and other re-calculations of modifiers as needed
        Object.keys(fieldsToSet).forEach((key) => {
          const value = fieldsToSet[key];
          const attribute = key.replace("data.", "");
          setModifier(value, attribute);
        });
      });
    };

    const abilityIncrease = getAbilityScoreIncrease(featToAdd);
    if (abilityIncrease.promptChoice) {
      const options = [];
      abilityIncrease.scores.forEach((score) => {
        options.push({ label: capitalize(score), value: score });
      });
      // IF we allow more than one selection, add them again
      if (abilityIncrease.count > 1) {
        abilityIncrease.scores.forEach((score) => {
          options.push({ label: `${capitalize(score)}`, value: `${score}-2` });
        });
      }

      api.showPrompt(
        `Choose Ability Scores to Raise`,
        "Select Ability Scores",
        `Select ${abilityIncrease.count} Ability Score${
          abilityIncrease.count > 1 ? "s" : ""
        } to Raise (to a max of ${abilityIncrease.max})...`,
        options,
        null,
        abilityScoreSelection,
        "OK",
        "Cancel",
        abilityIncrease.count,
      );
    } else if (abilityIncrease.scores.length > 0) {
      // Add all ASIs
      abilityScoreSelection(abilityIncrease.scores.map((score) => score));
    }
  }

  function updateACAndHP(feature, updatedRecord) {
    const additionalFieldsToSet = {};

    // Check for AC Calc mods
    const hasAcMods =
      (feature?.data?.modifiers || []).filter(
        (mod) =>
          mod.data.type === "armorClassCalculation" ||
          mod.data.type === "armorClassBonus",
      ).length > 0;

    const acCalculationMods = (feature?.data?.modifiers || []).filter(
      (mod) => mod.data.type === "armorClassCalculation",
    );

    if (hasAcMods) {
      // Get other mods
      const allAcCalculationMods = getEffectsAndModifiersForToken(
        updatedRecord,
        ["armorClassCalculation"],
      );
      acCalculationMods.forEach((mod) => {
        allAcCalculationMods.push({
          name: feature.name || "Feature",
          value: mod.data?.value || 0,
          field: mod.data?.field || "",
        });
      });
      const dexMod = parseInt(updatedRecord?.data?.dexterityMod || "0", 10);
      let armorClass = 10 + dexMod;
      const bestEquippedArmor = updatedRecord?.data?.armor || undefined;
      let calcBonus = 0;
      // Only add acCalculationMods if we are unarmored
      if (bestEquippedArmor?.ac === 0 || !bestEquippedArmor) {
        allAcCalculationMods.forEach((mod) => {
          // We only benefit from the highest AC calculation modifier
          if (mod.field && mod.field !== "dexterity") {
            const acBonus = parseInt(
              updatedRecord?.data?.[`${mod.field}Mod`] || "0",
              10,
            );
            if (acBonus > calcBonus) {
              calcBonus = acBonus;
            }
          }
        });
      }
      // Get general AC bonuses
      const acBonuses = getEffectsAndModifiersForToken(updatedRecord, [
        "armorClassBonus",
      ]);
      acBonuses.forEach((mod) => {
        if (mod.value) {
          const acBonus = parseInt(mod.value || "0", 10);
          if (!isNaN(acBonus)) {
            calcBonus += acBonus;
          }
        }
      });
      // Check for best equipped armor and use this instead if set
      if (bestEquippedArmor && bestEquippedArmor.ac > 0) {
        armorClass =
          bestEquippedArmor.ac +
          (bestEquippedArmor.maxDex
            ? Math.min(dexMod, bestEquippedArmor.maxDex)
            : 0);
      }
      // Add shield if it is equipped
      if (bestEquippedArmor?.shieldAc) {
        armorClass += bestEquippedArmor.shieldAc;
      }
      armorClass += calcBonus;
      additionalFieldsToSet["data.ac"] = armorClass;
    }

    const conMod = parseInt(updatedRecord?.data?.constitutionMod || "0", 10);
    const newHp = getHpForLevel(conMod, updatedRecord);
    // Set our HP to be totalHp per level + conMod * level
    if (newHp > updatedRecord?.data?.hitpoints) {
      additionalFieldsToSet["data.hitpoints"] = newHp;
    }

    if (Object.keys(additionalFieldsToSet).length > 0) {
      api.setValues(additionalFieldsToSet);
    }
  }

  function onSelectShapeshifting(value, recordLink) {
    const npc = recordLink?.value;
    const selectedValue = value[0];
    const valuesToSet = {};

    valuesToSet["fields.shapeshiftingNpc.hidden"] = false;
    valuesToSet["fields.shapeshiftingNameNone.hidden"] = true;
    valuesToSet["fields.Remove Shape-shift.hidden"] = false;
    valuesToSet["data.shapeshiftingType"] = selectedValue;

    // If wildshape, we only set physical stats, polymorph sets all stats
    let hasCircleForms = false; // True if we're wild shaping and have Circle Forms
    if (selectedValue === "polymorph") {
      // Polymorph also gets mental stats
      valuesToSet["data.intelligence"] = npc?.data?.intelligence;
      valuesToSet["data.wisdom"] = npc?.data?.wisdom;
      valuesToSet["data.charisma"] = npc?.data?.charisma;

      // You gain Temp HP equal the the HP of the new form
      valuesToSet["data.tempHp"] = npc?.data?.hitpoints;
    } else {
      // Wild Shape gains Temp HP equal to your druid level
      if (selectedValue === "wildshape") {
        const matchDruidLevel =
          (record?.data?.classLevels || "").match(/Druid (\d+)/)?.[1] || 1;
        if (matchDruidLevel) {
          const druidLevel = Math.floor(parseInt(matchDruidLevel || "1", 10));
          // Check for 'Cicle Forms' feature, which inceases this by *3 -- we'll hard code this for now
          const circleFormsFeature = record?.data?.features?.find(
            (feature) => feature?.name === "Circle Forms",
          );
          if (circleFormsFeature) {
            valuesToSet["data.tempHp"] = druidLevel * 3;
            hasCircleForms = true;
          } else {
            valuesToSet["data.tempHp"] = druidLevel;
          }
        }
      } else {
        // Animal Shapes gets animal HP as temp HP like polymorph
        valuesToSet["data.tempHp"] = npc?.data?.hitpoints;
      }
    }

    // The actions we show in the polymorph attack list are any actions the
    // NPC had that were not spellcasting
    const polymorphActions = [
      ...(npc?.data?.actions || []).filter(
        (action) => action?.data?.isSpellcasting !== true,
      ),
    ];
    // Set the portrait on each action to be the NPC's portrait, and icon to be IconSwords (in case not set)
    polymorphActions.forEach((action) => {
      action.portrait = npc?.portrait;
      action.icon = "IconSwords";
    });

    // Store old values only if not already shapeshifted,
    // otherwise the "old" values already hold the original character stats
    const alreadyShapeshifted = !!record?.data?.shapeshiftingType;
    if (!alreadyShapeshifted) {
      valuesToSet["data.oldHitpoints"] = record?.data?.hitpoints;
      valuesToSet["data.oldStrength"] = record?.data?.strength;
      valuesToSet["data.oldDexterity"] = record?.data?.dexterity;
      valuesToSet["data.oldConstitution"] = record?.data?.constitution;
      valuesToSet["data.oldIntelligence"] = record?.data?.intelligence;
      valuesToSet["data.oldWisdom"] = record?.data?.wisdom;
      valuesToSet["data.oldCharisma"] = record?.data?.charisma;
      valuesToSet["data.oldAc"] = record?.data?.ac;
      valuesToSet["data.oldSenses"] = record?.data?.senses;
      valuesToSet["data.oldSpeed"] = record?.data?.speed;
      valuesToSet["data.oldResistances"] = record?.data?.resistances;
      valuesToSet["data.oldImmunities"] = record?.data?.immunities;
      valuesToSet["data.oldVulnerabilities"] = record?.data?.vulnerabilities;
      valuesToSet["data.oldSize"] = record?.data?.size;
    }
    // We always unhide the polymorph attack list when we're polymorphing
    valuesToSet["fields.polymorphActions.hidden"] = false;
    valuesToSet["data.polymorphActions"] = polymorphActions;

    // Set the new values
    valuesToSet["data.strength"] = npc?.data?.strength;
    valuesToSet["data.dexterity"] = npc?.data?.dexterity;
    valuesToSet["data.constitution"] = npc?.data?.constitution;
    valuesToSet["data.ac"] = npc?.data?.ac;
    valuesToSet["data.senses"] = npc?.data?.senses;
    valuesToSet["data.speed"] = npc?.data?.speed;
    valuesToSet["data.resistances"] = npc?.data?.resistances;
    valuesToSet["data.immunities"] = npc?.data?.immunities;
    valuesToSet["data.vulnerabilities"] = npc?.data?.vulnerabilities;
    valuesToSet["data.size"] = npc?.data?.size;

    // First set the recordLink
    const linkField = "data.shapeshiftingNpc";
    api.setRecordLink(linkField, recordLink, () => {
      //  Then set the values
      api.setValues(valuesToSet, (record) => {
        // Then set modifiers for the new values
        const moreValuesToSet = {};
        const statsUpdated = ["strength", "dexterity", "constitution"];
        if (selectedValue === "polymorph") {
          statsUpdated.push("intelligence", "wisdom", "charisma");
        }
        statsUpdated.forEach((attribute) => {
          const value = npc?.data?.[attribute];
          setModifier(value, attribute, {}, moreValuesToSet);
        });

        // Target retains their hitpoints
        moreValuesToSet[`data.hitpoints`] = record?.data?.hitpoints;
        // Override AC settings with what NPC had
        if (!hasCircleForms) {
          moreValuesToSet["data.ac"] = npc?.data?.ac;
        } else {
          // AC equals 13 plus your Wisdom modifier if that total is higher than the Beast’s AC.
          const wisdomMod = parseInt(record?.data?.wisdomMod || "0", 10);
          const newFormAc = 13 + wisdomMod;
          if (newFormAc > npc?.data?.ac) {
            moreValuesToSet["data.ac"] = newFormAc;
          } else {
            moreValuesToSet["data.ac"] = npc?.data?.ac;
          }
        }

        api.setValues(moreValuesToSet);

        // Send chat message
        const charName = record?.name || "Unknown";
        const beastName = npc?.name || "Unknown";
        const beastImage = npc?.token?.imageUrl
          ? `[center]![${beastName}](${assetUrl}${encodeURI(npc.token.imageUrl)}?width=80&height=80)[/center]\n`
          : "";
        const finalAc = moreValuesToSet["data.ac"] || npc?.data?.ac;
        const tempHp = valuesToSet["data.tempHp"] || 0;
        const shapeLabel =
          selectedValue === "polymorph"
            ? "Polymorph"
            : selectedValue === "wildshape"
              ? "Wild Shape"
              : "Animal Shapes";
        const tempHpLabel =
          selectedValue === "polymorph" || selectedValue === "animalShapes"
            ? `${npc?.data?.hitpoints} (creature HP)`
            : hasCircleForms
              ? `${tempHp} (Druid Level × 3)`
              : `${tempHp} (Druid Level)`;
        api.sendMessage(
          `${beastImage}\n\n[center]**${shapeLabel}**: ${charName} transforms into a ${beastName}[/center]\n\n[center]Temp HP: **${tempHpLabel}**[/center]\n\n[center]AC: **${finalAc}**[/center]`,
        );

        // Remove old token change effect (if any) then apply new one
        const tokenForRecord = api.getToken();
        if (tokenForRecord) {
          const oldEffect = record?.effectIds?.find((id) =>
            id.startsWith("token-"),
          );
          const addNewEffect = () =>
            api.addTokenChangeEffect(npc._id, tokenForRecord);
          if (oldEffect) {
            api.removeEffectById(oldEffect, tokenForRecord, addNewEffect);
          } else {
            addNewEffect();
          }
        } else {
          api.showNotification(
            `No token found for Token Change Effect.`,
            "yellow",
            "No Token",
          );
        }
      });
    });
  }

  function onDropNpc(recordLink) {
    const npc = recordLink?.value;
    // Prompt User to select Polymorph or Wild Shape
    const options = [
      { label: "Polymorph", value: "polymorph" },
      { label: "Wild Shape", value: "wildshape" },
      { label: "Animal Shapes", value: "animalShapes" },
    ];
    api.showPrompt(
      `Select Shape-shifting`,
      `Select Shape-shifting for ${npc?.name}`,
      `Select Shape-shifting...`,
      options,
      null,
      (value) => onSelectShapeshifting(value, recordLink),
      "OK",
      "Cancel",
      1,
    );
  }

  function onDrop(type, recordLink) {
    if (type === "feats") {
      onDropFeat(recordLink);
    } else if (type === "npcs") {
      onDropNpc(recordLink);
    }
  }

  function removeShapeshiftingEffect() {
    // In both cases, we apply a token change effect
    const tokenForRecord = api.getToken();
    if (tokenForRecord) {
      const effectToRemove = record?.effectIds?.find((effectId) =>
        effectId.startsWith("token-"),
      );
      if (effectToRemove) {
        api.removeEffectById(effectToRemove, tokenForRecord);
      }
    } else {
      api.showNotification(
        `No token found for Token Change Effect.`,
        "yellow",
        "No Token",
      );
    }
  }

  function removeShapeshifting(value) {
    api.setValues(
      {
        "data.shapeshiftingNpc": null,
        "data.shapeshiftingType": null,
        "fields.shapeshiftingNpc.hidden": true,
        "fields.shapeshiftingNameNone.hidden": false,
        "fields.Remove Shape-shift.hidden": true,
        "fields.polymorphActions.hidden": true,
        "data.strength": record?.data?.oldStrength,
        "data.dexterity": record?.data?.oldDexterity,
        "data.constitution": record?.data?.oldConstitution,
        "data.intelligence": record?.data?.oldIntelligence,
        "data.wisdom": record?.data?.oldWisdom,
        "data.charisma": record?.data?.oldCharisma,
        "data.ac": record?.data?.oldAc,
        "data.senses": record?.data?.oldSenses,
        "data.speed": record?.data?.oldSpeed,
        "data.resistances": record?.data?.oldResistances,
        "data.immunities": record?.data?.oldImmunities,
        "data.vulnerabilities": record?.data?.oldVulnerabilities,
        "data.size": record?.data?.oldSize || "medium",
      },
      () => {
        // Then update the modifiers
        const moreValuesToSet = {};
        [
          "strength",
          "dexterity",
          "constitution",
          "intelligence",
          "wisdom",
          "charisma",
        ].forEach((attribute) => {
          const value = record?.data?.[`old${capitalize(attribute)}`];
          setModifier(value, attribute, moreValuesToSet);
        });

        // Ensure hitpoints and AC are set to the old values after calling setModifier
        moreValuesToSet["data.hitpoints"] = record?.data?.oldHitpoints;
        moreValuesToSet["data.ac"] = record?.data?.oldAc;
        api.setValues(moreValuesToSet);
        // Then remove the effect
        removeShapeshiftingEffect();
      },
    );
  }
</script>

        options='[{"label": "Club", "value": "Club"}, {"label": "Dagger", "value": "Dagger"},

      {"label": "Javelin", "value": "Javelin"}, {"label": "Light Hammer", "value": "Light Hammer"},
      {"label": "Mace", "value": "Mace"}, {"label": "Quarterstaff", "value": "Quarterstaff"},
      {"label": "Sickle", "value": "Sickle"}, {"label": "Spear", "value": "Spear"},
      {"label": "Dart", "value": "Dart"}, {"label": "Light Crossbow", "value": "Light Crossbow"},

<script>
  // Parse profciencies and determine from weapon subtype if proficient with it
  function getIsProficient(attack) {
    const weaponSubtype = attack?.data?.subtype || "simple";
    const weaponName = (attack?.name || "").trim().toLowerCase();
    const weaponProperties = (attack?.data?.weaponProperties || [])
      .map((p) => p.trim().toLowerCase())
      .filter((p) => p !== "");

    const weaponProficiencies = record?.data?.weaponProficiencies || "";
    // Convert the string to an array of proficiencies
    const proficienciesArray = weaponProficiencies
      .split(/,| and /)
      .map((p) => p.trim().toLowerCase())
      .filter((p) => p !== "");

    let isProficient = false;

    let martialOrSimple = "simple";
    if (weaponSubtype.toLowerCase().includes("martial")) {
      martialOrSimple = "martial";
    }

    proficienciesArray.forEach((prof) => {
      // If it requires a trait, check trait, check for string `that have the X or Y property`
      if (prof.includes("that have the") && prof.includes(martialOrSimple)) {
        weaponProperties.forEach((wp) => {
          if (prof.includes(wp)) {
            isProficient = true;
          }
        });
      } else if (prof.includes(martialOrSimple)) {
        isProficient = true;
      } else if (prof.includes(weaponName)) {
        isProficient = true;
      }
    });

    return isProficient;
  }

  function handleRoll() {
    const attackDataPath = dataPath.replace(".data.rollBtn", "");
    const attack = api.getValue(attackDataPath);

    if (!attack) {
      console.error("Attack is undefined at path:", attackDataPath);
      return;
    }

    let name = attack?.name || "New Item";
    if (attack?.identified === false) {
      name = attack?.unidentifiedName || "Unidentified Item";
    }

    const dexMod = parseInt(record?.data?.dexterityMod || "0", 10);
    const strMod = parseInt(record?.data?.strengthMod || "0", 10);
    const proficiencyBonus = parseInt(
      record?.data?.proficiencyBonus || "2",
      10,
    );

    let dexOrStr = "Strength";
    let modToUse = strMod;

    const atkRoll = "1d20";

    let ranged = false;
    // Always ranged attack for ranged weapons
    if (attack?.data?.type?.includes("ranged")) {
      ranged = true;
    }
    // If this is a thrown melee weapon, check the rangeToggleBtn
    if (attack?.data?.weaponProperties?.includes("Thrown") && !ranged) {
      ranged = attack?.data?.rangeToggleBtn === "ranged";
    }

    // Get modifiers for this type of attack
    let modifiers = getEffectsAndModifiers(
      ["attackBonus", "attackPenalty"],
      ranged ? "ranged" : "melee",
      attack._id,
    );

    // If bloodied, look for bloodied modifiers
    const curhp = record?.data?.curhp || 0;
    const maxhp = record?.data?.hitpoints || 0;
    if (maxhp > 0 && curhp <= Math.floor(maxhp / 2)) {
      const bloodiedMods = getEffectsAndModifiers(
        ["attackBonus", "attackPenalty"],
        "bloodied",
        attack._id,
      );
      bloodiedMods.forEach((mod) => {
        if (
          !modifiers.some(
            (m) =>
              m.name === mod.name &&
              m.type === mod.type &&
              m.value === mod.value,
          )
        ) {
          modifiers.push(mod);
        }
      });
    }

    // We also get modifiers that apply only to attacks with the specific weapon properties or weapon type
    const specialModifierTypes = [
      ...(attack?.data?.weaponProperties || [])
        .map((p) => p.toLowerCase())
        .filter((p) => p !== "thrown" || ranged),
      (attack?.data?.weaponType || "untyped").toLowerCase(),
    ];
    specialModifierTypes.forEach((type) => {
      const specialModifiers = getEffectsAndModifiers(
        ["attackBonus", "attackPenalty"],
        type,
        attack._id,
      );
      specialModifiers.forEach((mod) => {
        // Don't add duplicate modifiers
        if (
          !modifiers.some(
            (m) =>
              m.name === mod.name &&
              m.value === mod.value &&
              m.modifierType === mod.modifierType,
          )
        ) {
          modifiers.push(mod);
        }
      });
    });

    // Ranged is always dexterity
    dexOrStrMod = attack?.data?.type?.includes("ranged")
      ? "Dexterity"
      : "Strength";
    // If not ranged, check if it has Finesse property and default to dexterity unless strength is higher
    if (attack?.data?.weaponProperties?.includes("Finesse")) {
      dexOrStrMod = strMod > dexMod ? "Strength" : "Dexterity";
    }
    if (dexOrStrMod === "Dexterity") {
      modToUse = dexMod;
    }
    // Check for attack calculation modifier
    const attackCalculationMod = getEffectsAndModifiers(
      ["attackCalculation"],
      undefined,
      attack._id,
    );
    // If we have an attack calculation modifier, use the field defined instead
    // of the above
    if (attackCalculationMod.length) {
      const attackCalculation =
        attackCalculationMod[attackCalculationMod.length - 1]?.field;
      if (attackCalculation) {
        dexOrStrMod = capitalize(attackCalculation);
        modToUse = parseInt(
          record?.data?.[`${attackCalculation.toLowerCase()}Mod`] || "0",
          10,
        );
      }
    }

    // Add the modifier to the modifiers array
    if (modToUse !== 0) {
      modifiers.push({
        name: dexOrStrMod,
        value: modToUse,
        active: true,
      });
    }

    const isProficient = getIsProficient(attack);
    if (isProficient) {
      modifiers.push({
        name: "Proficient",
        value: proficiencyBonus,
        active: true,
      });
    }

    let icon = "IconSword";
    if (ranged) {
      icon = "IconBow";
    }

    // If ranged, deduct 1 ammo if set
    if (ranged && attack?.data?.ammo) {
      const newAmmo = parseInt(attack?.data?.ammo || "0", 10) - 1;
      if (newAmmo >= 0) {
        api.setValue(`${attackDataPath}.data.ammo`, newAmmo);
      }
    }

    const normalRange = parseInt(attack?.data?.normalRange || "0", 10);
    const maxRange = parseInt(attack?.data?.maxRange || "0", 10);

    // If ranged, you have Disadvantage on the roll if you are within 5 feet of an enemy who can see you and doesn’t have the Incapacitated condition
    // Get range to all other tokens
    let disDueToProximity = false;
    const ourToken = api.getToken();
    if (ranged && ourToken) {
      api.getOtherTokens().forEach((token) => {
        if (disDueToProximity) {
          // Short circuit if we already have disadvantage due to proximity
          return;
        }
        if (
          token?.faction !== "neutral" &&
          token?.faction !== ourToken?.faction
        ) {
          // Check if you have the Invisible condition
          const hasInvisible = (ourToken?.effects || []).some((eff) =>
            eff.name.toLowerCase().includes("invisible"),
          );
          // Check if they have incapacitated condition or are blinded
          const hasIncapacitated = (token?.effects || []).some(
            (eff) =>
              eff.name.toLowerCase().includes("incapacitated") ||
              eff.name.toLowerCase().includes("stunned") ||
              eff.name.toLowerCase().includes("paralyzed") ||
              eff.name.toLowerCase().includes("unconscious") ||
              eff.name.toLowerCase().includes("petrified") ||
              eff.name.toLowerCase().includes("dead") ||
              eff.name.toLowerCase().includes("blinded"),
          );
          if (!hasIncapacitated && !hasInvisible) {
            // Check distance
            const distance = api.getDistance(ourToken, token);
            if (distance !== undefined && distance !== null && distance <= 5) {
              disDueToProximity = true;
            }
          }
        }
      });
    }

    let damage = attack?.data?.damage || "1d4";

    // Check for versatile property and use 2-handed damage if 2handed is set
    if (
      attack?.data?.weaponProperties?.includes("Versatile") &&
      attack?.data?.handBtn === "two"
    ) {
      damage = attack?.data?.versatileDamage || damage;
    }

    let damageModifiers = getEffectsAndModifiers(
      ["damageBonus", "damagePenalty"],
      ranged ? "ranged" : "melee",
      attack._id,
    );

    // We also get modifiers that apply only to damage of a specific weapon type or property
    const specialDamageModifierTypes = [
      ...(attack?.data?.weaponProperties || [])
        .map((p) => p.toLowerCase())
        .filter((p) => p !== "thrown" || ranged),
      (attack?.data?.weaponType || "untyped").toLowerCase(),
    ];
    specialDamageModifierTypes.forEach((type) => {
      const specialModifiers = getEffectsAndModifiers(
        ["damageBonus", "damagePenalty"],
        type,
        attack._id,
      );
      specialModifiers.forEach((mod) => {
        // Don't add duplicate modifiers
        if (
          !damageModifiers.some(
            (m) =>
              m.name === mod.name &&
              m.value === mod.value &&
              m.modifierType === mod.modifierType,
          )
        ) {
          damageModifiers.push(mod);
        }
      });
    });

    // Get the default damage type of the attack and apply that to damage modifiers that have no type
    const damageType = getDamageType(damage);
    damageModifiers = damageModifiers.map((mod) => {
      const modType = getDamageType(mod?.value?.toString() || "");
      const type = modType === "untyped" ? mod?.type || damageType : "";
      return {
        ...mod,
        type: type,
      };
    });

    // Determine if we are making a damage roll that ignores resistances / immunities
    const damageIgnoresResistances = damageModifiers
      .filter(
        (mod) =>
          mod.valueType === "string" &&
          mod.value.trim().toLowerCase().startsWith("ignore") &&
          mod.value.trim().toLowerCase().includes("resistance"),
      )
      ?.map((mod) => mod.value.split(" ")[1])
      .join(",");
    const damageIgnoresImmunities = damageModifiers
      .filter(
        (mod) =>
          mod.valueType === "string" &&
          mod.value.trim().toLowerCase().startsWith("ignore") &&
          (mod.value.trim().toLowerCase().includes("immunities") ||
            mod.value.trim().toLowerCase().includes("immunity")),
      )
      ?.map((mod) => mod.value.split(" ")[1])
      .join(",");
    // Filter these out of the modifiers array, we don't need them to be toggleable
    damageModifiers = damageModifiers.filter(
      (m) => !m.value.toString().toLowerCase().includes("ignore"),
    );

    // Add dex or str mod to damage as required unless the damage roll has no dice (e.g. 1) and is not "Unarmed Strike"
    if (damage.includes("d") || name.toLowerCase().includes("unarmed")) {
      // The modifier is inactive by default if this was an off-hand attack, unless the modifier is a penalty
      let active = true;
      if (attack?.data?.handBtn === "off" && modToUse > 0) {
        active = false;
      }
      damageModifiers.push({
        name: dexOrStrMod,
        type: damageType,
        value: modToUse,
        active: active,
      });
    }

    // Get weapon masteries that the character has and check if this weapon is in the list
    const masteryProperties = [];
    const characterWeaponMasteries = record?.data?.weaponMasteries || [];
    const weaponType = attack?.data?.weaponType || "";
    let canUseAdditionalMasteries = false;
    if (characterWeaponMasteries.includes(weaponType)) {
      // Add the mastery property to the attack
      const masteryProperty = attack?.data?.weaponMastery || "";
      if (masteryProperty) {
        canUseAdditionalMasteries = true;
        masteryProperties.push(masteryProperty);
      }
    }
    // This modifier is used to grant additional weapon  masteries to the attack, if we're attacking
    // with a weapon that gives us one we don't already have
    if (canUseAdditionalMasteries) {
      const additionalMasteries = getEffectsAndModifiers(
        ["weaponMastery"],
        undefined,
        attack._id,
      );
      additionalMasteries.forEach((am) => {
        if (am?.value && !masteryProperties.includes(am.value)) {
          masteryProperties.push(am.value);
        }
      });
    }

    if (disDueToProximity) {
      modifiers.push({
        name: "Enemy is Within 5 Feet",
        value: "disadvantage",
        active: true,
      });
    }

    const targets = api.getTargets();

    let autoCritical = modifiers.some((m) => m.value === "critical");

    // Check for crit on 19 or some other number
    const critOnMatch = /critical(\d+)/;
    const critOnMods = modifiers
      .map((m) => {
        const match = m.value.toString().match(critOnMatch);
        return match ? parseInt(match[1], 10) : null;
      })
      .filter((value) => value !== null);

    let critOn = null;
    if (critOnMods.length) {
      critOn = Math.min(...critOnMods);
    }
    // Filter these out of the modifiers array, we don't need them to be toggleable
    modifiers = modifiers.filter(
      (m) => !m.value.toString().startsWith("critical"),
    );

    const minRoll = getMinRollModifier(modifiers);
    // Filter these out of the modifiers array, we don't need them to be toggleable
    modifiers = modifiers.filter(
      (m) => !m.value.toString().startsWith("minroll"),
    );

    targets.forEach((target) => {
      // Get calculated AC from modifiers - use if any
      const targetAc = getArmorClassForToken(target?.token);
      const targetName =
        target?.token?.identified === false
          ? target?.token?.record?.unidentifiedName
          : target?.token?.record?.name;
      const targetDistance = target?.distance || 0;

      // If the target is beyond normal range, and normal range is > 0, add a disadvantage modifier
      // and if it was greater than the max, make it apparent in the roll prompt
      if (ranged && targetDistance > maxRange && maxRange > 0) {
        modifiers.push({
          name: "Target is Beyond Max Range",
          value: "disadvantage",
          active: true,
        });
      } else if (ranged && targetDistance > normalRange && normalRange > 0) {
        modifiers.push({
          name: "Target is Beyond Normal Range",
          value: "disadvantage",
          active: true,
        });
      }

      // Get effects and modifiers for the target
      const targetEffects = getAttackModifiersForTarget(
        target?.token,
        targetDistance,
      );
      targetEffects.forEach((r) => {
        if (r.value === "critical") {
          autoCritical = true;
        } else {
          modifiers.push(r);
        }
      });

      // Get damage effects for the target
      const targetDamageEffects = getDamageEffectsForTarget(
        ourToken,
        target?.token,
      );
      targetDamageEffects.forEach((r) => {
        damageModifiers.push(r);
      });

      const diceRoll = "1d20";
      const metadata = {
        rollName: "Attack",
        attack: `${name}`,
        icon: icon,
        portrait: attack?.portrait,
        targetName: targetName,
        tokenId: ourToken?._id,
        targetId: target?.token?._id,
        tooltip: `Attack Roll for ${name}`,
        autoCritical: autoCritical,
        critOn: critOn,
        dc: targetAc,
        damage: damage,
        damageModifiers: damageModifiers,
        damageIgnoresResistances: damageIgnoresResistances,
        damageIgnoresImmunities: damageIgnoresImmunities,
        masteryProperties: masteryProperties,
        attackerProficiencyBonus: proficiencyBonus,
        minRoll: minRoll,
        isRanged: ranged,
        animation: attack?.data?.animation?.animationName
          ? attack?.data?.animation
          : undefined,
      };
      api.promptRoll(`${name} Attack`, diceRoll, modifiers, metadata, "attack");
    });

    if (!targets.length) {
      const diceRoll = "1d20";
      const metadata = {
        rollName: "Attack",
        attack: `${name}`,
        icon: icon,
        portrait: attack?.portrait,
        tooltip: `Attack Roll for ${name}`,
        dc: 0,
        damage: damage,
        tokenId: ourToken?._id,
        damageModifiers: damageModifiers,
        masteryProperties: masteryProperties,
        attackerProficiencyBonus: proficiencyBonus,
        damageIgnoresResistances: damageIgnoresResistances,
        damageIgnoresImmunities: damageIgnoresImmunities,
        critOn: critOn,
        minRoll: minRoll,
        isRanged: ranged,
        animation: attack?.data?.animation?.animationName
          ? attack?.data?.animation
          : undefined,
      };
      api.promptRoll(`Attack ${name}`, diceRoll, modifiers, metadata, "attack");
    }
  }

  function rollDamage(isCritical) {
    const attackDataPath = isCritical
      ? dataPath.replace(".data.critBtn", "")
      : dataPath.replace(".data.damageBtn", "");
    const attack = api.getValue(attackDataPath);

    let name = attack?.name || "New Item";
    if (attack?.identified === false) {
      name = attack?.unidentifiedName || "Unidentified Item";
    }

    const dexMod = parseInt(record?.data?.dexterityMod || "0", 10);
    const strMod = parseInt(record?.data?.strengthMod || "0", 10);

    let dexOrStr = "Strength";
    let modToUse = strMod;

    let ranged = false;

    // Always ranged attack for ranged weapons
    if (attack?.data?.type?.includes("ranged")) {
      ranged = true;
    }
    // If this is a thrown weapon, check the rangeToggleBtn
    if (attack?.data?.weaponProperties?.includes("Thrown")) {
      ranged = attack?.data?.rangeToggleBtn === "ranged";
    }

    // Ranged is always dexterity
    dexOrStrMod = attack?.data?.type?.includes("ranged")
      ? "Dexterity"
      : "Strength";
    // If not ranged, check if it has Finesse property and default to dexterity unless strength is higher
    if (attack?.data?.weaponProperties?.includes("Finesse")) {
      dexOrStrMod = strMod > dexMod ? "Strength" : "Dexterity";
    }
    if (dexOrStrMod === "Dexterity") {
      modToUse = dexMod;
    }
    // Check for attack calculation modifier
    const attackCalculationMod = getEffectsAndModifiers(
      ["attackCalculation"],
      undefined,
      attack._id,
    );
    // If we have an attack calculation modifier, use the field defined instead
    // of the above
    if (attackCalculationMod.length) {
      const attackCalculation =
        attackCalculationMod[attackCalculationMod.length - 1]?.field;
      if (attackCalculation) {
        dexOrStrMod = capitalize(attackCalculation);
        modToUse = parseInt(
          record?.data?.[`${attackCalculation.toLowerCase()}Mod`] || "0",
          10,
        );
      }
    }

    let damage = attack?.data?.damage || "1d4";

    // Check for versatile property and use 2-handed damage if 2handed is set
    if (
      attack?.data?.weaponProperties?.includes("Versatile") &&
      attack?.data?.handBtn === "two"
    ) {
      damage = attack?.data?.versatileDamage || damage;
    }

    if (isCritical) {
      damage = doubleDamageDice(damage);
    }

    let damageModifiers = getEffectsAndModifiers(
      ["damageBonus", "damagePenalty"],
      ranged ? "ranged" : "melee",
      attack._id,
    );

    // We also get modifiers that apply only to damage of a specific weapon type or property
    const specialDamageModifierTypes = [
      ...(attack?.data?.weaponProperties || [])
        .map((p) => p.toLowerCase())
        .filter((p) => p !== "thrown" || ranged),
      (attack?.data?.weaponType || "untyped").toLowerCase(),
    ];
    specialDamageModifierTypes.forEach((type) => {
      const specialModifiers = getEffectsAndModifiers(
        ["damageBonus", "damagePenalty"],
        type,
        attack._id,
      );
      specialModifiers.forEach((mod) => {
        // Don't add duplicate modifiers
        if (
          !damageModifiers.some(
            (m) =>
              m.name === mod.name &&
              m.value === mod.value &&
              m.modifierType === mod.modifierType,
          )
        ) {
          damageModifiers.push(mod);
        }
      });
    });

    // Get damage effects for the target
    const targets = api.getTargets();
    const ourToken = api.getToken();
    targets.forEach((target) => {
      // Get damage effects for the target
      const targetDamageEffects = getDamageEffectsForTarget(
        ourToken,
        target?.token,
      );
      targetDamageEffects.forEach((r) => {
        damageModifiers.push(r);
      });
    });

    // Get the default damage type of the attack and apply that to damage modifiers that have no type
    const damageType = getDamageType(damage);
    damageModifiers = damageModifiers.map((mod) => {
      const modType = getDamageType(mod?.value?.toString() || "");
      const type = modType === "untyped" ? mod?.type || damageType : "";
      return {
        ...mod,
        // If this is a critical hit, double the dice
        value: isCritical ? doubleDamageDice(mod.value) : mod.value,
        type: type,
      };
    });

    // Determine if we are making a damage roll that ignores resistances / immunities
    const damageIgnoresResistances = damageModifiers
      .filter(
        (mod) =>
          mod.valueType === "string" &&
          mod.value.trim().toLowerCase().startsWith("ignore") &&
          mod.value.trim().toLowerCase().includes("resistance"),
      )
      ?.map((mod) => mod.value.split(" ")[1])
      .join(",");
    const damageIgnoresImmunities = damageModifiers
      .filter(
        (mod) =>
          mod.valueType === "string" &&
          mod.value.trim().toLowerCase().startsWith("ignore") &&
          (mod.value.trim().toLowerCase().includes("immunities") ||
            mod.value.trim().toLowerCase().includes("immunity")),
      )
      ?.map((mod) => mod.value.split(" ")[1])
      .join(",");
    // Filter these out of the modifiers array, we don't need them to be toggleable
    damageModifiers = damageModifiers.filter(
      (m) => !m.value.toString().toLowerCase().includes("ignore"),
    );

    const damageMetadata = {
      // This is so that our damage handler script can tell if it was from a critical hit
      // And is set if the Attack Roll was a critical hit, but not in the case of using the Damage Button
      critical: isCritical,
      // Header info for the damage chat message
      attack: name,
      icon: ranged ? "IconBow" : "IconSword",
      portrait: attack?.portrait,
      damageIgnoresResistances: damageIgnoresResistances,
      damageIgnoresImmunities: damageIgnoresImmunities,
    };

    // Add dex or str mod to damage as required unless the damage roll has no dice (e.g. 1) and is not "Unarmed Strike"
    if (damage.includes("d") || name.toLowerCase().includes("unarmed")) {
      // The modifier is inactive by default if this was an off-hand attack, unless the modifier is a penalty
      let active = true;
      if (attack?.data?.handBtn === "off" && modToUse > 0) {
        active = false;
      }
      damageModifiers.push({
        name: dexOrStrMod,
        type: damageType,
        value: modToUse,
        active: active,
      });
    }

    api.promptRoll(
      `${name} Damage`,
      damage,
      damageModifiers,
      damageMetadata,
      "damage",
    );
  }
</script>

<script>
  // Convert 5e formatted damage strings to string Realm VTT needs such as 1d4 piercing + 3 piercing + 2d6 poison (converted from (1d4 + 3) piercing damage plus (2d6) poison damage)
  function getDamage(description) {
    // Handle both formats: "7 (1d8 + 3)" and "1d8 + 3"
    const patterns = [
      /(\d+) \((\d+d\d+)(?:\s*([-+])\s*(\d+))?\) (\w+) damage(?!\s+or)/gi, // Format: "7 (1d8 + 3) piercing" not followed by "or"
      /(\d+d\d+)(?:\s*([-+])\s*(\d+))? (\w+) damage(?!\s+or)/gi, // Format: "1d8 + 3 piercing" not followed by "or"
    ];

    let damageString = "";

    // Take only the part before "or" if it exists
    const mainDescription = description.split(/,?\s+or\s+/)[0];

    for (const pattern of patterns) {
      let match;
      while ((match = pattern.exec(mainDescription)) !== null) {
        if (match[0].includes("(")) {
          // Format: "7 (1d8 + 3) piercing"
          const [, , dice, math, bonus, type] = match;
          const typeLower = type.toLowerCase();
          if (math) {
            damageString += `${dice} ${typeLower} ${math} ${bonus} ${typeLower} + `;
          } else {
            damageString += `${dice} ${typeLower} + `;
          }
        } else {
          // Format: "1d8 + 3 piercing"
          const [, dice, math, bonus, type] = match;
          const typeLower = type.toLowerCase();
          if (math) {
            damageString += `${dice} ${typeLower} ${math} ${bonus} ${typeLower} + `;
          } else {
            damageString += `${dice} ${typeLower} + `;
          }
        }
      }
    }

    // Remove trailing ' + ' if present
    damageString = damageString.replace(/ \+ $/, "");
    return damageString;
  }

  function updateName(name) {
    const actionDataPath = dataPath.replace(".name", "");

    const valuesToSet = {};
    // Parse name for (x/Day)
    const usesPerDay = parseInt(
      name.match(/\(\s*(\d+)\s*\/Day\s*\)/)?.[1] || "0",
      10,
    );
    if (usesPerDay > 0) {
      valuesToSet[`${actionDataPath}.data.usesPerDay`] = usesPerDay;
      valuesToSet[`${actionDataPath}.fields.useBtn.hidden`] = false;
      valuesToSet[`${actionDataPath}.fields.uses.hidden`] = false;
    }

    // Parse for Recharge (i.e. '(Recharge 5-6)' or '(Recharge 6)')
    const rechargeMatch = name.match(/\(Recharge\s+(\d+[-–—]\d+|\d+)\)/);
    if (rechargeMatch) {
      const recharge = rechargeMatch[1].replace(/[–—]/g, "-"); // Normalize to regular hyphen
      valuesToSet[`${actionDataPath}.data.isRecharge`] = true;
      valuesToSet[`${actionDataPath}.data.recharge`] = recharge;
      if (!valuesToSet[`${actionDataPath}.data.usesPerDay`]) {
        valuesToSet[`${actionDataPath}.data.usesPerDay`] = 1;
      }
      valuesToSet[`${actionDataPath}.fields.useBtn.hidden`] = false;
      valuesToSet[`${actionDataPath}.fields.uses.hidden`] = false;
    }

    if (Object.keys(valuesToSet).length > 0) {
      api.setValues(valuesToSet);
    }
  }

  function updateSettings(description) {
    // Here we parse the description to extract the settings for an NPC action to try to set them automatically
    // e.g. Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) Piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) Poison damage.
    const actionDataPath = dataPath.replace(".data.description", "");
    const valuesToSet = {};
    const isAttack =
      description.toLowerCase().includes("attack roll") ||
      description.toLowerCase().includes("melee weapon") ||
      description.toLowerCase().includes("melee spell") ||
      description.toLowerCase().includes("melee attack");
    const isRanged =
      description.toLowerCase().includes("ranged attack") ||
      description.toLowerCase().includes("ranged weapon") ||
      description.toLowerCase().includes("ranged spell");
    const action = api.getValue(actionDataPath);

    if (isAttack || isRanged) {
      valuesToSet[`${actionDataPath}.data.isAttack`] = isAttack;
      valuesToSet[`${actionDataPath}.data.isRanged`] = isRanged;

      // Extract attack to hit - support both formats:
      // New: "Attack Roll: +5"
      // Old: "Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit"
      const attackMod = parseInt(
        description.match(/(?:Attack Roll|to hit):\s*([+-]?\d+)/)?.[1] ||
          description.match(/:\s*([+-]?\d+)\s+to hit/)?.[1] ||
          "0",
        10,
      );
      valuesToSet[`${actionDataPath}.data.attackMod`] = attackMod;

      // Extract damage components
      // Look for damage after "Hit:" for old format
      const hitMatch = description.match(/Hit:\s*(.*?)(?:$|\.)/);
      const damageString = hitMatch
        ? getDamage(hitMatch[1]) // Process text after "Hit:"
        : getDamage(description); // Fall back to processing full description
      valuesToSet[`${actionDataPath}.data.damage`] = damageString;

      if (isRanged) {
        // Extract normal and max range (e.g. Ranged Attack Roll: +5, range 80/320 ft.)
        const rangeMatch = description.match(/range\s+(\d+)\s*\/\s*(\d+)/);
        if (rangeMatch) {
          valuesToSet[`${actionDataPath}.data.normalRange`] = parseInt(
            rangeMatch[1],
            10,
          );
          valuesToSet[`${actionDataPath}.data.maxRange`] = parseInt(
            rangeMatch[2],
            10,
          );
        }
      }

      // If these are set, we also need to show the damage/attack buttons
      valuesToSet[`${actionDataPath}.fields.rollAttackBtn.hidden`] = false;
      valuesToSet[`${actionDataPath}.fields.rollDamageBtn.hidden`] = false;
      valuesToSet[`${actionDataPath}.fields.rollCriticalBtn.hidden`] = false;
    } else {
      valuesToSet[`${actionDataPath}.fields.rollAttackBtn.hidden`] = true;
      if (action?.data?.damage) {
        valuesToSet[`${actionDataPath}.fields.rollDamageBtn.hidden`] = false;
      } else {
        valuesToSet[`${actionDataPath}.fields.rollDamageBtn.hidden`] = true;
      }
      valuesToSet[`${actionDataPath}.fields.rollCriticalBtn.hidden`] = true;
    }

    // Parse for a saving throw — supports multiple formats:
    // "Strength Saving Throw: DC 12"
    // "DC 13 Strength saving throw"
    // "makes a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw"
    const saveMatch =
      description.match(/([A-Za-z]+)\s+[Ss]aving\s+[Tt]hrow:\s+DC\s+(\d+)/) ||
      description.match(/DC\s+(\d+)\s+([A-Za-z]+)\s+[Ss]aving\s+[Tt]hrow/);
    if (saveMatch) {
      // First format: ability is group 1, DC is group 2
      // Second format: DC is group 1, ability is group 2
      const ability = saveMatch[1].match(/^\d+$/) ? saveMatch[2] : saveMatch[1];
      const dc = saveMatch[1].match(/^\d+$/)
        ? parseInt(saveMatch[1], 10)
        : parseInt(saveMatch[2], 10);
      valuesToSet[`${actionDataPath}.data.saveDC`] = dc;
      valuesToSet[`${actionDataPath}.data.isSave`] = true;
      valuesToSet[`${actionDataPath}.data.savingThrows`] = [
        ability.toLowerCase(),
      ];
      valuesToSet[`${actionDataPath}.fields.useBtn.hidden`] = false;
    }

    // Parse for spellcasting — supports two common formats:
    // "using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 12)"
    // "spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 20)"
    // Also handles extra content in parens like "(spell save DC 12, +4 to hit with spell attacks)"
    const spellcastingMatch = description.match(
      /(?:using (\w+) as the spellcasting ability|spellcasting ability\s+is\s+(\w+))\s*\(spell save DC (\d+)[^)]*\)/i,
    );
    if (spellcastingMatch) {
      const spellcastingAbility = (
        spellcastingMatch[1] || spellcastingMatch[2]
      ).toLowerCase();
      const spellSaveDC = parseInt(spellcastingMatch[3] || "0", 10);
      // Check for explicit spell attack modifier like "+4 to hit"
      const spellAttackMatch = description.match(
        /([+-]\d+)\s+to hit with spell/i,
      );
      let spellMod;
      if (spellAttackMatch) {
        spellMod = parseInt(spellAttackMatch[1], 10);
      } else {
        const spellcastingAbilityMod =
          api.getValue(`data.${spellcastingAbility}Mod`) || 0;
        const proficiencyBonus = api.getValue("data.proficiencyBonus") || 2;
        spellMod = spellcastingAbilityMod + proficiencyBonus;
      }
      valuesToSet[`${actionDataPath}.data.isSpellcasting`] = true;
      valuesToSet[`${actionDataPath}.data.spellcastingAbility`] =
        spellcastingAbility;
      valuesToSet[`${actionDataPath}.data.spellMod`] = spellMod;
      valuesToSet[`${actionDataPath}.data.spellDC`] = spellSaveDC;
      valuesToSet[`${actionDataPath}.fields.spells.hidden`] = false;
    }

    if (Object.keys(valuesToSet).length > 0) {
      api.setValues(valuesToSet);
    }
  }

  function onAttackChange(isAttack) {
    const valuesToSet = {};
    const actionDataPath = dataPath.replace(".data.isAttack", "");

    valuesToSet[`${actionDataPath}.fields.rollAttackBtn.hidden`] = !isAttack;
    valuesToSet[`${actionDataPath}.fields.rollDamageBtn.hidden`] = !isAttack;
    valuesToSet[`${actionDataPath}.fields.rollCriticalBtn.hidden`] = !isAttack;
    api.setValues(valuesToSet);
  }

  function showHideSpellcasting(isSpellcasting) {
    const spellListDataPath = dataPath.replace(
      ".data.isSpellcasting",
      ".fields.spells.hidden",
    );
    api.setValue(spellListDataPath, !isSpellcasting);
  }

  function updateUsesPerDay(usesPerDay) {
    const actionDataPath = dataPath.replace(".data.usesPerDay", "");
    const valuesToSet = {};
    valuesToSet[`${actionDataPath}.fields.useBtn.hidden`] = !usesPerDay;
    valuesToSet[`${actionDataPath}.fields.uses.hidden`] = !usesPerDay;
    api.setValues(valuesToSet);
  }

  function updateReactions() {
    // If this is a reaction, we update the amount used by 1 up to the max
    if (dataPath.includes("data.reactions")) {
      const maxReactions = record?.data?.maxReactions || 1;
      const usedReactions = record?.data?.usedReactions || 0;
      if (usedReactions < maxReactions) {
        api.setValue("data.usedReactions", usedReactions + 1);
      }
    }
  }

  function updateLegendaryActions() {
    // If this is a legendary action, we update the amount used by the cost, up to the max
    let actionDataPath = dataPath.replace(".data.useBtn", "");
    if (dataPath.includes("rollAttackBtn")) {
      actionDataPath = dataPath.replace(".data.rollAttackBtn", "");
    }
    const action = api.getValue(actionDataPath);
    const name = action?.name || "";
    let cost = 1;
    // Parse cost from name like "Action Name (Costs 2 Actions)" or "Action Name (Costs 3 Actions)"
    const costMatch = name.match(/\(costs?\s*(\d+)\s*actions?\)/i);
    if (costMatch) {
      cost = parseInt(costMatch[1], 10);
    }

    if (dataPath.includes("data.legendaryActions")) {
      const maxLegendaryActions = record?.data?.maxLegendaryActions || 1;
      const usedLegendaryActions = record?.data?.usedLegendaryActions || 0;
      if (usedLegendaryActions < maxLegendaryActions) {
        api.setValue("data.usedLegendaryActions", usedLegendaryActions + cost);
      }
    }
  }

  function updateRecharge(recharge) {
    const actionDataPath = dataPath.replace(".data.isRecharge", "");
    const action = api.getValue(actionDataPath);
    const valuesToSet = {};
    if (!action?.data?.usesPerDay) {
      valuesToSet[`${actionDataPath}.data.usesPerDay`] = 1;
    }
    valuesToSet[`${actionDataPath}.fields.useBtn.hidden`] = !recharge;
    valuesToSet[`${actionDataPath}.fields.uses.hidden`] = !recharge;
    api.setValues(valuesToSet);
  }

  function updateHealing(healing) {
    const actionDataPath = dataPath.replace(".data.healing", "");
    api.setValue(`${actionDataPath}.fields.useBtn.hidden`, !healing);
  }

  function updateIsSave(isSave) {
    const actionDataPath = dataPath.replace(".data.isSave", "");
    api.setValue(`${actionDataPath}.fields.useBtn.hidden`, !isSave);
  }

  function updateEffects(effects) {
    const actionDataPath = dataPath.replace(".data.effects", "");
    api.setValue(
      `${actionDataPath}.fields.useBtn.hidden`,
      (effects || []).length === 0,
    );
  }

  function updateDamage(damage) {
    const actionDataPath = dataPath.replace(".data.damage", "");
    api.setValue(
      `${actionDataPath}.fields.rollDamageBtn.hidden`,
      damage === "" || damage === undefined || damage === null,
    );
  }

  // Roll Attack
  function handleAttack() {
    const attackDataPath = dataPath.replace(".data.rollAttackBtn", "");
    const attack = api.getValue(attackDataPath);

    let name = attack?.name || "New Attack";

    const attackMod = parseInt(attack?.data?.attackMod || "0", 10);

    const atkRoll = "1d20";

    let ranged = attack?.data?.isRanged || false;
    // Some attacks can be both, so check description to see
    // if that is the case
    const canBeMelee = attack?.data?.description
      ?.toLowerCase()
      .includes("melee or ranged");

    // Parse reach from description like "reach 10 ft." or "reach 5 ft."
    const reachMatch = /(?:^|\s|,)reach\s+(\d+)\s*ft/i;
    const reach = parseInt(
      attack?.data?.description?.match(reachMatch)?.[1] || "5",
      10,
    );

    let modifiers = getEffectsAndModifiers(
      ["attackBonus", "attackPenalty"],
      ranged ? "ranged" : "melee",
      attack._id,
    );

    // If bloodied, look for bloodied modifiers
    const curhp = record?.data?.curhp || 0;
    const maxhp = record?.data?.hitpoints || 0;
    if (maxhp > 0 && curhp <= Math.floor(maxhp / 2)) {
      const bloodiedMods = getEffectsAndModifiers(
        ["attackBonus", "attackPenalty"],
        "bloodied",
        attack._id,
      );
      bloodiedMods.forEach((mod) => {
        if (
          !modifiers.some(
            (m) =>
              m.name === mod.name &&
              m.type === mod.type &&
              m.value === mod.value,
          )
        ) {
          modifiers.push(mod);
        }
      });
    }

    // Add the modifier to the modifiers array
    if (attackMod !== 0) {
      modifiers.push({
        name: "Attack Modifier",
        value: attackMod,
        active: true,
      });
    }

    let icon = "IconSword";
    if (ranged) {
      icon = "IconBow";
    }

    const normalRange = parseInt(attack?.data?.normalRange || "0", 10);
    const maxRange = parseInt(attack?.data?.maxRange || "0", 10);

    // If ranged, you have Disadvantage on the roll if you are within 5 feet of an enemy who can see you and doesn't have the Incapacitated condition
    // Get range to all other tokens
    let disDueToProximity = false;
    const ourToken = api.getToken();
    if (ranged && ourToken) {
      api.getOtherTokens().forEach((token) => {
        if (disDueToProximity) {
          // Short circuit if we already have disadvantage due to proximity
          return;
        }
        if (
          token?.faction !== "neutral" &&
          token?.faction !== ourToken?.faction
        ) {
          // Check if you have the Invisible condition
          const hasInvisible = (ourToken?.effects || []).some((eff) =>
            eff.name.toLowerCase().includes("invisible"),
          );
          // Check if they have incapacitated condition or are blinded
          const hasIncapacitated = (token?.effects || []).some(
            (eff) =>
              eff.name.toLowerCase().includes("incapacitated") ||
              eff.name.toLowerCase().includes("stunned") ||
              eff.name.toLowerCase().includes("paralyzed") ||
              eff.name.toLowerCase().includes("unconscious") ||
              eff.name.toLowerCase().includes("petrified") ||
              eff.name.toLowerCase().includes("dead") ||
              eff.name.toLowerCase().includes("blinded"),
          );
          if (!hasIncapacitated && !hasInvisible) {
            // Check distance
            const distance = api.getDistance(ourToken, token);
            if (distance !== undefined && distance !== null && distance <= 5) {
              disDueToProximity = true;
            }
          }
        }
      });
    }

    let damage = attack?.data?.damage || "1";

    let damageModifiers = getEffectsAndModifiers(
      ["damageBonus", "damagePenalty"],
      ranged ? "ranged" : "melee",
      attack._id,
    );
    // Get the default damage type of the attack and apply that to damage modifiers that have no type
    const damageType = getDamageType(damage);
    damageModifiers = damageModifiers.map((mod) => {
      const modType = getDamageType(mod?.value?.toString() || "");
      const type = modType === "untyped" ? mod?.type || damageType : "";
      return {
        ...mod,
        type: type,
      };
    });

    let autoCritical = modifiers.some((m) => m.value === "critical");
    // Check for crit on 19 or some other number
    const critOnMatch = /critical(\d+)/;
    const critOnMods = modifiers
      .map((m) => {
        const match = m.value.toString().match(critOnMatch);
        return match ? parseInt(match[1], 10) : null;
      })
      .filter((value) => value !== null);

    let critOn = null;
    if (critOnMods.length) {
      critOn = Math.min(...critOnMods);
    }
    // Filter these out of the modifiers array, we don't need them to be toggleable
    modifiers = modifiers.filter(
      (m) => !m.value.toString().startsWith("critical"),
    );

    const minRoll = getMinRollModifier(modifiers);
    // Filter these out of the modifiers array, we don't need them to be toggleable
    modifiers = modifiers.filter(
      (m) => !m.value.toString().startsWith("minroll"),
    );

    const targets = api.getTargets();
    targets.forEach((target) => {
      // Get calculated AC from modifiers - use if any
      const targetAc = getArmorClassForToken(target?.token);
      const targetName =
        target?.token?.identified === false
          ? target?.token?.record?.unidentifiedName
          : target?.token?.record?.name;
      const targetDistance = target?.distance || 0;

      // If this is ranged, check if it can be melee
      if (ranged && canBeMelee) {
        // And if so... check if the target is within 5 feet
        if (targetDistance <= reach) {
          // And then assume it was meant to be melee
          ranged = false;
          icon = "IconSword";
        }
      }

      // Only add the disadvantage if it's ranged and an enemy is within 5 feet
      if (ranged && disDueToProximity) {
        modifiers.push({
          name: "Enemy is Within 5 Feet",
          value: "disadvantage",
          active: true,
        });
      }

      // If the target is beyond normal range, and normal range is > 0, add a disadvantage modifier
      // and if it was greater than the max, make it apparent in the roll prompt
      if (ranged && targetDistance > maxRange && maxRange > 0) {
        modifiers.push({
          name: "Target is Beyond Max Range",
          value: "disadvantage",
          active: true,
        });
      } else if (ranged && targetDistance > normalRange && normalRange > 0) {
        modifiers.push({
          name: "Target is Beyond Normal Range",
          value: "disadvantage",
          active: true,
        });
      }

      // Get effects and modifiers for the target
      const targetEffects = getAttackModifiersForTarget(
        target?.token,
        targetDistance,
      );
      targetEffects.forEach((r) => {
        if (r.value === "critical") {
          autoCritical = true;
        } else {
          modifiers.push(r);
        }
      });

      // Get damage effects for the target
      const targetDamageEffects = getDamageEffectsForTarget(
        ourToken,
        target?.token,
      );
      targetDamageEffects.forEach((r) => {
        damageModifiers.push(r);
      });

      const diceRoll = "1d20";
      const metadata = {
        rollName: "Attack",
        attack: `${name}`,
        icon: attack?.data?.isAttack ? icon : undefined,
        portrait: attack?.data?.isAttack ? attack?.portrait : undefined,
        targetName: targetName,
        tooltip: `Attack Roll for ${name}`,
        dc: targetAc,
        damage: damage,
        damageModifiers: damageModifiers,
        autoCritical: autoCritical,
        critOn: critOn,
        minRoll: minRoll,
        tokenId: ourToken?._id,
        targetId: target?.token?._id,
        isRanged: ranged,
        animation: attack?.data?.animation?.animationName
          ? attack?.data?.animation
          : undefined,
      };
      api.promptRoll(`${name} Attack`, diceRoll, modifiers, metadata, "attack");
    });

    if (!targets.length) {
      const diceRoll = "1d20";
      const metadata = {
        rollName: "Attack",
        attack: `${name}`,
        icon: attack?.data?.isAttack ? icon : undefined,
        portrait: attack?.data?.isAttack ? attack?.portrait : undefined,
        tooltip: `Attack Roll for ${name}`,
        dc: 0,
        damage: damage,
        damageModifiers: damageModifiers,
        critOn: critOn,
        minRoll: minRoll,
        tokenId: ourToken?._id,
        isRanged: ranged,
        animation: attack?.data?.animation?.animationName
          ? attack?.data?.animation
          : undefined,
      };
      api.promptRoll(`Attack ${name}`, diceRoll, modifiers, metadata, "attack");
    }

    updateReactions();
    updateLegendaryActions();
  }

  function rollDamage(isCritical) {
    const attackDataPath = isCritical
      ? dataPath.replace(".data.rollCriticalBtn", "")
      : dataPath.replace(".data.rollDamageBtn", "");
    const attack = api.getValue(attackDataPath);

    let name = attack?.name || "New Attack";
    let ranged = attack?.data?.isRanged || false;

    let damage = attack?.data?.damage || "1";

    if (isCritical) {
      damage = doubleDamageDice(damage);
    }

    let damageModifiers = getEffectsAndModifiers(
      ["damageBonus", "damagePenalty"],
      ranged ? "ranged" : "melee",
      attack._id,
    );

    // Get damage effects for the target
    const targets = api.getTargets();
    const ourToken = api.getToken();
    targets.forEach((target) => {
      // Get damage effects for the target
      const targetDamageEffects = getDamageEffectsForTarget(
        ourToken,
        target?.token,
      );
      targetDamageEffects.forEach((r) => {
        damageModifiers.push(r);
      });
    });

    // Get the default damage type of the attack and apply that to damage modifiers that have no type
    const damageType = getDamageType(damage);
    damageModifiers = damageModifiers.map((mod) => {
      const modType = getDamageType(mod?.value?.toString() || "");
      const type = modType === "untyped" ? mod?.type || damageType : "";
      return {
        ...mod,
        value: isCritical ? doubleDamageDice(mod.value) : mod.value,
        type: type,
      };
    });

    const damageMetadata = {
      // This is so that our damage handler script can tell if it was from a critical hit
      // And is set if the Attack Roll was a critical hit, but not in the case of using the Damage Button
      critical: isCritical,
      // Header info for the damage chat message — only show for actual attacks
      attack: name,
      icon: attack?.data?.isAttack
        ? ranged
          ? "IconBow"
          : "IconSword"
        : undefined,
      portrait: attack?.data?.isAttack ? attack?.portrait : undefined,
    };

    api.promptRoll(
      `${name} Damage`,
      damage,
      damageModifiers,
      damageMetadata,
      "damage",
    );
  }

  function useAction() {
    const actionDataPath = dataPath.replace(".data.useBtn", "");
    const action = api.getValue(actionDataPath);
    const name = action?.name || "";
    const description = action?.data?.description || "";

    const uses = parseInt(action?.data?.uses || "0", 10);
    const maxUses = parseInt(action?.data?.usesPerDay || "0", 10);
    const valuesToSet = {};

    if (maxUses > 0) {
      if (uses < maxUses) {
        // Deduct one use
        valuesToSet[`${actionDataPath}.data.uses`] = uses + 1;
      }
    }

    // If this is a recharge action, add the effect
    if (action?.data?.isRecharge) {
      const tokenForRecord = api.getToken();
      // Add the Recharge Effect
      const actionName = (action?.name || "").split("(")[0].trim();
      api.addEffect(
        "Recharge",
        tokenForRecord,
        undefined,
        `${actionName} [${action?.data?.recharge}]`,
      );
    }

    if (Object.keys(valuesToSet).length > 0) {
      api.setValues(valuesToSet);
    }

    // We'll send a message with the description of the action as well as macros as relevant
    let savingThrowButtons = "";
    if (action?.data?.isSave) {
      const savingThrows = action?.data?.savingThrows || [];
      const saveDc = action?.data?.saveDC || 0;
      savingThrows.forEach((savingThrow) => {
        // Look up saves of selected tokens and prompt roll for each
        const rollSaveButton = `\`\`\`Roll_${capitalize(savingThrow)}_Save
const selectedTokens = api.getSelectedOrDroppedToken();
selectedTokens.forEach(token => {
	let saveModifiers = [];
	const modifier = token?.data?.['${savingThrow}Save'] || 0;
	saveModifiers.push({
		name: '${capitalize(savingThrow)} Save',
		value: modifier,
		active: true,
	});

	const saveMods = getEffectsAndModifiersForToken(token, ['saveBonus', 'savePenalty'], '${savingThrow}');
	saveMods.forEach(mod => {
		saveModifiers.push(mod);
	});

	const minRoll = getMinRollModifier(saveModifiers);
  // Filter these out of the modifiers array, we don't need them to be toggleable
  saveModifiers = saveModifiers.filter(m => !m.value.toString().startsWith('minroll'));

	const metadata = {
		"rollName": '${capitalize(savingThrow)} Save',
		"tooltip": '${capitalize(savingThrow)} Saving Throw',
		"dc": ${saveDc},
		"minRoll": minRoll
	}

	api.promptRollForToken(token, '${capitalize(
    savingThrow,
  )} Save', '1d20', saveModifiers, metadata, 'save');
});
\`\`\``;
        // Add the rollSaveButton to the savingThrowButtons
        savingThrowButtons += rollSaveButton + "\n";
      });
    }

    const healingButton = action?.data?.healing
      ? `\`\`\`Roll_Healing
api.promptRoll('${name} Healing', '${action?.data?.healing}', [], {}, 'healing')
\`\`\``
      : "";

    // Create macros for all effects that this action can apply
    const effects = action?.data?.effects || [];
    let effectButtons = getEffectMacrosFor(effects);

    const message = `
#### ${name}

---

${description}

---

${savingThrowButtons}
${healingButton}
${effectButtons}
`;

    api.sendMessage(message, undefined, [], []);
    updateReactions();
    updateLegendaryActions();
  }
</script>

<script>
  // Goes through the effects of the attacker and determines
  // if we need to apply any modifiers
  function getSpellAttackModifiers(spell, spellModifier) {
    // It could be a numerical modifier, or a die we are adding
    let attackModifiers = [];

    if (spell?.data?.isAttack) {
      attackModifiers.push({
        name: "Spellcasting Modifier",
        value: spellModifier,
        active: true,
      });

      // Determine if the spell is ranged or melee for modifier filtering
      const spellRange = parseInt(spell?.data?.range || "0", 10);
      let isRangedSpell = spellRange > 0;
      if (isRangedSpell && (spell?.data?.description || "").match(/melee spell attack/i)) {
        isRangedSpell = false;
      }
      const spellAttackField = isRangedSpell ? "ranged" : "melee";

      // Get general attack modifiers filtered to "spell" field
      const effectModifiers = getEffectsAndModifiers(
        ["attackBonus", "attackPenalty"],
        "spell",
      );
      // Get spell-specific attack modifiers filtered to ranged/melee
      const spellAttackEffectModifiers = getEffectsAndModifiers(
        ["spellAttackBonus", "spellAttackPenalty"],
        spellAttackField,
      );
      effectModifiers.forEach((modifier) => {
        attackModifiers.push(modifier);
      });
      spellAttackEffectModifiers.forEach((modifier) => {
        if (!attackModifiers.some((m) => m.name === modifier.name && m.value === modifier.value)) {
          attackModifiers.push(modifier);
        }
      });
    }

    return attackModifiers;
  }

  function castSpell() {
    // Get the spell by path to ensure most up-to-date value
    const spellDataPath = dataPath.replace(".data.castBtn", "");
    const spell = api.getValue(spellDataPath);

    // NPC spells are a list in a list, so we need to up one more level
    // to get to the settings for this spell list (e.g. 'actions.1.data.spells.0.data.castBtn')
    const spellActionDataPath = dataPath.replace(
      /[.]data[.]spells[.]\d+[.]data[.]castBtn/,
      ""
    );
    const spellAction = api.getValue(spellActionDataPath);

    const spellName = spell?.name || "Unknown Spell";
    const spellDescription = api.richTextToMarkdown(
      spell?.data?.description || ""
    );
    const spellIcon = spell?.portrait
      ? `![${spellName}](${assetUrl}${encodeURI(
          spell?.portrait
        )}?width=40&height=40) `
      : "";

    // Get animation
    let animation = spell?.data?.animation;

    // Get the spell caster's attack modifier for this action group
    const spellModifier = spellAction?.data?.spellMod || 0;
    const spellDC = spellAction?.data?.spellDC || 0;

    // Modifiers for Damage and Healing
    let damageModifiers = [];
    let primaryDamageType = "untyped";
    let healingModifiers = [];
    if (
      spell?.data?.damage ||
      spell?.data?.damage2 ||
      (spell?.data?.healing && spell?.data?.addAbilityHealing)
    ) {
      // Use the modifier for the configured spellcastingAbility
      const spellcastingAbility =
        spellAction?.data?.spellcastingAbility || "intelligence";
      const abilityMod = api.getValue(`data.${spellcastingAbility}Mod`) || 0;
      // Safely parse the damage type from the damage string, handling potential null values and irregular spacing
      const damageString = spell?.data?.damage || "";
      const damageParts = damageString.trim().split(/\s+/); // Split by one or more spaces
      const damageType = damageParts.length > 1 ? damageParts[1] : "untyped";
      primaryDamageType = damageType;
      if (spell?.data?.damage && spell?.data?.addAbility) {
        damageModifiers.push({
          name: capitalize(spellcastingAbility),
          type: spell?.data?.damage ? damageType : "untyped",
          value: abilityMod,
          active: true,
        });
      }
      if (spell?.data?.healing && spell?.data?.addAbilityHealing) {
        healingModifiers.push({
          name: capitalize(spellcastingAbility),
          value: abilityMod,
          active: true,
          type: spell?.data?.healing.includes("temp") ? "temp" : undefined,
        });
      }
    }

    if (spell?.data?.damage || spell?.data?.damage2) {
      // Get damage modifiers
      let moreDamageModifiers =
        spell?.data?.level?.toLowerCase() === "cantrip"
          ? getEffectsAndModifiers(
              ["cantripDamageBonus", "cantripDamagePenalty"],
              spell?.data?.isAttack ? "attack" : "all"
            )
          : getEffectsAndModifiers(
              ["spellDamageBonus", "spellDamagePenalty"],
              spell?.data?.isAttack ? "attack" : "all"
            );
      // Filter attack modifiers if not attack spell
      if (!spell?.data?.isAttack) {
        moreDamageModifiers = moreDamageModifiers.filter(
          (mod) => (mod?.field || "") !== "attack"
        );
      }
      moreDamageModifiers.forEach((modifier) => {
        damageModifiers.push({
          ...modifier,
          type: primaryDamageType,
        });
      });
    } else if (spell?.data?.healing) {
      // Get healing modifiers
      const moreHealingModifiers = getEffectsAndModifiers([
        "healingBonus",
        "healingPenalty",
      ]);
      moreHealingModifiers.forEach((modifier) => {
        healingModifiers.push({
          ...modifier,
          type: spell?.data?.healing.includes("temp") ? "temp" : undefined,
        });
      });
    }

    // Determine if we are casting a spell that ignores resistances / immunities
    const damageIgnoresResistances = damageModifiers
      .filter(
        (mod) =>
          mod.valueType === "string" &&
          mod.value.trim().toLowerCase().startsWith("ignore") &&
          mod.value.trim().toLowerCase().includes("resistance")
      )
      ?.map((mod) => mod.value.split(" ")[1])
      .join(",");
    const damageIgnoresImmunities = damageModifiers
      .filter(
        (mod) =>
          mod.valueType === "string" &&
          mod.value.trim().toLowerCase().startsWith("ignore") &&
          (mod.value.trim().toLowerCase().includes("immunities") ||
            mod.value.trim().toLowerCase().includes("immunity"))
      )
      ?.map((mod) => mod.value.split(" ")[1])
      .join(",");
    // Filter these out of the modifiers array, we don't need them to be toggleable
    damageModifiers = damageModifiers.filter(
      (m) => !m.value.toString().toLowerCase().includes("ignore")
    );

    // Spell Attack Modifiers
    const attackModifiers = getSpellAttackModifiers(spell, spellModifier);

    // Determine damage or healing based on level of spell / (or character if cantrip)
    let spellDamage = spell?.data?.damage;
    let spellAltDamage = spell?.data?.damage2;
    let spellHealing = spell?.data?.healing;

    // Mark the level we're casting at so we can fill a slot
    let spellLevel = 0;

    // Deduct spell slot or daily uses and update spell level
    const spellPrepared = spell?.data?.prepared || "prepared";
    let actualSpellLevel = spell?.data?.level || "Cantrip";
    if (actualSpellLevel === "Cantrip") {
      actualSpellLevel = "0";
    }
    actualSpellLevel = parseInt(actualSpellLevel, 10);
    if (spellPrepared === "prepared" && actualSpellLevel > 0) {
      let spellSlot =

    } else if (
      spell?.data?.prepared === "daily" &&

      let maxDailyUses = parseInt(spell?.data?.maxDailyUses, 10) || 1;

    if (spell?.data?.level === "Cantrip") {
      // Cantrip handling
