      if (npcLevel >= 5) {
        spellDamage = spell?.data?.damageCharacterLevel5 || spell?.data?.damage;
        spellAltDamage =
          spell?.data?.damage2CharacterLevel5 || spell?.data?.damage2;
      }
      if (npcLevel >= 11) {
        spellDamage =
          spell?.data?.damageCharacterLevel11 || spell?.data?.damage;
        spellAltDamage =
          spell?.data?.damage2CharacterLevel11 || spell?.data?.damage2;
      }
      if (npcLevel >= 17) {
        spellDamage =
          spell?.data?.damageCharacterLevel17 || spell?.data?.damage;
        spellAltDamage =
          spell?.data?.damage2CharacterLevel17 || spell?.data?.damage2;
      }
    } else {
      // Spell handling
      // Check if we're upcasting
      if (spellLevel === 0) {
        spellLevel =
          parseInt(spell?.data?.upcastLevel || spell?.data?.level, 10) || 0;
      }
      // Check if damage is defined at that level
      if (spellLevel >= 2) {
        spellDamage =
          spell?.data?.[`damageLevel${spellLevel}`] || spell?.data?.damage;
        spellAltDamage =
          spell?.data?.[`damage2Level${spellLevel}`] || spell?.data?.damage2;
        spellHealing =
          spell?.data?.[`healingLevel${spellLevel}`] || spell?.data?.healing;
      }
    }

    // Now that we know the spell level, go through all string modifiers and
    // replaced "Spell Level" with the actual spell level
    let levelToReplace = spellLevel;
    if (spell?.data?.level?.toLowerCase() === "cantrip") {
      levelToReplace = 0;
    }
    damageModifiers.forEach((modifier) => {
      if (modifier?.valueType?.toLowerCase() === "string") {
        modifier.value = modifier.value.replace(
          /[Ss]pell [Ll]evel/g,
          levelToReplace
        );
      }
    });
    healingModifiers.forEach((modifier) => {
      if (modifier?.valueType?.toLowerCase() === "string") {
        modifier.value = modifier.value.replace(
          /[Ss]pell [Ll]evel/g,
          levelToReplace
        );
      }
    });
    attackModifiers.forEach((modifier) => {
      if (modifier?.valueType?.toLowerCase() === "string") {
        modifier.value = modifier.value.replace(
          /[Ss]pell [Ll]evel/g,
          levelToReplace
        );
      }
    });

    // Spell range if set
    const spellRange = parseInt(spell?.data?.range || "0", 10);
    let rangedSpell = spellRange > 0;
    if (rangedSpell) {
      // If the description explicity says "make a melee spell attack" it's actually melee
      if ((spell?.data?.description || "").match(/melee spell attack/i)) {
        rangedSpell = false;
      }
    }

    // Get save info, if Save
    const savingThrow = spell?.data?.savingThrow || "dexterity"; // Default to dexterity if not set
    let saveDc = spellDC;
    // Get spell dc modifiers
    const spellDcModifiers = getEffectsAndModifiers(["spellDCBonus"]);
    saveDc += spellDcModifiers.reduce(
      (acc, mod) => acc + parseInt(mod?.value || "0", 10),
      0
    );

    // Damage Button if this is a Saving Throw Spell (Attacks have it on Attack Output)
    const saveDamageMetadata = spell?.data?.isSave
      ? {
          save: savingThrow,
          saveDc: saveDc,
          isSpell: true,
          damageIgnoresResistances,
          damageIgnoresImmunities,
          attack: spellName,

        }
      : {

          damageIgnoresResistances,
          damageIgnoresImmunities,
          attack: spellName,
          icon: "IconWand",
          portrait: spell?.portrait,

    const damageButton =
      spell?.data?.damage && spell?.data?.isAttack !== true
        ? `\`\`\`Roll_${

api.promptRoll(\`${spellName} ${

        : "";

    let altDamageButtons = "";

      altDamageButtons = getAltSpellDamageButtons(

      );

    const healingButton = spell?.data?.healing

api.promptRoll(\`${spellName} Healing\`, '${spellHealing}', ${JSON.stringify(
          healingModifiers
        )}, {}, 'healing')
\`\`\``
      : "";

    // Roll Attack Button, if Spell is an Attack, in the handler we get the targets and
    // roll for each target - DC for Attacks is the enemy's AC
    const rollAttackButton = spell?.data?.isAttack
      ? `\`\`\`Roll_Attack
const targets = api.getTargets();
const ourToken = api.getToken();
let disDueToProximity = false;
if (${rangedSpell} && ourToken) {
  api.getOtherTokens().forEach(token => {
    if (disDueToProximity) {
      // Short circuit if we already have disadvantage due to proximity
      return;
    }
    if (token?.faction !== 'neutral' && token?.faction !== ourToken?.faction) {
        // Check if you have the Invisible condition
        const hasInvisible = (ourToken?.effects || []).some((eff) =>
          eff.name.toLowerCase().includes("invisible")
        );
        // Check if they have incapacitated condition or are blinded
        const hasIncapacitated = (token?.effects || []).some(
          (eff) =>
            eff.name.toLowerCase().includes("incapacitated") ||
            eff.name.toLowerCase().includes("stunned") ||
            eff.name.toLowerCase().includes("paralyzed") ||
            eff.name.toLowerCase().includes("unconscious") ||
            eff.name.toLowerCase().includes("petrified") ||
            eff.name.toLowerCase().includes("dead") ||
            eff.name.toLowerCase().includes("blinded")
        );
        if (!hasIncapacitated && !hasInvisible) {
        // Check distance
        const distance = api.getDistance(ourToken, token);
        if (distance !== undefined && distance !== null && distance <= 5) {
          disDueToProximity = true;
        }
      }
    }
  });
}

let attackModifiers = ${JSON.stringify(attackModifiers)};

let autoCritical = attackModifiers.some(m => m.value === 'critical');

// Check for crit on 19 or some other number
const critOnMatch = /critical(\d+)/;
const critOnMods = attackModifiers
  .map(m => {
    const match = m.value.toString().match(critOnMatch);
    return match ? parseInt(match[1], 10) : null;
  })
  .filter(value => value !== null);

let critOn = null;
if (critOnMods.length) {
  critOn = Math.min(...critOnMods);
}

// Filter these out of the modifiers array, we don't need them to be toggleable
attackModifiers = attackModifiers.filter(m => !m.value.toString().startsWith('critical'));

const minRoll = getMinRollModifier(attackModifiers);
// Filter these out of the modifiers array, we don't need them to be toggleable
attackModifiers = attackModifiers.filter(
  (m) => !m.value.toString().startsWith("minroll")
);

targets.forEach(target => {
  // Get calculated AC from modifiers - use if any
  const targetAc = getArmorClassForToken(target?.token);
  const targetName = target?.token?.identified === false ? target?.token?.record?.unidentifiedName : target?.token?.record?.name;
  const targetDistance = api.getDistance(ourToken, target?.token);
  const diceRoll = '1d20';

  // If this is a ranged spell, and there are enemies within 5 feet, apply disadvantage
  if (disDueToProximity) {
    attackModifiers.push({
      name: 'Enemy is Within 5 Feet',
      value: 'disadvantage',
      active: true
    });
  }

  // Get effects and modifiers for the target
  const targetEffects = getAttackModifiersForTarget(target?.token, targetDistance);
  targetEffects.forEach(r => {
    if (r.value === "critical") {
      autoCritical = true;
    } else {
      attackModifiers.push(r);
    }
  });

  // Get damage effects for the target
  const damageModifiers = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(${JSON.stringify(
    damageModifiers
  )}));
  const targetDamageEffects = getDamageEffectsForTarget(
    ourToken,
    target?.token,
  );
  targetDamageEffects.forEach((r) => {
    damageModifiers.push(r);
  });

  const metadata = {
    "rollName": 'Attack',
    "attack": \`${spellName}\`,
    "icon": "IconWand",
    "portrait": ${JSON.stringify(spell?.portrait || "")},
    "targetName": targetName,
    "tooltip": \`Attack Roll for ${spellName}\`,
    "dc": targetAc,
    "damage": "${spellDamage}",
    "damageModifiers": damageModifiers,
    "damageIgnoresResistances": '${damageIgnoresResistances}',
    "damageIgnoresImmunities": '${damageIgnoresImmunities}',
    "autoCritical": autoCritical,
    "critOn": critOn,
    "minRoll": minRoll,
    "isSpell": true,
    "animation": ${JSON.stringify(animation)},
    "isRanged": ${rangedSpell},
    "tokenId": ourToken?._id,
    "targetId": target?.token?._id
  }
  api.promptRoll(\`${spellName}\`, \`\$\{diceRoll\}\`, attackModifiers, metadata, 'attack');
});
if (!targets.length) {
  const diceRoll = '1d20';
  const metadata = {
    "rollName": 'Attack',
    "attack": \`${spellName}\`,
    "icon": "IconWand",
    "portrait": ${JSON.stringify(spell?.portrait || "")},

    "animation": ${JSON.stringify(animation)},
    "isRanged": ${rangedSpell},
    "tokenId": ourToken?._id,
  }

  // If this is a ranged spell, and there are enemies within 5 feet, apply disadvantage
  if (disDueToProximity) {
    attackModifiers.push({
      name: 'Enemy is Within 5 Feet',
      value: 'disadvantage',
      active: true
    });
  }

  api.promptRoll(\`${spellName}\`, \`\$\{diceRoll\}\`, attackModifiers, metadata, 'attack');
}
\`\`\``
      : "";

    // Saving Throw Buttons - look up saves of selected tokens and prompt roll for each
    const possibleSavingThrows = [];
    if (spell?.data?.isSave) {
      if (spell?.data?.savingThrow) {
        possibleSavingThrows.push(spell?.data?.savingThrow);
      }
      if (spell?.data?.additionalSavingThrows) {
        spell?.data?.additionalSavingThrows.forEach((savingThrow) => {
          possibleSavingThrows.push(savingThrow);
        });
      }
    }
    const rollSaveButtons = possibleSavingThrows
      .map((savingThrow) => {
        return `\`\`\`Roll_${capitalize(savingThrow)}_Save
const selectedTokens = api.getSelectedOrDroppedToken();
selectedTokens.forEach(token => {
  let saveModifiers = [];
  const modifier = token?.data?.['${savingThrow}Save'] || 0;
  saveModifiers.push({
    name: '${capitalize(savingThrow)} Save',
    value: modifier,
    active: true,
  });

  const saveMods = getEffectsAndModifiersForToken(token, ['saveBonus', 'savePenalty'], '${savingThrow}');
  // Also get modifiers specific to spells
  const spellSaveMods = getEffectsAndModifiersForToken(token, ['saveBonus', 'savePenalty'], 'spell');
  
  // Filter out duplicates based on name, value, type, and active status
  const allMods = [...saveMods, ...spellSaveMods].filter((mod, index, array) => {
    return index === array.findIndex(m => 
      m.name === mod.name && 
      m.value === mod.value && 
      m.modifierType === mod.modifierType && 
      m.active === mod.active
    );
  });
  
  allMods.forEach(mod => {
    saveModifiers.push(mod);
  });

  const minRoll = getMinRollModifier(saveModifiers);
  // Filter these out of the modifiers array, we don't need them to be toggleable
  saveModifiers = saveModifiers.filter(m => !m.value.toString().startsWith('minroll'));

  const metadata = {
    "rollName": '${capitalize(savingThrow)} Save',
    "tooltip": '${capitalize(savingThrow)} Saving Throw',
    "dc": ${saveDc},
    "minRoll": minRoll
  }

  api.promptRollForToken(token, '${capitalize(
    savingThrow
  )} Save', '1d20', saveModifiers, metadata, 'save');
});
\`\`\``;
      })
      .join("\n");

    // Create macros for all effects that this spell can apply
    const effects = spell?.data?.effects || [];
    let effectButtons = getEffectMacrosFor(effects);

    const message = `
#### ${spellIcon}${spellName}

---
${spellDescription}

---
${rollAttackButton}
${rollSaveButtons}
${damageButton}
${altDamageButtons}
${healingButton}
${effectButtons}
`;

    const castingTime = spell?.data?.castingTime;
    const range = spell?.data?.range;
    let duration = spell?.data?.duration || "";
    // If there is a higher level duration, use that instead
    if (spellLevel >= 2) {
      duration = spell?.data?.[`durationLevel${spellLevel}`] || duration;
    }
    const hasConcentration = duration
      ?.toLowerCase()
      .startsWith("concentration");
    const durationTag = duration.replace("Concentration, ", "").trim();

    let components = spell?.data?.components;
    if (components) {
      // First clean up any extra spaces around commas
      components = components.trim().replace(/\s*,\s*/g, ",");
      // Split on V, S, M, or F, ignoring case
      components = components.split(/,(?=[VSMF])/i);
      components = components.map((component) => {
        const trimmedComponent = component.trim().toLowerCase(); // Trim and convert to lower case
        if (trimmedComponent === "v") {
          return "Verbal";
        } else if (trimmedComponent === "s") {
          return "Somatic";
        } else if (trimmedComponent === "m") {
          return "Material";
        } else if (trimmedComponent === "f") {
          return "Focus";
        } else if (trimmedComponent.match(/^m\s*\(/i)) {
          // Check if material component has a cost
          return trimmedComponent.toLowerCase().includes("worth")
            ? "Material $"
            : "Material";
        }
        return component.trim(); // Return the trimmed component if no match
      });
    }

    const tags = [
      {
        tooltip: "Cast a Spell",
        name: "Spell",
      },
    ];

    if (castingTime) {
      tags.push({
        tooltip: "Casting Time",
        name: castingTime.includes(",")
          ? castingTime.split(",")[0]
          : castingTime,
      });
    }

    if (range) {
      tags.push({
        tooltip: "Range",
        name: range,
      });
    }

    if (hasConcentration) {
      tags.push({
        tooltip: "This Spell Requires Concentration",
        name: "Concentration",
      });
    }

    if (durationTag) {
      tags.push({
        tooltip: "Duration",
        name: durationTag,
      });
    }

    if (components && Array.isArray(components) && components.length > 0) {
      components.forEach((component) => {
        tags.push({
          tooltip: component.includes("$")
            ? "Spell Components (with Cost Requirement)"
            : "Spell Components",
          name: component,
        });
      });
    }

    let lostConcentrationOn = "";
    if (hasConcentration) {
      // Check for existing Concentration effect
      const tokenForRecord = api.getToken();
      const effects = tokenForRecord?.effects || [];
      const hasEffect = effects.find(
        (effect) => effect?.name?.toLowerCase() === "concentration"
      );
      if (tokenForRecord) {
        const effectValue = spellName;
        const durationSeconds = getDurationInSeconds(duration);

        // If there's an existing concentration effect, remove it first
        if (hasEffect) {
          // Old spell name
          const oldValues = tokenForRecord?.effectValues || {};
          if (oldValues[hasEffect?._id]) {
            lostConcentrationOn = oldValues[hasEffect?._id];
          }

          // Remove old concentration effect, then add new one in callback
          api.removeEffectById(hasEffect._id, tokenForRecord, () => {
            // Get fresh record after removal before adding new effect
            api.getRecord(record.recordType, record._id, (updatedRecord) => {
              api.addEffect(
                "Concentration",
                updatedRecord,
                durationSeconds,
                effectValue
              );
            });
          });
        } else {
          // No existing concentration, just add the new one
          api.addEffect(
            "Concentration",
            tokenForRecord,
            durationSeconds,
            effectValue
          );
        }
      }
    }

    api.sendMessage(message, undefined, [], tags);

    if (lostConcentrationOn) {
      api.sendMessage(
        `Lost concentration on ${lostConcentrationOn}.`,
        undefined,
        [],
        []
      );
    }

    if (animation === undefined || animation === null) {
      // Try to guess an animation based on the spell name and damage
      animation = getAnimationFor({
        abilityName: spellName,
        damage: spellDamage,
        healing: spellHealing,
        isRanged: rangedSpell,
      });
    }

    // If not an attack and there is an animation, play it
    if (!rollAttackButton && animation) {
      // Get targets if needed
      const ourToken = api.getToken();
      const targets = api.getTargets();
      const animationProps = {
        ...animation,
        originToken: ourToken,
      };
      if (ourToken && targets.length > 0) {
        targets.forEach((target) => {
          if (target.token) {
            api.playAnimation(animation, ourToken._id, target.token._id);
          }
        });
      } else if (ourToken) {
        api.playAnimation(animation, ourToken._id);
      }
    }

    // If this is a reaction spell, we update the amount used by 1 up to the max
    if (dataPath.includes("data.reactions")) {
      const maxReactions = record?.data?.maxReactions || 1;
      const usedReactions = record?.data?.usedReactions || 0;
      if (usedReactions < maxReactions) {
        api.setValue("data.usedReactions", usedReactions + 1);
      }
    }

    // If this spellcasting action has usesPerDay, we update the amount used by 1 up to the max
    const usesPerDay = spellAction?.data?.usesPerDay || 0;
    if (usesPerDay > 0) {
      const usedUsesPerDay = spellAction?.data?.uses || 0;
      if (usedUsesPerDay < usesPerDay) {
        api.setValue(`${spellActionDataPath}.data.uses`, usedUsesPerDay + 1);
      }
    }
  }

  // Returns the options for upcasting a spell
  function getLevelOptions() {
    const iconButtonOptions = [
      { icon: "IconCircleNumber1", label: "Level 1", value: 1 },
      { icon: "IconCircleNumber2", label: "Level 2", value: 2 },
      { icon: "IconCircleNumber3", label: "Level 3", value: 3 },
      { icon: "IconCircleNumber4", label: "Level 4", value: 4 },
      { icon: "IconCircleNumber5", label: "Level 5", value: 5 },
      { icon: "IconCircleNumber6", label: "Level 6", value: 6 },
      { icon: "IconCircleNumber7", label: "Level 7", value: 7 },
      { icon: "IconCircleNumber8", label: "Level 8", value: 8 },
      { icon: "IconCircleNumber9", label: "Level 9", value: 9 },
    ];

    const spellLevel = parseInt(value?.data?.level, 10) || 0; // Default to 0 if no level is set
    return iconButtonOptions.filter((option) => option.value >= spellLevel);
  }

  function toggleDaily() {
    const prepared = value;
    const spell = api.getValue(dataPath.replace(".data.prepared", ""));
    // We're in a list, so we need to use the data path to the fields metadata
    const dataPathToHideDaily = dataPath.replace(
      ".data.prepared",
      ".fields.maxDailyUses.hidden"
    );
    const dataPathToHideCounter = dataPath.replace(
      ".data.prepared",
      ".fields.dailyUses.hidden"
    );
    const dataPathToHideUpcast = dataPath.replace(
      ".data.prepared",
      ".fields.upcastLevel.hidden"
    );
    const valuesToSet = {};
    if (prepared === "daily") {
      valuesToSet[dataPathToHideDaily] = false;
      valuesToSet[dataPathToHideCounter] = false;
    } else if (prepared === "will") {
      valuesToSet[dataPathToHideDaily] = true;
      valuesToSet[dataPathToHideCounter] = true;
    } else {
      valuesToSet[dataPathToHideDaily] = true;
      valuesToSet[dataPathToHideCounter] = true;
    }

    // Show the upcast level button if it's not a cantrip
    if (spell?.data?.level?.toLowerCase() !== "cantrip") {
      valuesToSet[dataPathToHideUpcast] = false;
    } else {
      valuesToSet[dataPathToHideUpcast] = true;
    }

    api.setValues(valuesToSet);
  }
</script>

            options='[{"icon": "IconCircleLetterW", "label": "At Will", "value": "will"}, {"icon": "IconCircleLetterD", "label": "Daily (Has Uses Per Day)", "value": "daily"}, {"icon": "IconWand", "label": "Prepared (Uses Spell Slots)", "value": "prepared"}]'
          >

        <namefield
          size="xs"

          variant="unstyled"

        ></namefield>
        <stringfield

        <stringfield
          size="xs"

        <div style="margin-top: auto; margin-bottom: auto">
          <!-- For NPCs we don't want to show the upcast level button unless they use spell slots -->
          <iconbutton
            hidden="true"

            getoptions="return getLevelOptions();"

<script>
  // Goes through the effects of the attacker and determiners
  // if we need to apply any modifiers
  function getSpellAttackModifiers(spell) {
    // It could be a numerical modifier, or a die we are adding
    let attackModifiers = [];

    const spellModBonus = parseInt(
      api.getValue("data.spellModBonus") || "0",
      10,
    );

    if (spell?.data?.isAttack) {
      const attackAbility = spell?.data?.ability || "strength";
      const attackAbilityMod = parseInt(
        api.getValue(`data.${attackAbility}Mod`) || "0",
        10,
      );
      // Add proficiency bonus to attack modifier
      const proficiencyBonus =
        api.getValue("data.proficiencyBonus") !== undefined
          ? parseInt(api.getValue("data.proficiencyBonus"), 10)
          : 2;
      attackModifiers.push({
        name: capitalize(attackAbility),
        value: attackAbilityMod,
        active: true,
      });
      attackModifiers.push({
        name: "Spellcasting Proficiency",
        value: proficiencyBonus,
        active: true,
      });
      if (spellModBonus > 0) {
        attackModifiers.push({
          name: "Additional Spell Modifier Bonus",
          value: spellModBonus,
          active: true,
        });
      }
    }

    // Determine if the spell is ranged or melee for modifier filtering
    const spellRange = parseInt(spell?.data?.range || "0", 10);
    let isRangedSpell = spellRange > 0;
    if (isRangedSpell && (spell?.data?.description || "").match(/melee spell attack/i)) {
      isRangedSpell = false;
    }
    const spellAttackField = isRangedSpell ? "ranged" : "melee";

    // Get general attack modifiers filtered to "spell" field
    const effectModifiers = getEffectsAndModifiers(
      ["attackBonus", "attackPenalty"],
      "spell",
    );
    // Get spell-specific attack modifiers filtered to ranged/melee
    const spellAttackEffectModifiers = getEffectsAndModifiers(
      ["spellAttackBonus", "spellAttackPenalty"],
      spellAttackField,
    );
    effectModifiers.forEach((modifier) => {
      attackModifiers.push(modifier);
    });
    spellAttackEffectModifiers.forEach((modifier) => {
      if (!attackModifiers.some((m) => m.name === modifier.name && m.value === modifier.value)) {
        attackModifiers.push(modifier);
      }
    });

    return attackModifiers;
  }

  function castSpell() {
    // Get the spell by path to ensure most up-to-date value
    const spellDataPath = dataPath.replace(".data.castBtn", "");
    const spell = api.getValue(spellDataPath);

    const spellName = spell?.name || "Unknown Spell";
    const spellDescription = api.richTextToMarkdown(
      spell?.data?.description || "",
    );
    const spellIcon = spell?.portrait
      ? `![${spellName}](${assetUrl}${encodeURI(
          spell?.portrait,
        )}?width=40&height=40) `
      : "";

    // Get and additional modifiers from spell caster settings
    const spellDCBonus = parseInt(api.getValue("data.spellDCBonus") || "0", 10);

    // Get animation
    let animation = spell?.data?.animation;

    // Modifiers for Damage and Healing
    let damageModifiers = [];
    let primaryDamageType = "untyped";
    let healingModifiers = [];
    if (
      spell?.data?.damage ||
      (spell?.data?.healing && spell?.data?.addAbilityHealing)
    ) {
      // Get the ability score modifier for the spell
      const ability = spell?.data?.ability || "strength";
      const abilityMod = api.getValue(`data.${ability}Mod`) || 0;
      // Safely parse the damage type from the damage string, handling potential null values and irregular spacing
      const damageString = spell?.data?.damage || "";
      const damageParts = damageString.trim().split(/\s+/); // Split by one or more spaces
      const damageType = damageParts.length > 1 ? damageParts[1] : "untyped";
      primaryDamageType = damageType;
      if (spell?.data?.damage && spell?.data?.addAbility) {
        damageModifiers.push({
          name: capitalize(ability),
          type: spell?.data?.damage ? primaryDamageType : "untyped",
          value: abilityMod,
          active: true,
        });
      }
      if (spell?.data?.healing && spell?.data?.addAbilityHealing) {
        healingModifiers.push({
          name: capitalize(ability),
          type: spell?.data?.healing.includes("temp") ? "temp" : undefined,
          value: abilityMod,
          active: true,
        });
      }
    }

    if (spell?.data?.damage || spell?.data?.damage2) {
      // Get damage modifiers
      let moreDamageModifiers =
        spell?.data?.level?.toLowerCase() === "cantrip"
          ? getEffectsAndModifiers(
              ["cantripDamageBonus", "cantripDamagePenalty"],
              spell?.data?.isAttack ? "attack" : "all",
            )
          : getEffectsAndModifiers(
              ["spellDamageBonus", "spellDamagePenalty"],
              spell?.data?.isAttack ? "attack" : "all",
            );
      // Filter attack modifiers if not attack spell
      if (!spell?.data?.isAttack) {
        moreDamageModifiers = moreDamageModifiers.filter(
          (mod) => (mod?.field || "") !== "attack",
        );
      }
      moreDamageModifiers.forEach((modifier) => {
        damageModifiers.push({
          ...modifier,
          // Only set type if modifer does not have it
          type: modifier.value.toString().split(" ")?.[1]
            ? ""
            : primaryDamageType,
        });
      });
    } else if (spell?.data?.healing) {
      // Get healing modifiers
      const moreHealingModifiers = getEffectsAndModifiers([
        "healingBonus",
        "healingPenalty",
      ]);
      moreHealingModifiers.forEach((modifier) => {
        healingModifiers.push({
          ...modifier,
          type: spell?.data?.healing.includes("temp") ? "temp" : undefined,
        });
      });
    }

    // Determine if we are casting a spell that ignores resistances / immunities
    const damageIgnoresResistances = damageModifiers
      .filter(
        (mod) =>
          mod.valueType === "string" &&
          mod.value.trim().toLowerCase().startsWith("ignore") &&
          mod.value.trim().toLowerCase().includes("resistance"),
      )
      ?.map((mod) => mod.value.split(" ")[1])
      .join(",");
    const damageIgnoresImmunities = damageModifiers
      .filter(
        (mod) =>
          mod.valueType === "string" &&
          mod.value.trim().toLowerCase().startsWith("ignore") &&
          (mod.value.trim().toLowerCase().includes("immunities") ||
            mod.value.trim().toLowerCase().includes("immunity")),
      )
      ?.map((mod) => mod.value.split(" ")[1])
      .join(",");
    // Filter these out of the modifiers array, we don't need them to be toggleable
    damageModifiers = damageModifiers.filter(
      (m) => !m.value.toString().toLowerCase().includes("ignore"),
    );

    // Spell Attack Modifiers
    let attackModifiers = getSpellAttackModifiers(spell);

    // Determine damage or healing based on level of spell / (or character if cantrip)
    let spellDamage = spell?.data?.damage;
    let spellAltDamage = spell?.data?.damage2;
    let spellHealing = spell?.data?.healing;

    // Mark the level we're casting at so we can fill a slot
    let spellLevel = 0;

    // Deduct spell slot or daily uses and update spell level
    const spellPrepared = spell?.data?.prepared || "prepared";
    let actualSpellLevel = spell?.data?.level || "Cantrip";
    if (actualSpellLevel === "Cantrip") {
      actualSpellLevel = "0";
    }
    actualSpellLevel = parseInt(actualSpellLevel, 10);
    // If spell has no level set, default to the level of the list it's in (e.g. data.spells3 → 3)
    if (actualSpellLevel === 0) {
      const listLevelMatch = spellDataPath.match(/spells(\d)/);
      if (listLevelMatch) {
        actualSpellLevel = parseInt(listLevelMatch[1], 10);
      }
    }
    if (spellPrepared === "prepared" && actualSpellLevel > 0) {
      let spellSlot =
        parseInt(spell?.data?.upcastLevel || `${actualSpellLevel}`, 10) || 1;

      // Spell Point costs by level (2014 variant rule)
      const SPELL_POINT_COSTS = {
        1: 2,
        2: 3,
        3: 5,
        4: 6,
        5: 7,
        6: 9,
        7: 10,
        8: 11,
        9: 13,
      };

      // Check if using spell points variant
      const useSpellPointsSetting = record?.data?.useSpellPoints;
      const spellPointsCurrent = parseInt(record?.data?.spellPoints || "0", 10);
      const numSpellPoints = parseInt(record?.data?.numSpellPoints || "0", 10);
      const spellPointsCost = SPELL_POINT_COSTS[spellSlot] || 0;
      const hasSpellPointsPool = numSpellPoints > 0;

      // For 6th+ level spell points, check once-per-long-rest tracking
      let canUseSpellPointsForLevel = true;
      if (spellSlot >= 6 && hasSpellPointsPool) {
        const slotUsed = record?.data?.[`spellPointSlot${spellSlot}Used`];
        if (slotUsed) {
          canUseSpellPointsForLevel = false;
        }
      }

      let useSpellPoints = false;

      // Determine if we are using a spell slot or a pact magic slot
      let fieldToUse = "";
      let maxField = "";

      // Pact Magic Slots available
      const numPactMagicAvail1 =
        parseInt(record?.data?.numPactMagic1 || "0", 10) -
        parseInt(record?.data?.pactMagic1 || "0", 10);
      const numPactMagicAvail2 =
        parseInt(record?.data?.numPactMagic2 || "0", 10) -
        parseInt(record?.data?.pactMagic2 || "0", 10);
      const numPactMagicAvail3 =
        parseInt(record?.data?.numPactMagic3 || "0", 10) -
        parseInt(record?.data?.pactMagic3 || "0", 10);
      const numPactMagicAvail4 =
        parseInt(record?.data?.numPactMagic4 || "0", 10) -
        parseInt(record?.data?.pactMagic4 || "0", 10);
      const numPactMagicAvail5 =
        parseInt(record?.data?.numPactMagic5 || "0", 10) -
        parseInt(record?.data?.pactMagic5 || "0", 10);
      const numPactMagicAvail6 =
        parseInt(record?.data?.numPactMagic6 || "0", 10) -
        parseInt(record?.data?.pactMagic6 || "0", 10);
      const numPactMagicAvail7 =
        parseInt(record?.data?.numPactMagic7 || "0", 10) -
        parseInt(record?.data?.pactMagic7 || "0", 10);
      const numPactMagicAvail8 =
        parseInt(record?.data?.numPactMagic8 || "0", 10) -
        parseInt(record?.data?.pactMagic8 || "0", 10);
      const numPactMagicAvail9 =
        parseInt(record?.data?.numPactMagic9 || "0", 10) -
        parseInt(record?.data?.pactMagic9 || "0", 10);

      // Spell Slots available
      const numSpellSlots1Avail =
        parseInt(record?.data?.numSpellSlots1 || "0", 10) -
        parseInt(record?.data?.spellSlots1 || "0", 10);
      const numSpellSlots2Avail =
        parseInt(record?.data?.numSpellSlots2 || "0", 10) -
        parseInt(record?.data?.spellSlots2 || "0", 10);
      const numSpellSlots3Avail =
        parseInt(record?.data?.numSpellSlots3 || "0", 10) -
        parseInt(record?.data?.spellSlots3 || "0", 10);
      const numSpellSlots4Avail =
        parseInt(record?.data?.numSpellSlots4 || "0", 10) -
        parseInt(record?.data?.spellSlots4 || "0", 10);
      const numSpellSlots5Avail =
        parseInt(record?.data?.numSpellSlots5 || "0", 10) -
        parseInt(record?.data?.spellSlots5 || "0", 10);
      const numSpellSlots6Avail =
        parseInt(record?.data?.numSpellSlots6 || "0", 10) -
        parseInt(record?.data?.spellSlots6 || "0", 10);
      const numSpellSlots7Avail =
        parseInt(record?.data?.numSpellSlots7 || "0", 10) -
        parseInt(record?.data?.spellSlots7 || "0", 10);
      const numSpellSlots8Avail =
        parseInt(record?.data?.numSpellSlots8 || "0", 10) -
        parseInt(record?.data?.spellSlots8 || "0", 10);
      const numSpellSlots9Avail =
        parseInt(record?.data?.numSpellSlots9 || "0", 10) -
        parseInt(record?.data?.spellSlots9 || "0", 10);

      const slotAvailByLevel = [
        0, // index 0 unused
        numSpellSlots1Avail,
        numSpellSlots2Avail,
        numSpellSlots3Avail,
        numSpellSlots4Avail,
        numSpellSlots5Avail,
        numSpellSlots6Avail,
        numSpellSlots7Avail,
        numSpellSlots8Avail,
        numSpellSlots9Avail,
      ];

      const hasPactAvailable =
        numPactMagicAvail1 > 0 ||
        numPactMagicAvail2 > 0 ||
        numPactMagicAvail3 > 0 ||
        numPactMagicAvail4 > 0 ||
        numPactMagicAvail5 > 0 ||
        numPactMagicAvail6 > 0 ||
        numPactMagicAvail7 > 0 ||
        numPactMagicAvail8 > 0 ||
        numPactMagicAvail9 > 0;

      // Check if there's a spell slot available at the casting level or higher
      let hasSlotAtLevel = false;
      for (let i = spellSlot; i <= 9; i++) {
        if (slotAvailByLevel[i] > 0) {
          hasSlotAtLevel = true;
          break;
        }
      }

      // Determine resource to use: spell points > pact magic > spell slots (based on toggles)
      if (
        useSpellPointsSetting &&
        hasSpellPointsPool &&
        spellPointsCurrent >= spellPointsCost &&
        canUseSpellPointsForLevel
      ) {
        // Spell Points toggle is ON and we can afford it
        useSpellPoints = true;
      } else if (
        hasPactAvailable &&
        (record?.data?.usePactMagic ||
          (!hasSlotAtLevel && !useSpellPointsSetting))
      ) {
        // Pact Magic: use if toggle ON, or if no spell slots and not using spell points
        const availablePactSlots = [
          numPactMagicAvail1,
          numPactMagicAvail2,
          numPactMagicAvail3,
          numPactMagicAvail4,
          numPactMagicAvail5,
          numPactMagicAvail6,
          numPactMagicAvail7,
          numPactMagicAvail8,
          numPactMagicAvail9,
        ];

        const lowestPactMagicIndex = availablePactSlots.findIndex(
          (pactMagic) => pactMagic > 0,
        );
        const lowestPactMagic = lowestPactMagicIndex + 1;

        if (lowestPactMagic > 0 && actualSpellLevel <= lowestPactMagic) {
          spellSlot = lowestPactMagic;
          fieldToUse = `pactMagic${lowestPactMagic}`;
          maxField = `numPactMagic${lowestPactMagic}`;
        }
      } else if (hasSlotAtLevel && !useSpellPointsSetting) {
        // Use spell slots — find lowest available slot at or above the casting level
        for (let i = spellSlot; i <= 9; i++) {
          if (slotAvailByLevel[i] > 0) {
            spellSlot = i;
            break;
          }
        }
        fieldToUse = `spellSlots${spellSlot}`;
        maxField = `numSpellSlots${spellSlot}`;
      } else if (hasPactAvailable) {
        // Fall back to pact magic
        const availablePactSlots = [
          numPactMagicAvail1,
          numPactMagicAvail2,
          numPactMagicAvail3,
          numPactMagicAvail4,
          numPactMagicAvail5,
          numPactMagicAvail6,
          numPactMagicAvail7,
          numPactMagicAvail8,
          numPactMagicAvail9,
        ];

        const lowestPactMagicIndex = availablePactSlots.findIndex(
          (pactMagic) => pactMagic > 0,
        );
        const lowestPactMagic = lowestPactMagicIndex + 1;

        if (lowestPactMagic > 0 && actualSpellLevel <= lowestPactMagic) {
          spellSlot = lowestPactMagic;
          fieldToUse = `pactMagic${lowestPactMagic}`;
          maxField = `numPactMagic${lowestPactMagic}`;
        }
      }

      // Bail out if we have no resources at all
      if (!useSpellPoints && !fieldToUse) {
        let reason = "";
        if (
          useSpellPointsSetting &&
          hasSpellPointsPool &&
          !canUseSpellPointsForLevel
        ) {
          reason = `Already used a level ${spellSlot} spell via spell points this long rest`;
        } else if (
          useSpellPointsSetting &&
          hasSpellPointsPool &&
          spellPointsCurrent < spellPointsCost
        ) {
          reason = `Not enough spell points (need ${spellPointsCost}, have ${spellPointsCurrent})`;
        } else if (useSpellPointsSetting && hasSpellPointsPool) {
          reason = `No spell points available`;
        } else if (hasPactAvailable) {
          reason = `No pact magic slots of high enough level`;
        } else {
          const resources = [];
          if (useSpellPointsSetting) resources.push("spell points");
          if (!useSpellPointsSetting) resources.push("spell slots");
          if (hasPactAvailable) resources.push("pact magic");
          reason = `No ${resources.join(" or ")} available`;
        }
        api.showNotification(
          `${reason} to cast ${spellName}.`,
          "red",
          "Cannot Cast Spell",
        );
        return;
      }

      spellLevel = spellSlot;

      if (useSpellPoints) {
        // Deduct spell points
        api.setValue("data.spellPoints", spellPointsCurrent - spellPointsCost);
        // For 6th+ level, mark the slot as used for this long rest
        if (spellSlot >= 6) {
          api.setValue(`data.spellPointSlot${spellSlot}Used`, true);
        }
      } else {
        // Use the spell slot or pact magic slot
        let numSpellSlots = parseInt(
          api.getValue(`data.${fieldToUse}`) || "0",
          10,
        );
        let numMaxSpellSlots = parseInt(
          api.getValue(`data.${maxField}`) || "0",
          10,
        );

        if (numSpellSlots < numMaxSpellSlots) {
          api.setValue(`data.${fieldToUse}`, numSpellSlots + 1);
        }
      }
    } else if (spell?.data?.prepared === "daily") {
      let dailyUses = parseInt(spell?.data?.dailyUses, 10) || 0;
      let maxDailyUses = parseInt(spell?.data?.maxDailyUses, 10) || 1;
      if (dailyUses < maxDailyUses) {
        const dataPathToDaily = dataPath.replace(
          ".data.castBtn",
          ".data.dailyUses",
        );
        api.setValue(dataPathToDaily, dailyUses + 1);
      }
    }

    if (spell?.data?.level === "Cantrip") {
      // Cantrip handling
      // Get the character's level
      const characterLevel = parseInt(api.getValue("data.level") || "1", 10);
      if (characterLevel >= 5) {
        spellDamage = spell?.data?.damageCharacterLevel5 || spell?.data?.damage;
        spellAltDamage =
          spell?.data?.damage2CharacterLevel5 || spell?.data?.damage2;
      }
      if (characterLevel >= 11) {
        spellDamage =
          spell?.data?.damageCharacterLevel11 || spell?.data?.damage;
        spellAltDamage =
          spell?.data?.damage2CharacterLevel11 || spell?.data?.damage2;
      }
      if (characterLevel >= 17) {
        spellDamage =
          spell?.data?.damageCharacterLevel17 || spell?.data?.damage;
        spellAltDamage =
          spell?.data?.damage2CharacterLevel17 || spell?.data?.damage2;
      }
    } else {
      // Spell handling
      // Check if we're upcasting
      if (spellLevel === 0) {
        spellLevel =
          parseInt(spell?.data?.upcastLevel || spell?.data?.level, 10) || 0;
      }
      // Check if damage is defined at that level
      if (spellLevel >= 2) {
        spellDamage =
          spell?.data?.[`damageLevel${spellLevel}`] || spell?.data?.damage;
        spellAltDamage =
          spell?.data?.[`damage2Level${spellLevel}`] || spell?.data?.damage2;
        spellHealing =
          spell?.data?.[`healingLevel${spellLevel}`] || spell?.data?.healing;
      }
    }

    // Now that we know the spell level, go through all string modifiers and
    // replaced "Spell Level" with the actual spell level
    let levelToReplace = spellLevel;
    if (spell?.data?.level?.toLowerCase() === "cantrip") {
      levelToReplace = 0;
    }
    damageModifiers.forEach((modifier) => {
      if (modifier?.valueType?.toLowerCase() === "string") {
        modifier.value = modifier.value.replace(
          /[Ss]pell [Ll]evel/g,
          levelToReplace,
        );
      }
    });
    healingModifiers.forEach((modifier) => {
      if (modifier?.valueType?.toLowerCase() === "string") {
        modifier.value = modifier.value.replace(
          /[Ss]pell [Ll]evel/g,
          levelToReplace,
        );
      }
    });
    attackModifiers.forEach((modifier) => {
      if (modifier?.valueType?.toLowerCase() === "string") {
        modifier.value = modifier.value.replace(
          /[Ss]pell [Ll]evel/g,
          levelToReplace,
        );
      }
    });

    // If attackMod is set, use that instead
    const attackModOverride = spell?.data?.attackMod;
    if (attackModOverride !== undefined && attackModOverride > 0) {
      attackModifiers = [
        {
          name: "Spell Attack Modifier",
          value: attackModOverride,
          active: true,
        },
      ];
    }

    // Spell range if set
    const spellRange = parseInt(spell?.data?.range || "0", 10);
    let rangedSpell = spellRange > 0;
    if (rangedSpell) {
      // If the description explicity says "make a melee spell attack" it's actually melee
      if ((spell?.data?.description || "").match(/melee spell attack/i)) {
        rangedSpell = false;
      }
    }

    // Get save info, if Save
    const savingThrow = spell?.data?.savingThrow || "dexterity"; // Default to dexterity if not set
    // Spell Save DC is 8 + Spellcasting Ability Modifier + Proficiency Bonus (We assume they are proficient)
    const spellcastingAbility = spell?.data?.ability || "intelligence";
    const spellcastingAbilityMod =
      api.getValue(`data.${spellcastingAbility}Mod`) || 0;
    const proficiencyBonus =
      api.getValue("data.proficiencyBonus") !== undefined
        ? api.getValue("data.proficiencyBonus")
        : 2;
    let saveDc =
      8 +
      parseInt(spellcastingAbilityMod, 10) +
      parseInt(proficiencyBonus, 10) +
      spellDCBonus;
    // If saveDc (the override) is set, use that instead
    const saveDcOverride = spell?.data?.saveDc;
    if (saveDcOverride !== undefined && saveDcOverride > 0) {
      saveDc = saveDcOverride;
    }
    // Get spell dc modifiers
    const spellDcModifiers = getEffectsAndModifiers(["spellDCBonus"]);
    saveDc += spellDcModifiers.reduce(
      (acc, mod) => acc + parseInt(mod?.value || "0", 10),
      0,
    );

    // Damage Button if this is a Saving Throw Spell (Attacks have it on Attack Output)
    const saveDamageMetadata = spell?.data?.isSave
      ? {
          save: savingThrow,
          saveDc: saveDc,
          isSpell: true,
          damageIgnoresResistances,
          damageIgnoresImmunities,
          attack: spellName,
          icon: "IconWand",
          portrait: spell?.portrait,
        }
      : {
          isSpell: true,
          damageIgnoresResistances,
          damageIgnoresImmunities,
          attack: spellName,
          icon: "IconWand",
          portrait: spell?.portrait,
        };
    const damageButton =
      spell?.data?.damage && spell?.data?.isAttack !== true
        ? `\`\`\`Roll_${
            primaryDamageType !== "untyped"
              ? capitalize(primaryDamageType)
              : "Spell"
          }_Damage
  api.promptRoll(\`${spellName} ${
    primaryDamageType !== "untyped" ? capitalize(primaryDamageType) : "Spell"
  } Damage\`, '${spellDamage}', ${JSON.stringify(
    damageModifiers,
  )}, ${JSON.stringify(saveDamageMetadata)}, 'damage')
  \`\`\``
        : "";

    let altDamageButtons = "";
    if (spellAltDamage) {
      altDamageButtons = getAltSpellDamageButtons(
        spell,
        spellAltDamage,
        saveDamageMetadata,
        spellLevel,
      );
    }

    const healingButton = spell?.data?.healing
      ? `\`\`\`Roll_Healing
  api.promptRoll(\`${spellName} Healing\`, '${spellHealing}', ${JSON.stringify(
    healingModifiers,
  )}, {}, 'healing')
  \`\`\``
      : "";

    // Roll Attack Button, if Spell is an Attack, in the handler we get the targets and
    // roll for each target - DC for Attacks is the enemy's AC
    const rollAttackButton = spell?.data?.isAttack
      ? `\`\`\`Roll_Attack
  const targets = api.getTargets();
  const ourToken = api.getToken();
  let disDueToProximity = false;
  if (${rangedSpell} && ourToken) {
    api.getOtherTokens().forEach(token => {
      if (disDueToProximity) {
        // Short circuit if we already have disadvantage due to proximity
        return;
      }
      if (token?.faction !== 'neutral' && token?.faction !== ourToken?.faction) {
        // Check if you have the Invisible condition
        const hasInvisible = (ourToken?.effects || []).some((eff) =>
          eff.name.toLowerCase().includes("invisible")
        );
        // Check if they have incapacitated condition or are blinded
        const hasIncapacitated = (token?.effects || []).some(
          (eff) =>
            eff.name.toLowerCase().includes("incapacitated") ||
            eff.name.toLowerCase().includes("stunned") ||
            eff.name.toLowerCase().includes("paralyzed") ||
            eff.name.toLowerCase().includes("unconscious") ||
            eff.name.toLowerCase().includes("petrified") ||
            eff.name.toLowerCase().includes("dead") ||
            eff.name.toLowerCase().includes("blinded")
        );
        if (!hasIncapacitated && !hasInvisible) {
          // Check distance
          const distance = api.getDistance(ourToken, token);
          if (distance !== undefined && distance !== null && distance <= 5) {
            disDueToProximity = true;
          }
        }
      }
    });
  }

  let attackModifiers = ${JSON.stringify(attackModifiers)};

  let autoCritical = attackModifiers.some(m => m.value === 'critical');
  // Check for crit on 19 or some other number
  const critOnMatch = /critical(\d+)/;
  const critOnMods = attackModifiers
    .map(m => {
      const match = m.value.toString().match(critOnMatch);
      return match ? parseInt(match[1], 10) : null;
    })
    .filter(value => value !== null);

  let critOn = null;
  if (critOnMods.length) {
    critOn = Math.min(...critOnMods);
  }

  // Filter these out of the modifiers array, we don't need them to be toggleable
  attackModifiers = attackModifiers.filter(m => !m.value.toString().startsWith('critical'));

  const minRoll = getMinRollModifier(attackModifiers);
  // Filter these out of the modifiers array, we don't need them to be toggleable
  attackModifiers = attackModifiers.filter(
    (m) => !m.value.toString().startsWith("minroll")
  );

  targets.forEach(target => {
    // Get calculated AC from modifiers - use if any
    const targetAc = getArmorClassForToken(target?.token);
    const targetName = target?.token?.identified === false ? target?.token?.record?.unidentifiedName : target?.token?.record?.name;
    const targetDistance = api.getDistance(ourToken, target?.token);
    const diceRoll = '1d20';

    // If this is a ranged spell, and there are enemies within 5 feet, apply disadvantage
    if (disDueToProximity) {
      attackModifiers.push({
        name: 'Enemy is Within 5 Feet',
        value: 'disadvantage',
        active: true
      });
    }

    // Get effects and modifiers for the target
    const targetEffects = getAttackModifiersForTarget(target?.token, targetDistance);
    targetEffects.forEach(r => {
      if (r.value === "critical") {
        autoCritical = true;
      } else {
        attackModifiers.push(r);
      }
    });

    // Get damage effects for the target
    const damageModifiers = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(${JSON.stringify(
      damageModifiers,
    )}));
    const targetDamageEffects = getDamageEffectsForTarget(
      ourToken,
      target?.token,
    );
    targetDamageEffects.forEach((r) => {
      damageModifiers.push(r);
    });

    const metadata = {
      "rollName": 'Attack',
      "attack": \`${spellName}\`,
      "icon": "IconWand",
      "portrait": ${JSON.stringify(spell?.portrait || "")},
      "targetName": targetName,
      "tooltip": \`Attack Roll for ${spellName}\`,
      "dc": targetAc,
      "damage": "${spellDamage}",
      "damageModifiers": damageModifiers,
      "damageIgnoresResistances": '${damageIgnoresResistances}',
      "damageIgnoresImmunities": '${damageIgnoresImmunities}',
      "autoCritical": autoCritical,
      "critOn": critOn,
      "minRoll": minRoll,
      "isSpell": true,
      "animation": ${JSON.stringify(animation)},
      "isRanged": ${rangedSpell},
      "tokenId": ourToken?._id,
      "targetId": target?.token?._id
    }
    api.promptRoll(\`${spellName}\`, \`\$\{diceRoll\}\`, attackModifiers, metadata, 'attack');
  });
  if (!targets.length) {
    const diceRoll = '1d20';
    const metadata = {
      "rollName": 'Attack',
      "attack": \`${spellName}\`,
      "icon": "IconWand",
      "portrait": ${JSON.stringify(spell?.portrait || "")},
      "tooltip": \`Attack Roll for ${spellName}\`,
      "dc": 0,
      "damage": "${spellDamage}",
      "critOn": critOn,
      "minRoll": minRoll,
      "damageModifiers": ${JSON.stringify(damageModifiers)},
      "damageIgnoresResistances": '${damageIgnoresResistances}',
      "damageIgnoresImmunities": '${damageIgnoresImmunities}',
      "animation": ${JSON.stringify(animation)},
      "isRanged": ${rangedSpell},
      "tokenId": ourToken?._id,
      "isSpell": true
    }

    // If this is a ranged spell, and there are enemies within 5 feet, apply disadvantage
    if (disDueToProximity) {
      attackModifiers.push({
        name: 'Enemy is Within 5 Feet',
        value: 'disadvantage',
        active: true
      });
    }

    api.promptRoll(\`${spellName}\`, \`\$\{diceRoll\}\`, attackModifiers, metadata, 'attack');
  }
  \`\`\``
      : "";

    // Saving Throw Buttons - look up saves of selected tokens and prompt roll for each
    const possibleSavingThrows = [];
    if (spell?.data?.isSave) {
      if (spell?.data?.savingThrow) {
        possibleSavingThrows.push(spell?.data?.savingThrow);
      }
      if (spell?.data?.additionalSavingThrows) {
        spell?.data?.additionalSavingThrows.forEach((savingThrow) => {
          possibleSavingThrows.push(savingThrow);
        });
      }
    }
    const rollSaveButtons = possibleSavingThrows
      .map((savingThrow) => {
        return `\`\`\`Roll_${capitalize(savingThrow)}_Save
  const selectedTokens = api.getSelectedOrDroppedToken();
  selectedTokens.forEach(token => {
    let saveModifiers = [];
    const modifier = token?.data?.['${savingThrow}Save'] || 0;
    saveModifiers.push({
      name: '${capitalize(savingThrow)} Save',
      value: modifier,
      active: true,
    });

    const saveMods = getEffectsAndModifiersForToken(token, ['saveBonus', 'savePenalty'], '${savingThrow}');
    // Also get modifiers specific to spells
    const spellSaveMods = getEffectsAndModifiersForToken(token, ['saveBonus', 'savePenalty'], 'spell');

    // Filter out duplicates based on name, value, type, and active status
    const allMods = [...saveMods, ...spellSaveMods].filter((mod, index, array) => {
      return index === array.findIndex(m =>
        m.name === mod.name &&
        m.value === mod.value &&
        m.modifierType === mod.modifierType &&
        m.active === mod.active
      );
    });

    allMods.forEach(mod => {
      saveModifiers.push(mod);
    });

    const minRoll = getMinRollModifier(saveModifiers);
    // Filter these out of the modifiers array, we don't need them to be toggleable
    saveModifiers = saveModifiers.filter(m => !m.value.toString().startsWith('minroll'));

    const metadata = {
      "rollName": '${capitalize(savingThrow)} Save',
      "tooltip": '${capitalize(savingThrow)} Saving Throw',
      "dc": ${saveDc},
      "minRoll": minRoll
    }

    api.promptRollForToken(token, '${capitalize(
      savingThrow,
    )} Save', '1d20', saveModifiers, metadata, 'save');
  });
  \`\`\``;
      })
      .join("\n");

    // Create macros for all effects that this spell can apply
    const effects = spell?.data?.effects || [];
    let effectButtons = getEffectMacrosFor(effects);

    const message = `
  #### ${spellIcon}${spellName}

  ---
  ${spellDescription}

  ---
  ${rollAttackButton}
  ${rollSaveButtons}
  ${damageButton}
  ${altDamageButtons}
  ${healingButton}
  ${effectButtons}
  `;

    const castingTime = spell?.data?.castingTime;
    const range = spell?.data?.range;
    let duration = spell?.data?.duration || "";
    // If there is a higher level duration, use that instead
    if (spellLevel >= 2) {
      duration = spell?.data?.[`durationLevel${spellLevel}`] || duration;
    }
    const hasConcentration = duration
      ?.toLowerCase()
      .startsWith("concentration");
    const durationTag = duration.replace("Concentration, ", "").trim();

    let components = spell?.data?.components;
    if (components) {
      // First clean up any extra spaces around commas
      components = components.trim().replace(/\s*,\s*/g, ",");
      // Split on V, S, M, or F, ignoring case
      components = components.split(/,(?=[VSMF])/i);
      components = components.map((component) => {
        const trimmedComponent = component.trim().toLowerCase(); // Trim and convert to lower case
        if (trimmedComponent === "v") {
          return "Verbal";
        } else if (trimmedComponent === "s") {
          return "Somatic";
        } else if (trimmedComponent === "m") {
          return "Material";
        } else if (trimmedComponent === "f") {
          return "Focus";
        } else if (trimmedComponent.match(/^m\s*\(/i)) {
          // Check if material component has a cost
          return trimmedComponent.toLowerCase().includes("worth")
            ? "Material $"
            : "Material";
        }
        return component.trim(); // Return the trimmed component if no match
      });
    }

    const tags = [
      {
        tooltip: "Cast a Spell",
        name: "Spell",
      },
    ];

    if (castingTime) {
      tags.push({
        tooltip: "Casting Time",
        name: castingTime.includes(",")
          ? castingTime.split(",")[0]
          : castingTime,
      });
    }

    if (range) {
      tags.push({
        tooltip: "Range",
        name: range,
      });
    }

    if (hasConcentration) {
      tags.push({
        tooltip: "This Spell Requires Concentration",
        name: "Concentration",
      });
    }

    if (durationTag) {
      tags.push({
        tooltip: "Duration",
        name: durationTag,
      });
    }

    if (components && Array.isArray(components) && components.length > 0) {
      components.forEach((component) => {
        tags.push({
          tooltip: component.includes("$")
            ? "Spell Components (with Cost Requirement)"
            : "Spell Components",
          name: component,
        });
      });
    }

    let lostConcentrationOn = "";
    if (hasConcentration) {
      // Check for existing Concentration effect
      const tokenForRecord = api.getToken();
      const effects = tokenForRecord?.effects || [];
      const hasEffect = effects.find(
        (effect) => effect?.name?.toLowerCase() === "concentration",
      );
      if (tokenForRecord) {
        const effectValue = spellName;
        const durationSeconds = getDurationInSeconds(duration);

        // If there's an existing concentration effect, remove it first
        if (hasEffect) {
          // Old spell name
          const oldValues = tokenForRecord?.effectValues || {};
          if (oldValues[hasEffect?._id]) {
            lostConcentrationOn = oldValues[hasEffect?._id];
          }

          // Remove old concentration effect, then add new one in callback
          api.removeEffectById(hasEffect._id, tokenForRecord, () => {
            // Get fresh record after removal before adding new effect
            api.getRecord(record.recordType, record._id, (updatedRecord) => {
              api.addEffect(
                "Concentration",
                updatedRecord,
                durationSeconds,
                effectValue,
              );
            });
          });
        } else {
          // No existing concentration, just add the new one
          api.addEffect(
            "Concentration",
            tokenForRecord,
            durationSeconds,
            effectValue,
          );
        }
      }
    }

    api.sendMessage(message, undefined, [], tags);

    if (lostConcentrationOn) {
      api.sendMessage(
        `Lost concentration on ${lostConcentrationOn}.`,
        undefined,
        [],
        [],
      );
    }

    if (animation === undefined || animation === null) {
      // Try to guess an animation based on the spell name and damage
      animation = getAnimationFor({
        abilityName: spellName,
        damage: spellDamage,
        healing: spellHealing,
        isRanged: rangedSpell,
      });
    }

    // If not an attack and there is an animation, play it
    if (!rollAttackButton && animation && animation.animationName) {
      // Get targets if needed
      const ourToken = api.getToken();
      const animationProps = {
        ...animation,
        originToken: ourToken,
      };
      const targets = api.getTargets();
      if (ourToken && targets.length > 0) {
        targets.forEach((target) => {
          if (target.token) {
            api.playAnimation(animation, ourToken._id, target.token._id);
          }
        });
      } else if (ourToken) {
        api.playAnimation(animation, ourToken._id);
      }
    }
  }

  // Returns the options for upcasting a spell
  function getLevelOptions() {
    const iconButtonOptions = [
      { icon: "IconCircleNumber1", label: "Level 1", value: 1 },
      { icon: "IconCircleNumber2", label: "Level 2", value: 2 },
      { icon: "IconCircleNumber3", label: "Level 3", value: 3 },
      { icon: "IconCircleNumber4", label: "Level 4", value: 4 },
      { icon: "IconCircleNumber5", label: "Level 5", value: 5 },
      { icon: "IconCircleNumber6", label: "Level 6", value: 6 },
      { icon: "IconCircleNumber7", label: "Level 7", value: 7 },
      { icon: "IconCircleNumber8", label: "Level 8", value: 8 },
      { icon: "IconCircleNumber9", label: "Level 9", value: 9 },
    ];

    const spellLevel = parseInt(value?.data?.level, 10) || 0; // Default to 0 if no level is set
    return iconButtonOptions.filter((option) => option.value >= spellLevel);
  }

  function toggleDaily() {
    const prepared = value;
    // We're in a list, so we need to use the data path to the fields metadata
    const dataPathToHideDaily = dataPath.replace(
      ".data.prepared",
      ".fields.maxDailyUses.hidden",
    );
    const dataPathToHideCounter = dataPath.replace(
      ".data.prepared",
      ".fields.dailyUses.hidden",
    );
    const dataPathToHideRestore = dataPath.replace(
      ".data.prepared",
      ".fields.restoreOnRest.hidden",
    );
    const dataPathToHideSaveDc = dataPath.replace(
      ".data.prepared",
      ".fields.saveDc.hidden",
    );
    const dataPathToHideAttackMod = dataPath.replace(
      ".data.prepared",
      ".fields.attackMod.hidden",
    );
    const valuesToSet = {};
    if (prepared === "daily") {
      valuesToSet[dataPathToHideDaily] = false;
      valuesToSet[dataPathToHideCounter] = false;
      valuesToSet[dataPathToHideRestore] = false;
      valuesToSet[dataPathToHideSaveDc] = false;
      valuesToSet[dataPathToHideAttackMod] = false;
    } else if (prepared === "atwill") {
      valuesToSet[dataPathToHideDaily] = true;
      valuesToSet[dataPathToHideCounter] = true;
      valuesToSet[dataPathToHideRestore] = true;
      valuesToSet[dataPathToHideSaveDc] = false;
      valuesToSet[dataPathToHideAttackMod] = false;
    } else {
      valuesToSet[dataPathToHideDaily] = true;
      valuesToSet[dataPathToHideCounter] = true;
      valuesToSet[dataPathToHideRestore] = true;
      valuesToSet[dataPathToHideSaveDc] = true;
      valuesToSet[dataPathToHideAttackMod] = true;
    }
    api.setValues(valuesToSet);
  }
</script>

  </accordion.control>
